name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You Just See this Poll?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=1)
---
Peter \-- A shocking [new NBC News poll](https://www.action4liberty.com/poll_shows_more_people_oppose_mandates_than_support_them?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=2) shows that more people now **oppose vaccine mandates** than support them. And this is extremely important since the CDC just authorized vaccines for 5-11 year old children this afternoon. Another poll, this one from Gallup, showed that 90% of Democrats plan to have their children under 12 get the experimental vaccine once it gets emergency authorization. Are you surprised by that? Fortunately, because you support groups like us who spend money informing voters, there's a completely different picture for Republicans and Independents. Less than a majority of Independents plan to vaccinate their kids and **o****nly 19% of Republicans** are going to let their kids get the jab.
# GREAT NEWS!
But here's the deal...politicians want more control over you and me. If they can force you to wear a mask and make you inject something in your body, then they have ultimate control. **And NOW they are coming for our kids!** I have three young ones under 12 years old, so it's personal for me. I'm not going to sit on the sidelines hoping that politicians STOP the Walz/Biden mandates. These cronies will sell us out in a hot minute for more control. Remember, they get a lot of money from Big Pharma! **Politicians MUST run into a well equipped army of patriots when they attack our liberties - which is what we bring to the battlefield. We will continue pressuring politicians to STOP Vaccine Mandates until we win. And that will make us bigger enemies of the Swamp - failure is not an option. Will you help us win this battle?** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=3)
---
If you would've told me in February of 2020 that we would be fighting against government mandated vaccines in November of 2021, I would've told you to put down the fiction books. But that's exactly the position we are in today.
These experimental vaccines clearly aren't what was originally sold to us. Any efficacy they have, appears to wane after less than 6 months. And it doesn't stop the vaccinated from getting or spreading COVID.
**Did you hear that[Lt Governor Peggy Flanagan just got COVID](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccinated_lt_governor_flanagan_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=4)? How about the news of White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki? These so-called "****breakthrough" cases appear to be quite common.**
On top of that, the Medical Establishment is ignoring all the science on natural immunity - they still want you to get the jab. Plus they're ignoring the alarming increase of data in VAERS (an online vaccine adverse event reporting system).
Furthermore, therapeutics like Ivermectin and Fluvoxamine show a lot of promise in treating COVID according to studies. But allowing that information out would undermine the Emergency Use Authorization that was granted to Big Pharma's vaccines.
Shall I go on?
**We at Action 4 Liberty will always stand for your individual choice when it comes to health freedom. You have every right to choose to get a vaccine if you want one. But these mandates MUST END! Our mission is to protect your freedom - especially your health freedom.**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=5)
Listen, it's not just the polling data that makes me believe we can win. We've actually already won a battle most people thought we'd lose...
## ENDING GOVERNOR WALZ' EMERGENCY POWERS
The haters will say that nothing can be done with Democrats in control of the Minnesota House or while Walz is in office. But our strategy of taking our message directly to voters works. In the end of the day, whether a politician is Republican or Democrat, they bow to the pressure from the people who can fire them!
Action 4 Liberty is the one group willing to do the hard work to Stop Vaccine Mandates by making tens of thousands of phone calls, door knocks and activating voters.
But we will fail if we don't get funded.
**Peter, help my team continue pressuring politicians so we can win this battle!**
[**Please make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop the Walz-Biden Vaccine Mandates. Want to make a bigger impact? Donating $500 helps keep more of our team in the field pressuring politicians every day.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=6)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_this_poll&n=9), software for leaders.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **BREAKING: Democrats just lost a race we shouldn’t have — in Virginia.** **Last year, Joe Biden won Virginia by 10 points. Tonight, Terry McAuliffe lost.** We’re sleepwalking into disaster next year. Democrats MUST pass policies that help ordinary people when in power. We shouldn’t be fighting two conservative Senators to pass commonsense policies like Paid Family Leave and allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices. Incrementalism and timidity gets us a one way ticket to losing in 2022. That’s what Virginia just showed us. **[_We’re fighting a proudly progressive race for Congress. Will you donate now? Every contribution goes towards a candidate running with a clear vision for the future._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2ccabmpo77yUXiKj4dVraOSF0U-0Pmt1iz33nWFao0rOELU4HCHa17-PFaTu2Cp8L9NyiMSw_zDIggEwSChGk5-A_fUtXnbaB3k-eoYWZrmn-jw-aAd3sXcZUcU_veDK_VlMsYaXyaN01l_NSzKBG3XLEJx8hDBDbRQItmJ-mKUPfB2EV6JSobxcvMoZg9jXy8FpXDZSi-y_V4MM9h1EIQ6S0pUshZc6cjTiQysCxtpgW1WnPztukenso3iJac04D5xutb4PqvzvmXwpDC64l0w/3gp/ENN_LemaT_q0ZAhDKcLuAw/h0/MNR8p8eVGuGWt5ION9r2xWmcdFDmS9Fi8Y7AwTrXp8g)** **This needs to be a wake up call for every Democrat.** Wasting time and wasting power is NOT how we win in 2022. Republicans are fired UP. We can’t miss this chance and hand them power back. **[_Rush a donation to our campaign for Congress right now. Send a message to the establishment that we are ready for change. Justice can’t wait._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2ccabmpo77yUXiKj4dVraOcdlaroCsHIKkcQVwMqyP5IE72HYYHtMBjkCmcKlvZIW7NeYI4U7XUK91rmeyj2Wi_A0w_GfNFDcikGUCDG1xcP-6fryKFiDcA42GKz56GhnwkfGOncz5hddzSO_qTb3gr8FDb4QHvC4dT2sPfKhHQqdwyew90dXd1Wtb9WhRCUbEsZAjsNktcdjSHVDyg5MUzEJZBWBU-83g5iRfvNlJub4GOix3y2n-s068EblRGU-sA7eGAXEk8W5RtiZW6DlgQ/3gp/ENN_LemaT_q0ZAhDKcLuAw/h1/RthVQOPN1C6ubpWGtwzEiIpFtxDf36t3bjFFgG47erE)** I’m heartbroken for Virginians whose lives will be affected by the dangerous Republican policies Glenn Youngkin will now enact. We _need_ strong progressives in Congress to push the Democratic Party to stand clearly on the side of the people. That’s how we win elections. Please, if you’re with us, it’s time to get off the sidelines. We can’t afford to sit this one out. In solidarity, Mckayla

name: Roger Misso
subject: The midterms begin TONIGHT.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

As we grapple with a Trump-enabled victory in Virginia tonight, we must not despair. [_**We must ACT.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=)

Because the truth is plain to see: [_**the midterm elections begin TONIGHT.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=)

An angry mob peddling in disinformation, racism, and xenophobia is well-organized. They just won Virginia. [_**We must draw the line here - no farther.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=)

We have been saying all year - [_**EARLY FUNDRAISING is EVERYTHING.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=) Reaching out to persuadable voters early is EVERYTHING. So we're getting to work NOW.

[_**We need to raise $25,000 TODAY to fund our deep canvassing efforts IMMEDIATELY to actually persuade voters to vote for candidates of honor and integrity in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=) But we cannot do it by ourselves. We need you!

[_**Chip in everything you can right now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/yHFoJQlgMys-vMrhK1A3NXj5HXWNDZjCguX3nzzCfW0=/QrqD6olKSXC-iA50xIE_IVlJUbSsPYq853c5T0HT__k=) This is how we make sure we don't repeat tonight's results in Virginia one year from now - and lose the House and Senate in the process.

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG2_fC4wpMNbT6ZhmDMGMybselGnO34LtzDRv-zak4uB5BbAeWDy8naYA3EEeMe3gpFmGAuxT0FU7M7C-bb7WHV0xUiqnX1keY0yhqAU-vOaOVl15SkN5lvPjYh0SqLQh4ULYAKBIZcH4bGFdS5oCg89TmlzTr2Nok4nln40kKbMBZwJAGqP6mdDx_Eb2suXqhkmrKlWF_LwhCM8ZEuyyPIR6z5Q1DaWxn8RLDZA3MF_rk%3D)

Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG22Gbhq9uUJLhqom5VmYD42qQ8vPzgJCVLkUOt0wRIc_mIe6YFOj2a2rZL2qItQjkKmo7ZHQB-_yt_WyF77tk1ymEAhVsrY6VsgURMGxzg_oP1VoEk3H-0ocni8heVTxrcEHfxlbS4xjQBse2Gjt11Q9fIZe4oOVDK9tEg5EsV-0wgDogH8P3FNLZuHz-MVpwJXYhI7GGMEDPkSI_UaWs1FbniUGMlzGmRkxFqAB7SzPI%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG2-ZedX5Enz48oABaPhwkbqEuDHtYDxaOzEQfcdFCl4ThDfiUsl_QgiVTfKuzdve8sLlel3xLVvbah_W1ebnU6ADTcX7sJyNjg7Yd5EnHEMtCONBelRm48J32wxvbkz3ADcE2kcusD_xFHP67HDlaaOFTh_VLL_Xrrqb6KDRb-WlLlJ5oNgZy8OjhJEuhV3FX1bkEuf_-mE0KLkd2368iegOO-nXUliRRNZuZNPyQua_Y%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG2nStDPnUOF7IvLhFEOSb3AOTFlFDfRgRfn3VKvw8YOex8AEX76Frx2YblCMfgw7et8A0Z2kfwJQkdEtGKIQEBjzgpGFVITB-nxC-c7KszSaBcj9UO7YdFmDyXpBfpma2fWnsIJi_3-clSOZdHJWVNsW2PQIPpjsPPmN5cwyIz0vXSt9T3LuFTEt0HdopVOMSKH0ngzzMaJjzdQ9N-L9yy5lhaACD7J_xB54C--CKTZi8%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG2dOIt5CAtEYsFbc8GwjmUZcsZw3zs2-2PJTY5stNBGUhG01gOvXIP5XUQaEKxMQmvd3FDkeTrFxzai3_aFFTFA9b9zn6OXi1B4SuUc0KFpy8CcfTrynj2L_osSivDu9h2QP0UThpx69hpDCuedfjrzeTR4G0rgQ7wrDczWwVyV_7slfhLeIntepQVVkBooC0A7Q0dN9Sg0rdGz_PlM7F43q_9aeuvk4eyUPs1IlkA5LA%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG27JSALOcbhXHDSg9vyeqwTJiEmYJkfo50to6YODTlpiv74BvnjeqRaThIfgQvJun5cxnDYI4dXxK3Bv7-HoeX-wE4z5Us8CaJ59PlBzKds2wozJdzCpgKJ6Y-nHv_9wyJnTX60WCDEM7mYjaj4PCQ3PBc7TOJxRo61_xeG33yI2APvErw_AeqO0zjkzaBQaKxE-4Le_TPQay1XNTkdrWD91OHo0EChFiNxtv2AvrU1zg%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff6f69b430c140789a461b1cfb7fadd6&_e=d290rwAM2rzy2FdMtMEIA-FN81JFUlK_4iAKiZqW5VII80k80rpRE6ZPPzix_SOD69KqVNxptluoAaQy4WX9m-Vi-FFPEyIUWK52T6YPY-BGLRhjQLiUhbXdNe0XyOw6PC6etqPgoz7frsYT1P5jrxiSW_RXcdtX6kgj5sJElJrWCZKvozHID5scFnzZL5uphqoXlID04EYyIPrR-JHSPhggPlqCz84l4QCMMBsE15gxlKYUWAPbyaYGU-HHUaG24XLv780I3VOnKsPWHZL_xzm5hR7vSUVccFCR_NVwHc4Gt31uJO8dPwzQdZs7iID8_EP9uUUTamEzkZ7hzYvvC31YtJ4_hdd00lQfnW7xAvTC2c1cDsRkzlv6xnjp2pVgdUs0YmiVECGgRg6ZatXCfHZbCLB6ZZiLb2twfeVDYJ1bBgwP7NugkX7ZBciYhGNOSz_0V13gLrgQE83KEyp6TbfRkbyy1jlbnYZfF0gQGEY%3D)** Thank you.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Carey?=
subject: Thank You
body:
Mike Carey Wins OH-15 Special Election | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikecareywins-5010985?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Mike Carey Statement on OH-15 Victory** _Lancaster_ \- Mike Carey issued the following statement after his victory in tonight's Special Election for Ohio's 15th Congressional District.

"Tonight the people of Ohio’s Fifteenth Congressional District have placed their trust in me and I could not me more humbled to represent them.

Republican, Democrat, or Independent, I promise to fight for every person in this district because the problems facing our nation are beyond partisanship and have real consequences for working families.

Like so many across this district, I was raised in a small town and am a product of a hard working family. Right now we are all struggling with rising costs and lost opportunities. That’s why I’ll fight to rein in wasteful spending, create good jobs, and ensure high quality education so parents can build the lives they envision for their children.

Unfortunately, the current leadership in Washington has ignored our values, while unabashedly forcing their radical agenda on us. I don’t think there is any question that our country is headed in wrong direction.

People want change, but government is in the way. As your Congressman, I will work relentlessly to bring that change and make the people of this district proud." ### Contact
Blaine Kelly
blaine@careyforcongress.com
614-517-7440

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf9ergv6594ji2v7jkmvbn3bookse3lgc5in9gs0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj6cor2chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvpqvt3gqbvr2o5ni99gkuquc31rk5e41varo8u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj6cor2chh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z51ijbnpdllr7msct5tjagfcpqr3i18kq5gkrn8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj6cor2chh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Newsmax Finance
subject: The Government’s New 50% Retirement Tax Trap. Are You at Risk?
body:
Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy! The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ktiepb4du5s10t237fe93091cs9orhqdad9ilo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj69o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onncupm6dbmelo6acb4smondcjkmeo61c5ke1rmathkm2rbedphe9i30pphcur3eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db66apb6p77mpgmccdgm9h3csh5u)
| | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. **Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!** **The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself.** Dear Friend, If you or any of your loved ones are planning to retire in the next couple of years, please pay close attention. The government has changed the rules on you, midgame. One wrong move now could trigger a 50% tax on your retirement accounts. Which is why _Barron's_ called this rule change "the most sweeping retirement legislations in more than a decade." And _Forbes_ simply called it a "ticking time bomb." Millions of Americans are unprepared for what's about to come. That's why Newsmax has teamed up with some of the nation's top IRA experts to put together a FREE special report, **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3uh1an45vteub3brn2mrn5fc74vsui1ovq1n36g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj69o34clh2bs)The 50% tax is just the beginning of all the sneaky traps that Congress has laid out for you in this new legislation. [**Click here to claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp25356o12ahmajh0shikno1kdf551b15b2bgso0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj69o34clh2bs) _._ Inside this brand-new special report, you'll discover: ✔ **"Uh oh... we owe the IRS now..."** Your beneficiaries might be saying this, if you don't read the fine print on your retirement account. But you can protect them from headache and hassle by including this one word... on this one form. Page 27. ✔ **The 20% tax trap.** 1 in 2 Americans make a simple money transfer move every year. But now, this same move could give you a surprise tax bill. But you can avoid this altogether with the simple "triple t" strategy. It's easy to do and it won't sound alarms at the IRS. Page 22. ✔ **WARNING: What never to do with your IRA.** This honest mistake among family members can make every dime taxable and become the kiss of death for your retirement account. See how you can avoid it. Page 27. ✔ **The sneaky IRS move that could cost you dearly.** Did you know that proposed IRS rules - years away from becoming official - could impact your taxes THIS YEAR? It's true. But you can navigate this gray area easily and avoid big surprises. Page 15. ✔ **The simple dispute that can cost you $5,000 to $10,000 or more... plus a year of your valuable time!** Read this warning before you decide to dispute anything with the IRS. Or even ask them for clarification on issues. Page 30. Everything is spelled out in detail in **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl710t0917gb8ffo1ts4c44dut81mk898vfrqg48_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj69o34clh2bs)With your retirement savings at stake, this is the most important briefing you'll read in your lifetime. The stakes are higher than ever. A 50% tax could cut your savings in half. But it's 100% avoidable. This new special report from Newsmax Finance has the solution. [**Claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zegemrhpdthqa4kj1pirmd8f99gsh4ptfrfqrs98_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjj69o34clh2bs). Sincerely, Newsmax Finance

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I want to know your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
|
#
In this dangerous moment for our democracy, it's more important than ever that people of good faith stick together. That's why I was so touched that your contributions helped us reach our ambitious October fundraising goal! Even if you weren't able to give this time, your support is greatly appreciated. We're now just over one year away from midterm elections that will determine who controls the Senate, and we're up against a Republican Party that has surrendered its identity to an increasingly authoritarian and unhinged Donald Trump — and have shown that there is no limit to what they are willing to do to seize power. **Last night’s results in Virginia, where a Trump-endorsed candidate won after a campaign of fear and division, show that we are going to have to work hard and stick together to prevent a Republican takeover in 2022 and preserve our fight for a better future.** But still, with the continued grassroots support of concerned Americans like yourself, we can expand our control of the Senate, save our democracy, and defend the rule of law. As we approach this critical fight, I want to gauge your opinion on an important issue. The filibuster is an antiquated and undemocratic Senate procedure which allows 41 out of 100 senators to block most legislation. It is nowhere to be found in the Constitution and subverts the will of the American people. I recognize there are different views on this issue, but I feel that the time has come to take action to end, or amend, the filibuster so we can break through this debilitating gridlock and preserve our democracy. **Do you agree with ending the filibuster? Let me know by clicking one of the options below!** | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38249711/314619179/1105437073?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_PT_1MO_211103_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Zjk4ZjBjMS1hYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYsYbevceVXLxdZZtxphWo7DcPYCxBe-1QHAzVSTe_o=)

| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38249713/314619182/1105437073?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_PT_1MO_211103_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Zjk4ZjBjMS1hYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYsYbevceVXLxdZZtxphWo7DcPYCxBe-1QHAzVSTe_o=)

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: My son needs your help
body:
FKUSA Outbound 5 Wendy

Peter,

Just the other day, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene urged
her nearly 500,000 Twitter followers to donate to my son Kyle's
official legal defense fund, and Twitter promptly slapped a
violation notification on it.

Welcome to my life since last August when my son defended
himself with lethal force against a vicious and armed mob in
Kenosha, Wisconsin.

Almost immediately, our corrupt media, dishonest political
hacks, and Big Tech tyrants colluded in a vicious smear and
censorship campaign to baselessly slander my son as a "mass
murderer" and "white supremacist" and crush any effort to get the
truth out and raise money for a legal defense.

But we are still standing - and I'm writing to you now with an
emergency request.

On November 1, Kyle's trial, for what may be the most important
self-defense case of our lifetimes, has begun and we urgently
need help raising a final $300,000 for legal costs and
case-related expenses.

Will you rush a donation to directly help Kyle right now?

If you have children of your own, you understand why I'm asking
for your help. Before anything else, I'm a mother who loves her
son.

But I'm also an American who believes deeply in the values of
this country, and I'm horrified by what I've seen over this past
year and a half.

Politicians let anarchists dominate our streets, then blame the
police for violence.

The media virtue signals about "speaking truth to power" while
ruining the lives of innocent people with fake news and grotesque
accusations.

And the Big Tech executives who've gotten rich and powerful
because we, the American people, have used their platforms, are
now brazenly censoring us.

I, for one, am tired of being silenced and intimidated. And I
know there are millions more out there who feel the same exact
way.

Well I won't sit back and watch his life be stolen. I love my
son, and I believe truth and justice still mean something in
America.

So please rush the largest donation you can to directly help
Kyle right now. The trial started on November 1 and we must be
ready for everything they're going to throw at us.

Together, we're going to clear his name and get him home for
good. And in the process, we're going to score an historic
victory for our God-given right of self-defense.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,

Wendy Rittenhouse

DONATE NOW >>

Free Kyle USA

PO Box 5322

Reno, NV 89513

subject: Last night's results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Thank you for everything.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38251878/314629356/147906251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzY3OTI2Mi1hZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PL17azSKAJ6EIIZGUsP00y-0Y2bI7xYXvJOjF_al7k=&emci=00ea1610-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3679262-ae3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7540477)

| | Thank you, Derek.

Though this is not the result we’d hoped for, I’m so proud of what we built over the last year.

This campaign would not have been possible without our incredible team of grassroots supporters -- and that includes you, Derek. I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart. The doors you knocked, the calls you made, and the dollars you chipped in made all the difference.

Losing is never easy. We put ourselves out there and left it all on the field.

But Derek, our work is not done. It’s still on each of us to help move Virginia forward.

We must protect Virginia's great public schools and invest in our students. We must protect affordable health care coverage, raise the minimum wage faster, and expand paid leave so working families have a fighting shot. We must protect voting rights, protect a woman's right to choose, and, above all else, we must protect our democracy.

While there will be setbacks along the way, I am confident that the long term path of Virginia is toward inclusion, openness and tolerance for all. And I’ll continue to be a part of that fight with you.

Thank you for everything.

\-- Terry

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

_If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/00ea1610-223c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/c3679262-ae3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzY3OTI2Mi1hZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PL17azSKAJ6EIIZGUsP00y-0Y2bI7xYXvJOjF_al7k=&id=108609855)._

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Biden is tearing down the wall
body:
The Biden administration wants to pass out cash to thousands of illegal immigrants; $450,000 to each illegal immigrant that entered our country in 2018 to be exact.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZocAxyVYnaTGmWZ4od9PV50btJz0Cj3uSJzzSetdp6IHWdV_0XgD3uXUJOSNHUS1eR8pukreZ1GV0jqpH17OoFg3o-JCzR7YZABOlobFpy9MH3WfPfIDN08oztKLmVDpzErmgvrlHst2WoSB7OKd5jC3OsxZlyb5mo1C7mB6d1Jf3aD5ILupw==&c=6endFrd0-3weC7SGjKa-3woqnVt1j2BrgBIiV8C-AviRvtSFp_hjlg==&ch=lMvmc68MNWX5cfHnETuGsdqmtiZKPjcWNXLpWGqvjUuYJVlKQ_QqNQ==)
---
| Peter,

The Biden administration wants to pass out cash to thousands of illegal immigrants; $450,000 to each illegal immigrant that entered our country in 2018 to be exact.
But this isn't the only insane idea being pushed by Biden and the Democrats. The Left is trying to force a $5 TRILLION spending bill to fund their pipe dreams.

[Peter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZocAxyVYnaTGmWZ4od9PV50btJz0Cj3uSJzzSetdp6IHWdV_0XgD3uXUJOSNHUS1eR8pukreZ1GV0jqpH17OoFg3o-JCzR7YZABOlobFpy9MH3WfPfIDN08oztKLmVDpzErmgvrlHst2WoSB7OKd5jC3OsxZlyb5mo1C7mB6d1Jf3aD5ILupw==&c=6endFrd0-3weC7SGjKa-3woqnVt1j2BrgBIiV8C-AviRvtSFp_hjlg==&ch=lMvmc68MNWX5cfHnETuGsdqmtiZKPjcWNXLpWGqvjUuYJVlKQ_QqNQ==)[, I'm asking for your support to help me stop this crazy spending spree.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZocAxyVYnaTGmWZ4od9PV50btJz0Cj3uSJzzSetdp6IHWdV_0XgD3uXUJOSNHUS1eR8pukreZ1GV0jqpH17OoFg3o-JCzR7YZABOlobFpy9MH3WfPfIDN08oztKLmVDpzErmgvrlHst2WoSB7OKd5jC3OsxZlyb5mo1C7mB6d1Jf3aD5ILupw==&c=6endFrd0-3weC7SGjKa-3woqnVt1j2BrgBIiV8C-AviRvtSFp_hjlg==&ch=lMvmc68MNWX5cfHnETuGsdqmtiZKPjcWNXLpWGqvjUuYJVlKQ_QqNQ==)
As Ohio's next senator, I will demand that Congress finish building the wall, send illegal immigrants back to their home country, and get our country back on budget.
We must restore safety to our communities again.
This is both a national security and economic challenge D.C. elites will never understand. The Establishment lives behind walls of their own with armed guards to protect them, but refuses to provide everyday Americans the same basic protection.
When I am elected to the U.S. Senate, I will demand we finish building the wall, restore sanity to our immigration system, and REFUSE to give in to the insane ideas of politicians who wish to live without borders.

Peter, I can't do this without you. Please join my campaign by clicking any button below to donate now.

body:
|
| | | **BREAKING: VIRGINIA FLIPS FROM BLUE TO RED**

Here's what we know for sure: **Terry McAuliffe is a loser.**

He lost this election. He lost the confidence of Virginia's voters. He's lost any credibility as a public official.

Here's what we also know: This election was just the beginning. Whether Terry admits it or not, Republicans won ALL OVER Virginia, from the State House to the Attorney General -- and it's going to fuel the most EPIC election of our lifetimes in 2022.

**[But we can't do it without you. We need YOUR help to repeat what happened in Virginia last night all over the country next November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58683826:6L6g2z2NT:m:1:3299561967:D68CA78773C75B17B51C26A234067071:r "But we can’t
do it without you. We need YOUR help to repeat what happened in Virginia last night all over the country next November.")**
**RED WAVE 2022 FUND**
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58683826:6L6g2z2NT:m:1:3299561967:D68CA78773C75B17B51C26A234067071:r "Generic Button")
---

That's why it's SO CRUCIAL that we defend Conservatives and FLIP THE HOUSE in 2022!

You stepped up in a HUGE way to claim this win for Republicans. But the fight isn't over! Here's what's on the line in the next election:
* Fighting for the rights of parents to be involved in their children's education
* Stopping Biden's rapid inflation and supply chain crisis
* Defending -- not defunding -- our brave law enforcement officers

With so much at stake, no Republican can afford to sit on the sidelines any longer. House Democrats are already seeking revenge and plotting their next move. Nancy Pelosi is going to go after our conservatives harder than ever to keep her grip on power.

**[Rush in a donation now to make a HUGE impact on our nation and FLIP THE HOUSE RED IN 2022>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58683826:6L6g2z2NT:m:1:3299561967:D68CA78773C75B17B51C26A234067071:r "Rush in a donation
now to make a HUGE impact on our nation and FLIP THE HOUSE RED IN 2022>>>")**
**RED WAVE 2022 FUND**

---

I hope that we can count on you.

For Freedom,

Taylor
Team House GOP

body:
Tell the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Senator Durbin joined a bipartisan group, including Senator Murkowski of Alaska, and announced a new compromise on the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.
Now, we’re closer than ever to honoring the civil rights icon John Lewis and protecting the fundamental right to vote for every eligible American across the country.
If we’re going to keep our democracy, every voter must be empowered to have their say in free and fair elections. But with states undermining voting rights at every turn, it’s past time for federal action to protect the right to vote.
Senator Durbin will keep standing up for voting rights -- but he needs supporters like you with him:
**[Will you call on Senate Republicans to follow Sen. Murkowski’s lead and join these efforts? Add your name to the petition now to tell the Senate to pass voting protections today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38253572/314636142/689042622?ms=dd_em_211103_1&refcode=dd_em_211103_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDY1ZTk3Yy1iNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwRK1FghR0nPSfXigGnMea3mrSB3CHjBP-wN5WXTYfo=&emci=981335b3-fd3b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7d65e97c-b63c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2727974)**

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. body:
The Senate will vote on the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act TODAY.
#
This is urgent, Peter:
**The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is up for a vote again today in the Senate.**
The Senate GOP has already stood in the way of multiple efforts to protect the right to vote -- but Patty Murray and Senate Democrats are doing everything they can to keep up the fight.
**[We cannot let the GOP continue to attack the right to vote across the country and block voting rights legislation in the Senate. It’s time to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Sign the petition now to demand Senate Republicans stop blocking voting protections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38254810/314641252/1193793121?ms=pm_em_211103_1&refcode=pm_em_211103_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTEyYzhlNC1iNzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rYUVLjZDXdwafcXkWIW-ETRds5o1RaFFrgkTEsmPC4Y=&emci=68e477ef-b23c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ca12c8e4-b73c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**

Team Patty

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | **BREAKING: VIRGINIA FLIPS FROM BLUE TO RED**

Here's what we know for sure: **Terry McAuliffe is a loser.**

He lost this election. He lost the confidence of Virginia's voters. He's lost any credibility as a public official.

Here's what we also know: This election was just the beginning. Whether Terry admits it or not, Republicans won ALL OVER Virginia, from the State House to the Attorney General -- and it's going to fuel the most EPIC election of our lifetimes in 2022.

**[But we can't do it without you. We need YOUR help to repeat what happened in Virginia last night all over the country next November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58684060:J5-FVz2PN:m:1:3298722022:5AF91A874DDC7F0993BB2B2D6DD519E5:r "But we can’t
do it without you. We need YOUR help to repeat what happened in Virginia last night all over the country next November.")**
**RED WAVE 2022 FUND**
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58684060:J5-FVz2PN:m:1:3298722022:5AF91A874DDC7F0993BB2B2D6DD519E5:r "Generic Button")
---

That's why it's SO CRUCIAL that we defend Conservatives and FLIP THE HOUSE in 2022!

You stepped up in a HUGE way to claim this win for Republicans. But the fight isn't over! Here's what's on the line in the next election:
* Fighting for the rights of parents to be involved in their children's education
* Stopping Biden's rapid inflation and supply chain crisis
* Defending -- not defunding -- our brave law enforcement officers

With so much at stake, no Republican can afford to sit on the sidelines any longer. House Democrats are already seeking revenge and plotting their next move. Nancy Pelosi is going to go after our conservatives harder than ever to keep her grip on power.

**[Rush in a donation now to make a HUGE impact on our nation and FLIP THE HOUSE RED IN 2022>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58684060:J5-FVz2PN:m:1:3298722022:5AF91A874DDC7F0993BB2B2D6DD519E5:r "Rush in a donation
now to make a HUGE impact on our nation and FLIP THE HOUSE RED IN 2022>>>")**
**RED WAVE 2022 FUND**

---

I hope that we can count on you.

For Freedom,

Taylor
Team House GOP

name: Ras Smith
subject: Democrats' loss in Virginia doesn't change much for our campaign here in Iowa.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
We already rejected the conventional playbook. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255785/314645006/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2M2E3Ny1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeH-Va68Abh-Uz_ouOgDHajbX0aoHOE1mPr7TBnzhAk=)
Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255786/314645007/-73891749?refcode=em-11321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2M2E3Ny1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeH-Va68Abh-Uz_ouOgDHajbX0aoHOE1mPr7TBnzhAk=) to our grassroots campaign, but first, let me tell you why Democrats' loss in Virginia doesn't change much for our campaign: **• We already rejected the conventional playbook.** We're not writing off any person or community -- even those deemed "too red" or apathetic. We're traveling to every corner of the state to talk to everyone, so that we can find real solutions to our problems. That alone shows EVERY community that Democrats fight for everyone.

**• We're continuing to stand with striking workers at John Deere,** who by the way, voted down the proposed contract from management yesterday. Workers are making it clear they demand dignity and respect on the job, and this campaign is proud to stand with workers over corporate profits. We've chosen this path not only because we think supporting workers and unions is the right thing to do, but because it actually works.

My dad showed me after decades in the labor movement that fighting for working people is a roadmap we can use to win red and rural areas. When we show people that we fight for them -- we can win their trust, build real relationships, and win tough elections.

**That said, Governor Kim Reynolds has a few million in the bank and Virginia will inevitably put some wind in her sails.** While we still have a long way to go, I'm confident that with our approach, we can win this race. But it's going to take a TON of people chipping in small amounts from across the state and country, which is why I'm asking:

[**If you're fired up after last night and ready to chip in to a campaign that's putting people over politics, please make a contribution of $3 to help us reach our $10,000 online fundraising goal for November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255787/314645008/-73891749?refcode=em-11321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2M2E3Ny1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeH-Va68Abh-Uz_ouOgDHajbX0aoHOE1mPr7TBnzhAk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255788/314645009/-73891749?refcode=em-11321-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2E2M2E3Ny1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeH-Va68Abh-Uz_ouOgDHajbX0aoHOE1mPr7TBnzhAk=)

clean_body: We already rejected the conventional playbook. | = Friend, In a moment I'm going to ask you to = to our grassroots campaign, but first, let me tell you why Democrats' loss in Virginia doesn't change much for our campaign: • We already rejected the conventional playbook. We're not writing off any person or community -- even those deemed "too red" or apathetic. We're traveling to every corner of the state to talk to everyone, so that we can find real solutions to our problems. That alone shows EVERY community that Democrats fight for everyone. • We're continuing to stand with striking workers at John Deere, who by the way, voted down the proposed contract from management yesterday. Workers are making it clear they demand dignity and respect on the job, and this campaign is proud to stand with workers over corporate profits. We've chosen this path not only because we think supporting workers and unions is the right thing to do, but because it actually works. My dad showed me after decades in the labor movement that fighting for working people is a roadmap we can use to win red and rural areas. When we show people that we fight for them -- we can win their trust, build real relationships, and win tough elections. That said, Governor Kim Reynolds has a few million in the bank and Virginia will inevitably put some wind in her sails. While we still have a long way to go, I'm confident that with our approach, we can win this race. But it's going to take a TON of people chipping in small amounts from across the state and country, which is why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. name: Laurie Bishop
subject: My experience as a doula
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255801/314645186/483879871?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211103choice_lb_90do_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2E2OGU5Yy1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3M3oNZarGYerKVb6m_9IB_YQGOwuXIUlWeYfl4iBuD8=)
---
Friend, Two days ago, the **U.S. Supreme Court began hearing a case to determine the constitutionality of abortion bans like the one passed in Texas this year.** If anti-choice conservatives get their way, this could mean the beginning of the end of _Roe v. Wade_ and legal access to abortion as we know it. These extreme laws being passed by Republicans in state legislatures aim to ban abortion as early as six weeks, a point in which many people don’t yet realize they’re pregnant. In Texas’ case, the law puts a $10,000 bounty on the heads of anyone — doctors, family, friends, Uber drivers — who helps someone get an abortion after the 6-week mark. It’s terrifying. Having experience as a doula — a trained professional who provides support to patients before, during, and after giving birth — has only further solidified my belief in reproductive freedom and choice. Childbirth is a remarkable thing that those of us with a uterus can do, and with it comes a circle of community, support, and shared wisdom. At the center of it all is vulnerability and trust: ... of yourself, your body and the process.
... of your goals and the preparation and plans you made to achieve them.
... of those who are supporting you to achieve those goals and plans. **Empowerment is key, and it starts with people being able to make reproductive healthcare decisions with their doctors — without the interference of politicians.** As a mother myself, I had the privilege of experiencing unmedicated home births close to a hospital with stability and no triggered trauma. But every person’s pregnancy and birth experience is different, and every pregnant person deserves the autonomy to do what is best for their well being. That’s why this SCOTUS case is so alarming, especially with anti-choice Trump nominees Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett on the bench. If we’re going to defend access to reproductive choice in this country, we need leaders in Congress willing to take a stand. **It’s simple: I’m pro-choice, and Republican Ryan Zinke isn’t. The choice is clear.** **[Will you help me defeat Zinke next year and become Montana’s newest U.S. representative so I can defend access to legal abortion in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38255803/314645188/483879871?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211103choice_lb_90do_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2E2OGU5Yy1iYTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3M3oNZarGYerKVb6m_9IB_YQGOwuXIUlWeYfl4iBuD8=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, Two days ago, the U.S. Supreme Court began hearing a case to determine the constitutionality of abortion bans like the one passed in Texas this year. If anti-choice conservatives get their way, this could mean the beginning of the end of Roe v. Wade and legal access to abortion as we know it. These extreme laws being passed by Republicans in state legislatures aim to ban abortion as early as six weeks, a point in which many people don’t yet realize they’re pregnant. In Texas’ case, the law puts a $10,000 bounty on the heads of anyone — doctors, family, friends, Uber drivers — who helps someone get an abortion after the 6-week mark. It’s terrifying. Having experience as a doula — a trained professional who provides support to patients before, during, and after giving birth — has only further solidified my belief in reproductive freedom and choice. Childbirth is a remarkable thing that those of us with a uterus can do, and with it comes a circle of community, support, and shared wisdom. At the center of it all is vulnerability and trust: ... of yourself, your body and the process. ... of your goals and the preparation and plans you made to achieve them. ... of those who are supporting you to achieve those goals and plans. Empowerment is key, and it starts with people being able to make reproductive healthcare decisions with their doctors — without the interference of politicians. As a mother myself, I had the privilege of experiencing unmedicated home births close to a hospital with stability and no triggered trauma. But every person’s pregnancy and birth experience is different, and every pregnant person deserves the autonomy to do what is best for their well being. That’s why this SCOTUS case is so alarming, especially with anti-choice Trump nominees Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett on the bench. If we’re going to defend access to reproductive choice in this country, we need leaders in Congress willing to take a stand. It’s simple: I’m pro-choice, and Republican Ryan Zinke isn’t. The choice is clear. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing by me, Laurie | Laurie Bishop is a mom, former small business owner, education advocate, and an experienced Democratic leader who has been representing her small town in the Montana legislature since she unseated a Republican in 2016. Help her beat Ryan Zinke and represent Montanans in Congress: = | = | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Peter,

Last night, something amazing happened. Republican Glenn Youngkin won an election to be the next governor of Virginia. Their state saw a Democrat at the top of the ticket win by 10% in 2020. But the tide is turning nationwide! From Virginia to Minnesota, the winners are the CHILDREN.... The heroes are the PARENTS. The message is: _DON’T MESS WITH MAMMA BEARS_.

Whether it’s choices in education or health freedom, parents declared last night, “THE STATE IS NOT OUR PARTNER.” Moms and dads are reclaiming power and agency over their own children. Our campaign has been talking about these issues since March! Political indoctrination in schools is not acceptable and neither is forcing medical procedures on our kids! We can win Minnesota based on these incredibly-important issues. Check out our video from last night by clicking the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=3c79b68b07&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Step one in shocking the world like Virginia did is participating in the caucus process for our campaign! We will fight for parental rights and the ability for parents to have a say in their children's lives and education. [Sign up here and we'll give you all the resources to help make a positive change in Minnesota!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0b47bab26e&e=33b11688c1)

Stand up today and say: "I believe Minnesota can flip!" We need you to join the fight. Just like Virginia, our children are relying on us to make a different decision and change the path our state is on!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

My district was just declared a toss up, Pelosi is scrambling to take back my seat, and my Far-Left opponent is smearing my name in every corner of my state.

| | Peter, Last week, an exclusive report from _Rolling Stone_ alleged that Madison Cawthorn’s staff participated in preparation meetings with organizers prior to the January 6th insurrection. **If these allegations prove true, we cannot allow Cawthorn to remain in Congress. But if Congress fails to expel him or Cawthorn refuses to turn in his pin, Jasmine Beach-Ferrara will organize and win the old-fashioned way.** [**Cawthorn has crossed the line too many times. If you think he should be expelled from Congress if these allegations are verified, add your name to our petition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38259027/314652010/1842345704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmYxODQxZC1iZjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnr9w7tOMZUgchMkbagthN_qzklYiSY6JaxOqrLqd0=&emci=9ff08987-f53b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4ff1841d-bf3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22032259) | | | [Add your name ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38259028/314652011/1842345704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmYxODQxZC1iZjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnr9w7tOMZUgchMkbagthN_qzklYiSY6JaxOqrLqd0=&emci=9ff08987-f53b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4ff1841d-bf3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22032259)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Beau Biden’s Moonshot
disclaimer_text: paid for by selling off 25 million barrels of oil from our strategic national reserves
body:
When you’re a member of Congress, one decision – one vote, resonates for decades or more.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A) When you’re a member of Congress, one decision – one vote, resonates for decades or more.

One reason why vaccine mandates are possible right now is due to the passage of the “21st Century Cures Act” back in 2016 – **and yes, my opponent, Daniel Webster, actually showed up to vote for this one**.

This is [**another reason you should help me defeat Webster**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A).

The bill allowed drug companies to bypass the FDA approval process with “data summaries” and “real world evidence” rather than force them to submit data from full clinical trials.

The bill even allowed anecdotal data and insurance claims to be used as proof of a successful drug trial!

To make matters worse, it opened a Pandora’s Box for medical privacy by stopping software companies from actually protecting patient data within the health care system. Companies can now be fined up to one million dollars for blocking access to our electronic health information.

If your jaw just hit the floor after reading this, you’re not alone. So did mine.

**So now, our vaccination status can be shared among health care providers and government agencies without our consent or even our knowledge!**

Help me defeat Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster [**by supporting my campaign today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A).

To add insult to injury, when he voted for this bill, Do-Nothing Dan voted to support giving out $4.8 BILLION in honor of Joe Biden’s son Beau.

The “Beau Biden Moonshot” doled out $4.8 billion to the National Institutes of Health and it was partially paid for by selling off 25 million barrels of oil from our strategic national reserves.

While Biden promised the “moonshot” would cure cancer “in 10 years”, positive results from the program are hard to come by – **because they didn’t happen**.

The downward trajectory of cancer rates has remained the same since 1999 – which is great! But Biden’s $4.8 BILLION “moonshot” made NO impact on the stats.

But, thanks to Joe Biden, as well as Dan Webster’s vote, the bill has made it easier for the government to violate your privacy and enforce unconstitutional vaccine mandates on you and fellow Americans.

It really makes me wonder, are we sure Do-Nothing Dan isn’t a Democrat?

[**Help me get to Congress to hold the line against wasteful spending and defend our medical privacy and rights!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A)

These do-nothing career politicians like Dan Webster have caused enough problems, and it’s well past time to send them packing into retirement.

[**Help me do that by chipping in to back my campaign.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/C3Q54pqv892l763T0PB3rB763pZQ/7MpDHet3yzzHiXzRB4hQ0A)

Thanks so much.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
#

Team,
Since Democrats took back control of Congress, we’ve seen life-changing legislation, like the American Rescue Plan, pass without a single Republican vote.
Mondaire worked tirelessly to get this bill out the door, and the impact was felt across America — where we were able to cut child poverty in half through the expanded Child Tax Credit, get small business owners funding to keep their businesses open, issue stimulus checks to working families, and expand vaccine distribution.
It’s clear that with Democrats in charge, we can get things done for the American people.
But Mondaire’s seat will be up for grabs in 2022, and Republicans are already doing everything in their power to unseat him, take control of the House, and undo all of Democrats’ hard work.

clean_body: Team, Since Democrats took back control of Congress, we’ve seen life-changing legislation, like the American Rescue Plan, pass without a single Republican vote. Mondaire worked tirelessly to get this bill out the door, and the impact was felt across America — where we were able to cut child poverty in half through the expanded Child Tax Credit, get small business owners funding to keep their businesses open, issue stimulus checks to working families, and expand vaccine distribution. It’s clear that with Democrats in charge, we can get things done for the American people. But Mondaire’s seat will be up for grabs in 2022, and Republicans are already doing everything in their power to unseat him, take control of the House, and undo all of Democrats’ hard work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Our team is expecting many tough battles ahead, but we can face any challenge with strong grassroots support. **FROM:** Peter Willis

DeSantis puts his potential presidential run above all else, and has shown us time and again that politics are nothing but a power play to him -- when in reality, people's lives, health, and wellbeing are at stake. Thanks to his latest ploy, Floridians are quite _literally_ paying the price.

Throughout the entire pandemic, DeSantis has politicized COVID-19. His administration fined local school boards who defied a state ban on mask mandates in classrooms and has even taken it so far as to withhold funding from districts that received federal grants meant to blunt the state's fines. Now, he wants to punish schools and businesses for imposing vaccine and mask mandates.

**This is not about politics._It never was_. This is about public health. It's about the safety and wellbeing of all Floridians who've been forced to deal with the worst end of this pandemic -- all because “leaders” like DeSantis chose to neglect the people for partisan gain.**

There were multiple times throughout the pandemic in which Florida became the leading state in new COVID cases and had some of the highest rates of transmission. Too many of us lost loved ones. Too many of our neighbors fell ill. Too many of our small businesses were forced to close their doors.

YOU are the reason I'm in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason I'm able to advance our mission to lower taxes, improve national security, cut down unnecessary government spending, support small businesses, provide more educational opportunities for our children, and keep the American Dream alive for future generations. name: John Fetterman
subject: They called it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Democrats won’t win in 2022 if we don’t compete in all 67 counties, rural and urban.
#
They called it.
Last night, Democrat Terry McAuliffe was defeated by Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin in the election for Virginia governor.
And just scrolling through the news headlines on Twitter this morning, **it looks like McAullife lost by some *big* margins in Virginia’s most rural counties.**
I’ll just say to you what I’ve always said. It’s never going to be urban OR rural. It’s gotta be urban AND rural.
In other words, I feel like the results in VA make it clear. Democrats won’t win in PA in 2022 if we don’t compete in all 67 counties, urban and rural.
Peter, not only am I the *only* Democrat in this race for U.S. Senate who ran for statewide office before + won.
**I’m the *only* Democrat who ran for statewide office before + won with support in all 67 PA counties — urban, rural, and everywhere in between.**
When Governor Tom Wolf and I ran in 2018, we traveled PA and talked to voters in every county, regardless of how red or blue. We swung more than 900,000 votes compared to 2016, and we did it by chipping away at Republican margins in rural counties.
So I gotta ask:
**[Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign and help prevent another election outcome like last night's? If our Democratic campaign to flip Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat ever needed support from you in Cresco, it’s now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36368?refcode=em20211103-3319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3319%2E434096%2EurUpoR)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36368?refcode=em20211103-3319&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3319%2E434096%2EurUpoR)**
Every county, every vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
Thanks for hearing me out,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211103-3319-footer&t=21&refcode2=3319_434096_urUpoR&akid=3319%2E434096%2EurUpoR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Chairman Michael Whatley
subject: 3 things we learned in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
Hint: We’ve got momentum, Peter...

| Peter, Last night’s Republican victory in the Battleground State of Virginia -- and the looming prospect of victory in the deep “blue” state of New Jersey -- is righly sending shockwaves across the political landscape. Here are three key lessons that I believe we need to take from this moment:
1. **Parents are fed up with the Left.** A year of at-home learning gave working parents a clear view of the woke socialism that the Left is feeding their children, and they’ve had enough of it. It’s up to Republicans to fix our schools and save our children.
2. **Inflation is real, and it’s hurting families.** Since Joe Biden took office, he cut American energy production and exploded our budget deficits, leading to massive inflation that’s hurting every American family.
3. **America First Republicans have momentum on our side.** The Democrats promised voters competent moderation, but they delivered incompetent socialism. The American people have had enough, and they’re voting Republican in record numbers.

_We’ve got the wind in our sails, Peter, but we can’t afford to be complacent._ **[That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $10 or more to help build on this momentum and work towards victory in the Midterm Elections. clean_body: Hint: We’ve got momentum, Peter... | Peter, Last night’s Republican victory in the Battleground State of Virginia -- and the looming prospect of victory in the deep “blue” state of New Jersey -- is righly sending shockwaves across the political landscape. Here are three key lessons that I believe we need to take from this moment: 1. Parents are fed up with the Left. A year of at-home learning gave working parents a clear view of the woke socialism that the Left is feeding their children, and they’ve had enough of it. It’s up to Republicans to fix our schools and save our children. 2. Inflation is real, and it’s hurting families. Since Joe Biden took office, he cut American energy production and exploded our budget deficits, leading to massive inflation that’s hurting every American family. 3. America First Republicans have momentum on our side. The Democrats promised voters competent moderation, but they delivered incompetent socialism. The American people have had enough, and they’re voting Republican in record numbers. We’ve got the wind in our sails, Peter, but we can’t afford to be complacent. | | | | | Last night’s results in Virginia and New Jersey showed what’s possible if we work hard, stay focused, and put America First. If we keep pace with the Democrats’ fundraising machine and execute on our campaign plan, we can win North Carolina’s open US Senate seat and reclaim our House Majority. But we can’t do either without your help, Peter. Thank you for whatever you can do. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Extremist Republican Lori Saine just entered the race for Colorado’s 8th Congressional District, and we’re seriously concerned.

**[Help protect Colorado families from the GOP’s dangerous agenda. Rush $25 or whatever you can to elect a leader who will prioritize our community’s needs >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38263348/314662270/1424041718?refcode=em_YC_FR_SaineRR_110321_op_a_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWIxOWQ3Yy1jNzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCB_o7nKAHNNf8TNYHVO8YdFS23qc1xzu9f4dyOgwy4=)**

🚨 Introduced a bill to allow guns in schools and even brought a gun to the airport.
🚨 Said teachers should be armed at school.
🚨 Brought Popeyes chicken to the Colorado House floor in a “silent protest” of condemnation against her GOP colleague calling Black people racially inferior.

We could keep going, but you get the idea.

Lori Saine isn’t just nutty — she’s also dangerous for Coloradans. But it’s no surprise this is the kind of candidate the Republican party would put forward.

They have, after all, been pushing scientific misinformation and trying to take down the basic tenets of our Democracy for months.

clean_body: We can’t let this happen. | | Peter, Extremist Republican Lori Saine just entered the race for Colorado’s 8th Congressional District, and we’re seriously concerned. = Here’s just a small sampling of some of the horrific things Lori Saine has said and done: 🚨 Claimed Black and white people were historically lynched “in nearly equal numbers... for the crime of being Republican.” 🚨 Introduced a bill to allow guns in schools and even brought a gun to the airport. 🚨 Said teachers should be armed at school. 🚨 Brought Popeyes chicken to the Colorado House floor in a “silent protest” of condemnation against her GOP colleague calling Black people racially inferior. We could keep going, but you get the idea. Lori Saine isn’t just nutty — she’s also dangerous for Coloradans. But it’s no surprise this is the kind of candidate the Republican party would put forward. They have, after all, been pushing scientific misinformation and trying to take down the basic tenets of our Democracy for months. Our district needs a leader who will prioritize racial justice, voting rights, health care access, and good-paying jobs — not guns in schools and racial stereotypes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: This is bad. Really bad....

body:
|
| | | Fellow Conservative, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r "Generic
Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Fellow Conservative.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the
link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685170:JLjedz2Nl:m:1:3299561967:2DA27D854BA0A0228DCADE96C62EF69C:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

| | Folks After an amazing effort and a hard fight, Terry McAuliffe has lost the Virginia governor’s race. **I’ll be honest: This has to be a wake up call for Democrats, and a reminder that Trump still has strongholds in battleground states across the country.** In October alone, **the Republican Governors Association contributed _over $4.6 million dollars_ to elect Terry’s opponent Glenn Youngkin.** Now that Republicans have won Virginia, they’re moving on to do whatever it takes to win the remaining purple states -- including Nevada. _And without a doubt, flipping these battleground states could ensure that they hand Donald Trump a decisive victory in 2024._ **It’s crucial that we put in the work to out-organize and out-mobilize the national Republicans who are already spending _millions_ of dollars to flip Nevada red.** The only way we're going to defend this vulnerable seat from the same fate as Virginia is if supporters like you chip in. **[That’s why I’m urgently asking you to make a contribution to my campaign. clean_body: | | | | | Folks After an amazing effort and a hard fight, Terry McAuliffe has lost the Virginia governor’s race. I’ll be honest: This has to be a wake up call for Democrats, and a reminder that Trump still has strongholds in battleground states across the country. In October alone, the Republican Governors Association contributed over $4.6 million dollars to elect Terry’s opponent Glenn Youngkin. Now that Republicans have won Virginia, they’re moving on to do whatever it takes to win the remaining purple states -- including Nevada. And without a doubt, flipping these battleground states could ensure that they hand Donald Trump a decisive victory in 2024. It’s crucial that we put in the work to out-organize and out-mobilize the national Republicans who are already spending millions of dollars to flip Nevada red. The only way we're going to defend this vulnerable seat from the same fate as Virginia is if supporters like you chip in. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for fighting with me, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. The Daily Wire is one of America’s fastest growing conservative media companies. We bring you investigative news, groundbreaking entertainment, and your favorite conservative firebrands like Candace Owens, Andrew Klavan, Michael Knowles, Matt Walsh, and yours truly.
