America's Soul is Strong

You would have to live under a rock not to know that conservatives won our nation's first "battle for the soul" yesterday. Not only did Republican Glenn Youngkin resoundingly defeat the Clinton-backed Terry McAuliffe, but conservatives also won ALL the constitutional offices in Virginia and even flipped the House of Delegates!

Conservatives are fed up with the lecturing, condescension, and moral outrage coming from the woke-left. With conservatives performing so well across the country yesterday, the mainstream media, in coordination with the big-tech overlords, will ramp up their efforts to suppress conservative thought and cancel members who don't fall in line.

We created [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjus8i3bnebpht023lmo1tfjq4itknq7b2cmtm5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjimeo34c9h2bs) as a cancel-proof home for conservatives. At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7oltef4sdgj7vjhahuhtc1jlmp65gbhvh2vlifo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjimeo34c9h2bs) you are free to share your opinion without fear of being shouted down by liberal trolls, or worse yet, canceled by a hyper-sensitive leftist who offends easily.

If conservatives learned anything from the election results, it is that we must work together to save our country. So join [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbdblug828cpvkret9vounvat8rj7d90ab2pis1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjimeo34c9h2bs) today - we are freedom's neighborhood.

Not only did Republican Glenn Youngkin resoundingly defeat the Clinton-backed Terry McAuliffe, but conservatives also won ALL the constitutional offices in Virginia and even flipped the House of Delegates! Conservatives are fed up with the lecturing, condescension, and moral outrage coming from the woke-left. With conservatives performing so well across the country yesterday, the mainstream media, in coordination with the big-tech overlords, will ramp up their efforts to suppress conservative thought and cancel members who don't fall in line. We created as a cancel-proof home for conservatives. At you are free to share your opinion without fear of being shouted down by liberal trolls, or worse yet, canceled by a hyper-sensitive leftist who offends easily. If conservatives learned anything from the election results, it is that we must work together to save our country. So join today - we are freedom's neighborhood. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kelly Schulz
subject: They said it couldn't be done

Dear Friend,
They told you a Republican couldn't win in Virginia... and they were wrong.
Glenn Youngkin showed the world that voters want a commonsense conservative as their governor.
And next year, we are going to show the world that once again, Marylanders want a Republican as the chief executive of our state.
[_**But we need your help!**_](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExiFdeYj-2BFXQjSoCfUAGmOid-2BS2Pt2Tnh-2F2-2BfY1arTV2o61-i_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz64anwyZZrM7E8LG0586Q6jekdXmlKczwEQSZ9pa-2F6AblD3be-2FKwf0OfIx8R3kf94YieBDwto52VE8oS-2F05tTPDJ2llIAOv-2FJdR-2FU3yITx3Xu1U8NmEV4UNN6vgoqgfBGJA8R-2BfjHaAHp00UlOGHjkOTXMjdVQrO3ak44j-2F3QKIat5gbA7LeCq2pLoiVx9lAJYqjUgRXs2aSB1Rpt8oVeSiXiGFlcMjc0JTdBlBq4Z8mKIc3QpRE3zy7O7fNY0DALJ3wYV-2BlcBvjORu2lgkPnRD1x70KKtCh6zIYKWDxixXRXPDodkcCPOzgPiACyv6GsJoaBfq1i9NrHSgPOJ6v5Wy9Fhs-2F8vViIo3Z0KGsHJs8o9lbhkSldOWnCEBUeJT5iCLGiXi5HOAiH5CU7ZIkEJSoXDJ378UzIRgvFzzS0pkxLiMhv9TaGyjHOualAuOR6m6qme5q-2FSJw2WmWAzoQwyx7kBZVRamwPQlW8kljkiG521KqIfEIYbwdcKmSk0OnP5K52UXyDFNlibaT1nD35OGMlhyAwSZa1ktbtdy4nG14xQFH-2Bs34ZCPC4JCwIOiZzZjGL-2BctqD7gS827XQUia54e1UlPOJbt6fne857bomEwmx13-2F8apoIQqNsOrjp-2BcuaMHkgmGQ-2B9-2FehmGPQAKgCHxskPr1TfWCogSCoeMMSaBoaYFWo-2F2rZbGxiMERnQhP9G-2B9-2B3qVWRrAu1-2B4DnBm0vkf0Q17Q-2B-2F8QROebSoXXHIqshTpjA2-2Blv2Pc9NREPGRAk4d-2BpCuPB2hMRyy-2F0oArjdNiDnVtIY-2BHphitkrP6Eryi1A1UwjcRAULeJz9CDzFB)

One thing is crystal clear -- Marylanders don't want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases.
Marylanders want to continue to build on the successes of the past seven years and to focus on the issues that matter most, like cutting taxes, growing the economy, and expanding opportunities so every Marylander can find their own path to prosperity.
[_**Join the team today!**_](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExiFdeYj-2BFXQjSoCfUAGmOid-2BS2Pt2Tnh-2F2-2BfY1arTV2oQGOQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz64anwyZZrM7E8LG0586Q6jekdXmlKczwEQSZ9pa-2F6AblD3be-2FKwf0OfIx8R3kf94YieBDwto52VE8oS-2F05tTPDJ2llIAOv-2FJdR-2FU3yITx3Xu1U8NmEV4UNN6vgoqgfBGJA8R-2BfjHaAHp00UlOGHjkOTXMjdVQrO3ak44j-2F3QKIat5gbA7LeCq2pLoiVx9lAJYqjUgRXs2aSB1Rpt8oVeSiXiGFlcMjc0JTdBlBq4Z8mKIc3QpRE3zy7O7fNY0DALJ3wYV-2BlcBvjORu2lgkPnRD1x70KKtCh6zIYKWDxixXRXPDodkcCPOzgPiACyv6GsJoaBfq1i9NrHSgPOJ6v5Wy9Fhs-2F8vViIo3Z0KGsHJs8o9lbhkSldOWnCEBUeJT5iCLGiXi5HOAiH5CU7ZIkEJSoXDJ378UzIRgvFzzS0pkxLiMhv9TaGyjHOualAuOR6m6qme5q-2FSJw2WmWAzoQwyx7kBZVRamwPQlW8kljkiG521KqIfEIYbwdcKmSk0OnP5K52UXyDFNlibaT1nD35OGMlhyAwSZa1ktbtdy4nG14xQFH-2Bs34ZCPC4JCwIOiZzZjGL-2BctqD7gS827XQUia54e1UlPOJbt6fne857bomEwmx13-2F8apoIQqNsOrjp-2BcuaMHkgmGQ-2B9-2FehmGPQAKgCHxskPr1TfWCogSCoeMMSaBoY4F7JzmxNNLi2wY8l8cUkxkueGx7IWjQYwYNtw3OzMvWeyWuw2EFZfuM6LjaHyRQd-2BvwmqsIdndcmHXpQAhVTl-2FpWlX32JLboawCLz87LPSW3kl5ywjKSnooDWW5rJDXTng1EyBZ6xvI0QruOjpO5)
Marylanders want our children to receive a world-class education. Teachers and parents agree we need to hold school systems accountable and make sure all available resources go directly to the classroom – and that our children are there too. And we want to empower parents to choose the best possible schools for their children.
Marylanders want to feel safe in their communities. Your next governor should be one that stands with families, and I will make it my mission to fight for the safety of your communities and to defend the men and women in blue who are sworn to protect you.
[**The issues are on our side but we need your help!****Will you please consider a contribution of $25, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 to help us make history next year?**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExiFdeYj-2BFXQjSoCfUAGmOid-2BS2Pt2Tnh-2F2-2BfY1arTV2osCr2_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz64anwyZZrM7E8LG0586Q6jekdXmlKczwEQSZ9pa-2F6AblD3be-2FKwf0OfIx8R3kf94YieBDwto52VE8oS-2F05tTPDJ2llIAOv-2FJdR-2FU3yITx3Xu1U8NmEV4UNN6vgoqgfBGJA8R-2BfjHaAHp00UlOGHjkOTXMjdVQrO3ak44j-2F3QKIat5gbA7LeCq2pLoiVx9lAJYqjUgRXs2aSB1Rpt8oVeSiXiGFlcMjc0JTdBlBq4Z8mKIc3QpRE3zy7O7fNY0DALJ3wYV-2BlcBvjORu2lgkPnRD1x70KKtCh6zIYKWDxixXRXPDodkcCPOzgPiACyv6GsJoaBfq1i9NrHSgPOJ6v5Wy9Fhs-2F8vViIo3Z0KGsHJs8o9lbhkSldOWnCEBUeJT5iCLGiXi5HOAiH5CU7ZIkEJSoXDJ378UzIRgvFzzS0pkxLiMhv9TaGyjHOualAuOR6m6qme5q-2FSJw2WmWAzoQwyx7kBZVRamwPQlW8kljkiG521KqIfEIYbwdcKmSk0OnP5K52UXyDFNlibaT1nD35OGMlhyAwSZa1ktbtdy4nG14xQFH-2Bs34ZCPC4JCwIOiZzZjGL-2BctqD7gS827XQUia54e1UlPOJbt6fne857bomEwmx13-2F8apoIQqNsOrjp-2BcuaMHkgmGQ-2B9-2FehmGPQAKgCHxskPr1TfWCogSCoeMMSaBqQPWUbDYKTVM-2B-2FbM6Div5KWw8YbO2dVHQ-2BoYWirEsdyj-2Bjfapo1yN-2BMkbx3I8jbcda8TDRhkPLxHhSn4Je3BPTyX6twkvzvY2l4KFc3JTxAuLoqfoDWMBd3nV7flshfFEkenVb-2FvI6QvOjC1-2F6JZ5-2B)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, They told you a Republican couldn't win in Virginia... and they were wrong. Glenn Youngkin showed the world that voters want a commonsense conservative as their governor. And next year, we are going to show the world that once again, Marylanders want a Republican as the chief executive of our state. The latest shows we have the momentum to make history next year. One thing is crystal clear -- Marylanders don't want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases. Marylanders want to continue to build on the successes of the past seven years and to focus on the issues that matter most, like cutting taxes, growing the economy, and expanding opportunities so every Marylander can find their own path to prosperity. Marylanders want our children to receive a world-class education. Teachers and parents agree we need to hold school systems accountable and make sure all available resources go directly to the classroom – and that our children are there too. And we want to empower parents to choose the best possible schools for their children. Marylanders want to feel safe in their communities. Your next governor should be one that stands with families, and I will make it my mission to fight for the safety of your communities and to defend the men and women in blue who are sworn to protect you. Thank you, Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
Last night in Virginia, Trump-endorsed, Big Lie-supporting, anti-voting rights candidate Glenn Youngkin defeated Democrat Terry McAuliffe to become the state's next governor [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38264263/314666382/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZTI3NDkzLWM5M2MtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QzD1tqmuoASy0jdMQAZiXrPaSjogxHAZq0sXB5wyEoQ=&emci=be0bb151-c33c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=aae27493-c93c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Team,

Last night in Virginia, Trump-endorsed, Big Lie-supporting, anti-voting rights candidate Glenn Youngkin defeated Democrat Terry McAuliffe to become the state's next governor.

This wasn't the outcome that we had hoped for and that many of us worked so hard for. The results of this election show that we have a tougher fight ahead to rid our country of Trumpism than anyone thought and we won't lie -- we're worried.

Trumpism is alive and well in Virginia and across the country. With just over one year until the midterm elections, we need to keep our foot on the gas if we're going to defeat the Treason Caucus and end Trumpism once and for all.

While last night's results were disappointing, we can't and we won't give up -- the future of our democracy depends on what we do right now.

subject: Catch THIS wave 🌊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
| |

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ebe1ecd071f7404eb071804cbcbdcce3&_e=xnCxniKl7wyE5Aj37n5YipDhEkyUSrpaVPDO2H7FhSLyyy6cDA1h-R8wN-6Rus6pK3KUGddUEqVlyk41NuzSavIOEpOMVI5i7UDhbqKSim6VMG3xaYy_c07gzJxnKPJ4wgoBsi-FDeKUAIgdplnnyt6TSUIEy3uTijbV6ptr6gzVxRjYxjj-aGvEXtM9m5ORJ3QzuSh-eLOjl10HSXgMo7kQ_QX8oIGSmfBjB4arvHzN_ls08v63R9hKVa2yOTCZsyUvkdPcuwR-iN269AtKQO1ebbc2dISBac7fCT0SnI8%3D)

Dear Friend,
Did you hear the good news?

**Republican candidate Glen Youngkin just won his race for governor in blue Virginia. **

To celebrate his monumental win against the Biden-backed Democrat Terry McAuliffe, we’re launching a brand new product that we think you’ll want to wear...
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ebe1ecd071f7404eb071804cbcbdcce3&_e=xnCxniKl7wyE5Aj37n5YipDhEkyUSrpaVPDO2H7FhSLyyy6cDA1h-R8wN-6Rus6pK3KUGddUEqVlyk41NuzSanv6pM-G3xZFwkL2Y38-_1t8wY-3SOirEpoRQtyk9GJsbPQ7-HGtZkoV2E7tDc9Pllw2ewrgB2WaM_L4ZJsr7-FzD7w3v0uYCXaPL783CCr_9AwxuFd9NC32wndMR0oVcUTcGk61Woi0mO_MjX6AAs83sHo4M33NVqVEtoDgiC_pAk2PgBLyutdOX0YD_QsGTIMg4La-WK2leAWQlfy1oI4%3D)
**This is BIG news. **

Virginia has long been considered a safe Democrat state. This huge win is an indicator of the nation’s mood and what direction American voters are heading in. That direction? Distinctively [**RED**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ebe1ecd071f7404eb071804cbcbdcce3&_e=xnCxniKl7wyE5Aj37n5YipDhEkyUSrpaVPDO2H7FhSLyyy6cDA1h-R8wN-6Rus6pK3KUGddUEqVlyk41NuzSaky4bpZng08IK5kn4KCxqnqMnAFJRNS19Zmz9gBerQJwOwH-ddPqP5HmagUCRkoz7AOMC_GL3NRIjTkhEw4FDDfnaIpHedFwq-4ugKeICJky85UA2a9rGTpmQ41NLKjwiO7hn_UK-WTZdoETpjY8b0yvH4jkv8nSL1xt2yHcbdkbNubLwu5fneUSroFV5j_ETePqJopUlvSw5DF7W9SJxXQ%3D).

**Americans are saying NO to: **

body:
While we may have won this battle, our fight continues. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38264822/314669243/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY0YTVhMS1jZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wce0OQJx07yHhHwaRg1umKTZZqA_HFR6psgd7B6RhWw=)
Finally, friend.

After the heavy rains from the storm last week, the Dixie Fire is fully contained. All in all, it burned 963,309 acres -- more than 1,505 square miles. It was the second largest wildfire in California's history.

Containing the fire was a monumental task, and I want to make sure to start by recognizing all the firefighters and other first responders who were involved, not to mention families who lost their homes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38264823/314669244/-209993060?refcode=em-11321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY0YTVhMS1jZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wce0OQJx07yHhHwaRg1umKTZZqA_HFR6psgd7B6RhWw=)
Photo credit: Cal Fire
**While we may have won this battle, our fight continues.**

A study released Monday demonstrates that climate change is mostly responsible for the conditions leading to increasingly destructive wildfires. We must work quickly to solve this problem. We need to elect leaders who 1) take this threat seriously and 2) will get to work.

It's clear that my opponent Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling. In fact, he'd rather spend his time questioning the 2020 election or whether we have evidence of the Moon landing.

**With my experience on issues like water management and wildfires, I'm ready to put in the work for CA-01, but I'll need your support to get to Washington so I can make a difference. That's why I'm asking:**

**[Will you chip in $3 to elect someone who takes climate change seriously and will work to solve it? It's worth taking a moment to pause and think about what the planet might look like if we _don't_ solve this problem. I'm sorry to put those dark thoughts in your head, but our children, and grandchildren are depending on us.

The stakes are so high, and we can't wait any longer.

body:
It's the same story: raise money, avoid the tough questions, then buy TV ads a few weeks before Election Day and hope for the best. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38264876/314669519/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjRkZTlmMy1jZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yw7FjQmw4xDY0kERg-vyJ_61pixWceD4dlkAXsBqsz4=)
Friend,

Since launching this campaign to unseat Madison Cawthorn, I've gotten a ton of advice from "experts" and operatives who always seem to know what's best.

It's the same story: raise money, avoid the tough questions, then buy TV ads a few weeks before Election Day and hope for the best.

**This should go without saying, but that's not how I'm running things.**

We're meeting voters where they're at and engaging on the issues that matter -- affordable housing, education, jobs, and health care. I'll never shy away from tough conversations, and I won't write off anyone or their community because they're “too conservative” or “too disillusioned”.

That's the difference between guys like Madison Cawthorn and me. For him, winning means dividing our community and riling up the extreme-right wing of his party. **For us, winning means uniting our community so we can get back to work Western North Carolina families.**

**[We need to bring in another $7,109 before the week closes to hire field staff and mobilize enough voters to unseat Madison Cawthorn. clean_body: It's the same story: raise money, avoid the tough questions, then buy TV ads a few weeks before Election Day and hope for the best. | = Friend, Since launching this campaign to unseat Madison Cawthorn, I've gotten a ton of advice from "experts" and operatives who always seem to know what's best. It's the same story: raise money, avoid the tough questions, then buy TV ads a few weeks before Election Day and hope for the best. This should go without saying, but that's not how I'm running things. We're meeting voters where they're at and engaging on the issues that matter -- affordable housing, education, jobs, and health care. I'll never shy away from tough conversations, and I won't write off anyone or their community because they're “too conservative” or “too disillusioned”. That's the difference between guys like Madison Cawthorn and me. For him, winning means dividing our community and riling up the extreme-right wing of his party. For us, winning means uniting our community so we can get back to work Western North Carolina families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Yours, Pastor Gash = | = Eric Gash is a teacher, pastor, former professional football player, and high school football coach running against Madison Cawthorn. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Censored
body:
If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjq26juu8vvogua8670q0qvlsj4gc3q2lmthorn8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj8c9gmoqj0s9ksir61ctm6tj71p3mm4qbcdpmeiq64opksmo74dlh6ppm1cb0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj35c5lm5jr4cb66jgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6clie6oj1chh649fg)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh7ovjddm2ak6u8errnu6s1tld8n1jr81plqnefg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob4c9h2bs) | |
---
Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu5m1p2ecv0pevmggn1ecqhnh6nk2gddmj9ptsj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob4c9h2bs)
Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibg9hqo0a25qdjovfnhj95qgscep5u4rh9g55p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob4c9h2bs)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv0ih78vicg1uovg2cfpuqju5ajnbhea8c1uft8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob4c9h2bs)
[**Subscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zol396f0hgfq5k9jkph8sog7inmn5bu13vkj5n6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob4c9h2bs)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6n5klg76899stdq1m6ankre0sbfb5cdp4l1c8i0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zprrvcsfcatjr07eaqao9s0mt81tl7fok9qtkiu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze09ibua7bdtc3ptks234k4rftq9709m80923bkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrt7nsf8td0lqiimkdig3og3gup7cimlt3vvibuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zah9pmuvjva81qp0f7fp2m5ap7tr52bqdeojr7f8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdjokfv1lup93u41hok15bl8q6kdt5bubpfglnno_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjhm4ob6cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Izzi Levy
subject: About last night…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1328%2E3611125%2EMeyKbl ][IMG]

Folks --

Last night Democrat Terry McAuliffe lost to the Trump-endorsed Republican
candidate, Glenn Youngkin, in a hard-fought race for Governor of
Virginia.

Virginia’s Governor’s race was widely seen as setting the stage for the
2022 midterm elections and the bad news is, far-right extremism and
Trumpism won.

But there is some good news: This was by no means a landslide; it was a
close race. And we don’t have to let extremism win here in Ohio.

We still have time to deliver a win for Ohio workers and elect someone who
will go to the mat for them every single day.

If we want to stop Donald Trump and far-right extremism from winning in
Ohio next year, we have to elect Tim and send him to the Senate. But he’s
up against Trump wannabes and GOP mega-donors with deep pockets.

Now that we’ve closed the books on Election Day 2021 -- it’s time to turn
our focus to 2022’s most important Senate race. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5783?t=1007&akid=1328%2E3611125%2EMeyKbl ]Can you chip in to flip
this open seat blue and expand our Democratic majority?

name: Jason Miyares
subject: We did it. Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia
body:
Thanks to supporters like you, we did it. The pollsters, pundits, and the media
all said we couldn’t win this race, but our grassroots movement said

Friend,

Thanks to supporters like you, we did it. The pollsters, pundits, and the
media all said we couldn’t win this race, but our grassroots movement said
otherwise.

Fifty-six years ago, my mother fled Cuba - with nothing but a dream - a dream
for a better life for her family.

Now I stand here - elected to be the Attorney General of the Commonwealth of
Virginia - the first-ever son of an immigrant and the first Latino ever to be
elected statewide in the Commonwealth's history.

I'm humbled and honored - this election is proof that the American Dream is
alive and well. Thank you, Mom.

And thank you, Virginia, for giving me the opportunity to make history. On day
one, we'll work toward a safe and secure Virginia, and ending the criminal
first, victim last mindset.

Virginians took a stand for the rule of law and the safety of their families
in this election. This is a new day for the Commonwealth of Virginia, and a
sign of things to come in this country.

And as your Attorney General, I vow to fight for law and order and keep our
communities safe.

Thank you again for your unwavering support throughout this campaign, friend.
We could not have done it without you.

Thanks,

Jason Miyares

Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia

Miyares for Virginia 1112 Laskin Rd, Ste A Virginia Beach, VA 23451

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friends — While last night was not everything that Democrats had hoped for, it should serve as a wake-up call for next year’s midterm elections. Virginia is a prime example of why we can’t get complacent heading into 2022. Yesterday’s results have already had an impact in some of the closest Senate races that we can’t afford to lose. Just take a look for yourself: [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266247/314675804/-2061030016?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20211103_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg5ZGZmNS1kMzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9B5s1R6ILh-JnulCaS1iMpSOCnWFz2EeJjw-OWNdBs=) Our Senate races in Arizona, Georgia and Nevada have all been moved to “toss-ups” and the race in Colorado has even shifted down to “likely Democratic”. This is tough news for these races and our slim Senate majority. We have to rally around these 4 candidates and make sure they have the resources to turn things around. **We can’t afford to lose a single seat next year, which is why we have to ask:** [_**If you are able, will you chip in $4 or more to support candidates like these and help power our grassroots effort to Defend the Senate? clean_body: | = Friends — While last night was not everything that Democrats had hoped for, it should serve as a wake-up call for next year’s midterm elections. Just take a look for yourself: = Our Senate races in Arizona, Georgia and Nevada have all been moved to “toss-ups” and the race in Colorado has even shifted down to “likely Democratic”. This is tough news for these races and our slim Senate majority. We have to rally around these 4 candidates and make sure they have the resources to turn things around. If we are going to continue to defeat these QAnon conspiracy theorists, anti-science and anti-safety radicals, and the white supremacists afraid of truthful history, we need your help starting right now.
There is no time to waste in encouraging educator to run, supporting their campaigns, and educating voters on what is at stake.
Join the fight today — there's too much at stake to sit this out.
With you in the fight,
the Elect Educators Everywhere school boards team

| Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

name: Team NH GOP
subject: Republicans sweep in Virginia - next year, New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Republicans picked up huge wins in New Hampshire and across the country
**Derek,**
****
### **Yesterday, Republicans dealt a massive blow to the radical, woke, left-wing agenda, by sweeping to decisive victories in Virginia. Voters sent a clear message by electing Republicans to the offices of Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. **
****
### ****
****
### **But the good news didn't stop there. Here in New Hampshire Republicans secured major wins across the state. In Rochester, Paul Callaghan recaptured the Mayor's office with a staggering 66% of the vote, marking the first time a Republican has won the office since 2003. **
****
### **This is just the beginning.**
****

****
### **_"What happens in Virginia will in large part determine what happens in 2022, 2024, and on."_**
****
### **_-Kamala Harris_**
****

****
### **We need your help to build on this momentum. 2022 is poised to be one of the biggest Republican victories in the history of our state, but it will not be possible without your support. **
****
### **The unfortunate truth is that elections are more expensive now than ever before. **
****
### **[If you are able to, please make a contribution today. Help us send Maggie Hassan, Chris Pappas, Annie Kuster, and Democrats across the state to an early retirement in 2022!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/1/0100017ce63f09c7-e2a08848-6762-47da-9c2c-0f852421b5b7-000000/_-SuIYG-i8-8JDH1ScU0wWbtLb4=242)**

name: Tedra Cobb
subject: well, last night wasn’t great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We have our work cut out for us. Watching the results of last night’s election in Virginia, it was hard not to feel angry, and a little sick.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266588/314677202/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTliOWU1Mi1kNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qZb17FQHdn2Ts27eBLYaPzAvptup7dIziZO-z9Wpac=)
---
| Peter,

Watching the results of last night’s election in Virginia, it was hard not to feel angry, and a little sick — especially if you were scrolling through Twitter like I was. The results show that the Republican party is back with a vengeance and Democrats are in huge trouble in 2022 and beyond.

When I started BACKROADS PAC, some folks were skeptical that focusing on rural voters was a worthwhile endeavor. But last night showed how essential our mission is.

In parts of rural Virginia, Glenn Youngkin did ten points better than the Republican running in 2017. But I’m not shocked — we saw the results of the elections in Virginia and New Jersey coming based on our own internal polling in the most rural reaches across the country.

Democrats continue to fall further behind, after 40 years of failing to invest in rural districts. It is absolutely essential that we start moving the margins in these communities — and that’s exactly what BACKROADS is trying to do.

[_**This is an-all-hands-on-deck moment. It’s going to take a massive reinvestment in candidates, messaging, and voter contact. It’s not going to change overnight, but Democrats are doomed if we don’t try.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266589/314677203/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTliOWU1Mi1kNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qZb17FQHdn2Ts27eBLYaPzAvptup7dIziZO-z9Wpac=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266590/314677204/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTliOWU1Mi1kNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qZb17FQHdn2Ts27eBLYaPzAvptup7dIziZO-z9Wpac=)
---
I know you’re upset not just by the results of last night — but also by the inaction we see in Washington. It’s hard to feel motivated. But we are going to feel a heck of a lot worse next Election Day if Republicans take back Congress and we didn’t do everything we can to stop them.

[_**Days like today are especially tough, but if you are motivated to stop Republicans and support Democrats in rural districts, I hope you’ll consider contributing to BACKROADS today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266591/314677205/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTliOWU1Mi1kNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qZb17FQHdn2Ts27eBLYaPzAvptup7dIziZO-z9Wpac=)

And, if you aren’t feeling motivated today, I get that too. Put down your phone, turn off the news, and take care of yourself. We’ll be here, taking the backroads and doing everything we can to spread our message in rural communities. [_**When you’re ready, I hope you’ll join us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38266592/314677206/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTliOWU1Mi1kNjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qZb17FQHdn2Ts27eBLYaPzAvptup7dIziZO-z9Wpac=)

Keep the faith,

Tedra

body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r)
Peter:

**I'm suing Nancy Pelosi, and I need your help to fight back**.

It wasn't enough that Nancy Pelosi tried to expel me from Congress or kick me off my committees.

Now Pelosi's trying to crush me with tens of thousands of dollars in unconstitutional fines because I refuse to bow down and obey her mask mandate in the Capitol.

**[Can I count on your financial support to help me sue Nancy Pelosi](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r)**? [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r) Nancy Pelosi slapped a target on my back and declared me public enemy number one because she fears the strength of the America First movement.

After the results last night in Virginia, socialist Democrats should be scared.

_America First patriots rose up and rejected illegal and unethical vaccine mandates that public health tyrants want to force on our children_...

... Tyrants like Dr. Fauci exploiting the China virus to rule every aspect of our lives...

... Joe Biden's open borders policies allow mobs of illegal aliens to invade our country...

...And Racist Critical Race Theory and woke indoctrination poisoning student's minds by twisting children into hating their classmates because of the color of their skin.

**[So please help me sue Nancy Pelosi and stop this madness by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r)**. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r) Nancy Pelosi thinks if she can take me down, she can silence your voice.

That's why Pelosi and the Jihad Squad were hell-bent on canceling me out of Congress.

But I refuse to bend the knee before Pelosi's dictatorial mask mandate.

**And now I'm suing Nancy Pelosi to fight back**.

I need your support right away.

If America First conservatives don't draw a line in the sand and push back against Pelosi's socialist cancel culture, China virus vaccine and mask mandates will spread across the country.

**[That's why I'm asking for you to chip in a contribution and help me sue Nancy Pelosi](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59085131:sS6A9AHrN:m:1:2365227053:8210465648F231A93F7C218D10E94DC5:r)**.

I'll keep you updated.
[_**HELP ME SUE PELOSI

* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan=20Hess?=
subject: FWD from Allison Russo: "Thank you, friend."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Russo for Congress
body:
To every volunteer who knocked on a door, every grassroots donor who chipped in a few bucks, and every person who supported me — thank you. | | | |
---
| | | Hi ,

I just wanted to make sure that you saw Allison's note from last night, and to echo her heartfelt thanks to you for your hard work throughout this campaign. What we have built will carry us on to 2022 and beyond. Onwards and upwards!

In solidarity,

Morgan Hess, Senior Advisor
---
|
---
| Friend,

A little while ago, I called my opponent to offer my support and congratulate him on a hard-fought race.

When I first started this campaign, I always knew it’d be tough. In 2020, Republicans won Ohio’s 15th Congressional District by 27%.

But I thought back to when I first ran for the Statehouse and how much of an uphill battle it was to win that campaign in a district that was also on difficult terrain.

In that race, I ran on a simple premise: get things done for my constituents and never compromise my beliefs.

I kept my promises to voters at the Statehouse, reaching across the aisle to find common ground and also championing the values that we all hold so dear.

It was that same core premise that was at the heart of this campaign for Congress.

We traveled all over the district, talking to folks about the issues important to them. Farmers, students, small business owners, and workers: who despite their diverse backgrounds are all united by their desire for a better future for Ohio.

And almost to a person, they agreed on two things: a sense of frustration over the dysfunction gripping our politics, and the hope that we can build opportunity.

It is my belief that to build that opportunity, we have to put working families at the center of everything we do.

My mom didn’t have the easiest time as a young mom, but job training, a union job, and education helped lead her and my whole family onto the path for a middle-class life — that same middle-class life that we must fight like hell to protect here in Ohio.

To every volunteer who knocked on a door, every grassroots donor who chipped in a few bucks, and every person who supported me — thank you.

So while tonight’s results are not what we hoped for, I am deeply proud of the campaign we ran.

And this fight is just beginning.** ** You deserve more leaders in Congress who will take on the tough fights and deliver for Ohio working families.

We must continue to advocate for workers’ rights, push for affordable healthcare, fight to protect the right to vote, and root out the corruption that is robbing Ohio families of their hard-earned dollars.

There is too much at stake in Washington for us to sit idly on the sidelines. I was built for tough fights, and I’m looking forward to the next one in 2022.

Thank you all.

_Allison_
---

name: Team Engel
subject: About last night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
What we learned from last night's election results.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38268424/314685426/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA2MjhiYi1kYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uGaSnn0peTZUcp1_DXBKQ-79lky6PwvFNuAM22TFsdQ=&emci=9848b7ca-633b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ba0628bb-dc3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,

**There were some big wins in Southern Arizona last night. **Democrats won every Tucson City Council race, the Tucson minimum wage increase passed by a 2-1 margin, and nearly all local school bonds and overrides passed. But let's be honest, the results in Virginia were disappointing. Terry McCauliffe's loss is a clear demonstration of just how difficult next year's midterm election will be for Democrats. **Republicans across the country are now claiming the momentum has shifted, and their chances for retaking Congress have never been better. **

Which is why districts like ours are so very important. I'll be blunt: **there is no way Democrats maintain our majority in Congress if we lose this seat next year. **This is why we need your support now more than ever.

**Our campaign's fundraising numbers are the clearest way to demonstrate we have broad support and the resources necessary to fight back the red wave pundits are now predicting. **

With just over a year to go, we have to ask: [**will you chip in today to make sure Kirsten has the resources she needs to keep this seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38268425/314685427/41694283?refcode=X_110321_ElectionRecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA2MjhiYi1kYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uGaSnn0peTZUcp1_DXBKQ-79lky6PwvFNuAM22TFsdQ=)

Buoyed by financial support from Republican donors and last night's big wins in Virginia, Gov. Ducey and his right hand man are running away with their party’s nomination for this seat. We can’t afford to lose any ground if we want to keep AZ-02 in Democratic hands.

clean_body: What we learned from last night's election results. Friend, There were some big wins in Southern Arizona last night. Democrats won every Tucson City Council race, the Tucson minimum wage increase passed by a 2-1 margin, and nearly all local school bonds and overrides passed. But let's be honest, the results in Virginia were disappointing. Terry McCauliffe's loss is a clear demonstration of just how difficult next year's midterm election will be for Democrats. Republicans across the country are now claiming the momentum has shifted, and their chances for retaking Congress have never been better. Which is why districts like ours are so very important. I'll be blunt: there is no way Democrats maintain our majority in Congress if we lose this seat next year. This is why we need your support now more than ever. Our campaign's fundraising numbers are the clearest way to demonstrate we have broad support and the resources necessary to fight back the red wave pundits are now predicting. With just over a year to go, we have to ask: = Buoyed by financial support from Republican donors and last night's big wins in Virginia, Gov. Ducey and his right hand man are running away with their party’s nomination for this seat. We can’t afford to lose any ground if we want to keep AZ-02 in Democratic hands. = = We know that Democrats can defy the odds and win big in next year’s midterm elections. We've seen it before and we can do it again. It starts with you making a contribution. We hope we can count on you. Thanks, Team Engel Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

| Dear Friends, Last week I released my latest campaign video outlining my legislative accomplishments in the Utah Legislature.
---
| [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=71eee9408f&e=10c1db3257 "My Successes - Becky Edwards For U.S. Senate")
---
| My experience listening to constituents and working with fellow lawmakers to legislate in a way that benefited the people I served makes me uniquely qualified to be your next senator.

Please share this video with your friends and family and help share our message to those looking for a candidate with the experience necessary to listen and find solutions to the issues facing Utahns.
---

---|---
|
---
|
# What's On My Mind
---
|
---
|
---
| As congress, and the internet, debate over whether or not family leave should be implemented on a national level, I believe we can approach the issue in a way that does not increase federal spending, does not place undue financial burden on small businesses, and allows mothers and all parents the time necessary to heal and bond. I believe we can review and amend our tax structure to better incentivize business owners to offer leave and support parents financially.
---
|
---
|
# **Signature Gathering**
---
|
---
|
---
| Our team is getting ready to gather signatures to guarantee my place on the Republican primary ballot, and I need your help! [Sign up to volunteer as a signature gatherer](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1b5242fef4&e=10c1db3257) and encourage your friends and family to sign up.
---
|
---
|
# Yard Signs
---
|
---
|
---
| If you have not requested a yard sign yet, now is the time! Placing a sign in your yard is one of the best ways to share your support ahead of signature gathering and the primary election.

Request a yard sign [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=edc0ddc083&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=af3670d3e3&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=cfcb29c7cc&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=6879404764&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is bad. Really bad.🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685361:63y73z2NJ:m:1:3253819041:35BD11C4EAAADD5CA74E182DA6289D73:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685361:63y73z2NJ:m:1:3253819041:35BD11C4EAAADD5CA74E182DA6289D73:r "Generic
Button")

# Friend**— As of today, in my capacity as Georgia's Agriculture Commissioner, I'm suing Joe Biden over his vaccine mandate. **

---
Biden’s unlawful mandate is a threat to our entire economy. Getting vaccinated is a personal choice between you and your doctor. No Georgia or American should be forced to choose between their livelihood and a jab. Period. [**If you agree, I hope you’ll SIGN your name here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2561f6bc0603c365/f278896dc32e0084c3d6b838967d376c/37793) **Doing so will send a clear message to Biden and Raphael Warnock that we aren’t going to stand for their mandates and overreach. ** I’m proud to stand in the gap to defend individual liberty and to halt regressive and un-American mandates. [**I hope you’ll stand with me.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2561f6bc0603c365/ad0564305e0d3e25c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Moving forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It was tough to watch the results of the Virginia gubernatorial election roll in last night. Losing a close race is always hard and I know so many folks worked so hard for a different outcome. It’s also a good reminder of the importance of the work we are doing now. Peter,

It was tough to watch the results of the Virginia gubernatorial election roll in last night. Losing a close race is always hard and I know so many folks worked so hard for a different outcome.

It’s also a good reminder of the importance of the work we are doing now.

In 2019, we shocked the country by winning a huge upset here in Kentucky. It was close. _I was elected governor by just 5,136 votes._ Last night is a clear indication that we have another tough fight ahead of us.

We won that race because we showed up, organized everywhere, and stayed focused on the issues that matter most to people’s lives. We knocked on doors in communities that hadn’t seen a Democratic campaign in years. We listened. Now we’re delivering what we promised: more good-paying jobs, better access to healthcare, investments in infrastructure. And we’ve restored decency and kindness to the governor’s office.

Kentucky's gubernatorial election will be the follow-up to the 2022 midterms and the precursor to the 2024 elections. It's only a matter of time before all eyes turn toward our Commonwealth, and we can't afford to take a day off between now and then.

If we learned anything from yesterday's election results, it's that making early investments and talking to voters about the issues, not just the opposition, is key. This re-election campaign needs to be about the people of Kentucky, and that means meeting Kentuckians where they are and prioritizing the issues most important to them. That's what will propel us to re-election in 2023.

**[I'm grateful to have you in this fight, and I'm fired up to keep this campaign moving forward. If you are too, will you make an early investment in my campaign today so we can protect the progress we're making for the people of the Commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38268736/314686883/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211103_postva_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211103_postva_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTQxODQ4YS1kZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAjInx12MnB9FxHszgP2IZxWqupZV8UqPMQhbdvFVi4=)**

Onward,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38268737/314686884/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211103_postva_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211103_postva_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTQxODQ4YS1kZTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAjInx12MnB9FxHszgP2IZxWqupZV8UqPMQhbdvFVi4=)

Now we’re delivering what we promised: more good-paying jobs, better access to healthcare, investments in infrastructure. And we’ve restored decency and kindness to the governor’s office. Kentucky's gubernatorial election will be the follow-up to the 2022 midterms and the precursor to the 2024 elections. It's only a matter of time before all eyes turn toward our Commonwealth, and we can't afford to take a day off between now and then. If we learned anything from yesterday's election results, it's that making early investments and talking to voters about the issues, not just the opposition, is key. This re-election campaign needs to be about the people of Kentucky, and that means meeting Kentuckians where they are and prioritizing the issues most important to them. That's what will propel us to re-election in 2023. = Onward, Andy | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign. = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

Friend, The Radical Left is trying to block parents from participating in their childrens’ education. The Biden Administration is using the Department of Justice to brand concerned parents at school board meetings as “domestic terrorists.” This is not only completely unacceptable, but it is also dangerous and exposes the contempt the Democrats have for all of us. **When it comes to education in our country, the answer is simple–your child, your voice.** Critical Race Theory has no place in our classrooms, and parents are rightfully concerned about this radical, racist, and un-American ideology. Parents across the Nation are being told to ‘shut up’ when they voice their valid concerns. Parents have the RIGHT to decide what is taught to their children in our schools. Parents also have the RIGHT to decide if their child has to wear a mask in school. **As shocking as it may sound, right here in Wyoming, a young woman was HANDCUFFED and ARRESTED for not complying with her school’s mask mandate.** ** ** Teachers Unions and School Administrators are out of control. clean_body: | | | | Your child, your voice. Friend, The Radical Left is trying to block parents from participating in their childrens’ education. The Biden Administration is using the Department of Justice to brand concerned parents at school board meetings as “domestic terrorists.” This is not only completely unacceptable, but it is also dangerous and exposes the contempt the Democrats have for all of us. When it comes to education in our country, the answer is simple–your child, your voice. Critical Race Theory has no place in our classrooms, and parents are rightfully concerned about this radical, racist, and un-American ideology. Parents across the Nation are being told to ‘shut up’ when they voice their valid concerns. Parents have the RIGHT to decide what is taught to their children in our schools. Parents also have the RIGHT to decide if their child has to wear a mask in school. As shocking as it may sound, right here in Wyoming, a young woman was HANDCUFFED and ARRESTED for not complying with her school’s mask mandate. Teachers Unions and School Administrators are out of control. It is time to give the power back to the parents! Together, we will restore the rights of parents here in Wyoming and all across the country. Our children will always be my top priority, and I will always fight for them and their future. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "Winsome Sears")**The next for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, Winsome Sears, is:**
* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave
for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can’t stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did
to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when Black people in America dare to think for themselves._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. The New Journey PAC was all in on Winsome Sears, but our work in Virginia was only the beginning - **[the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can't do anything if we don't have your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of
support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can’t do anything if we don’t have your support.")** Rep. Bryon Donalds, Rep. Tim Scott, and Joe Collins- these are just some of the Black Republicans we are supporting in 2022. We saw what the Democrats did to Winsome Sears - what do you think they will do to these patriots when they get desperate? [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "Black Republicans") We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of these races.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685699:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "The New
Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of
these races.")** **We can change the future of our nation by Making Black America Republican Again in 2022, but we need your help to make it a reality.** **[Please join us today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "Please join us today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685698:6wJTaz2NV:m:1:3298722022:A6E60E70EC10A628C5992D794703E0F4:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")

Peter -

Democrats want to award law-breaking illegals, more money than they give to our valiant and heroic Gold Star Families.

_This is shameful._

$450,000 per-person is the going rate for illegal, non-citizens to break the law. That’s more than victims of 9/11 received. That’s more than veterans receive. **$450,000 dollars is more than families of a fallen soldier receive.**

Peter, this is beyond disgusting, it’s frankly un-American.

The tax-payer dollars that Biden is spending should go to American heroes and their families, _NOT to law-breaking illegals._

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Malcolm is in the best position to make up for Democrats’ lost ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It’s going to take a lot of resources to stay competitive in this crowded race
#

Folks —
If the election results from last night make one thing clear, it's this:
Heading into 2022, it’s going to be *crucial* for Democrats to nominate working-class candidates who can reach and energize voters who don't see a government that works for them.
Here's the good news! Malcolm is that candidate.
Malcolm is running a historic campaign to be the *first* person of color ever elected to the U.S. Senate from Pennsylvania and the first openly gay man in the chamber.
His experience growing up in the projects of North Philly sets him apart from the rest of the candidates in this race, and he'll work hand-in-hand with President Biden to pass bold legislation to build our nation back better.
**So here's the bottom line: Malcolm is Democrats' best hope to win this race and flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat blue, but for that to happen, we need a surge of support from folks in Cresco today.**
That's why we have to ask:
[Can you rush a $3 contribution to our campaign today to give Pennsylvania voters a working-class candidate for Senate who can WIN? It’s going to take a lot of resources to stay competitive in this crowded race, so every donation makes a huge impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38269335/314692329/-360183459?refcode2=ba87ae48-e13c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211103-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg3YWU0OC1lMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrlypuBthtYorLoAh-v7jocUF6k7TeAWPELPci2vMcE=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38269336/314692330/-360183459?refcode2=ba87ae48-e13c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211103-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg3YWU0OC1lMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrlypuBthtYorLoAh-v7jocUF6k7TeAWPELPci2vMcE=)**
Look, the hard truth about yesterday’s elections is that Democrats lost ground in a whole lot of places where President Biden won last year.
The results show that a huge number of voters who were a key part of the Biden coalition stayed home yesterday — even in places like Philadelphia.
So it’s vitally important for Democrats to nominate someone who will welcome those voters back into their coalition and turn them out next year.
Malcolm is way ahead of the pack there, too.
He was instrumental in rallying voters across the Commonwealth for Biden, and he aligns with the President on the issues more than any other candidate.
Malcolm is in the best position to make up for Democrats’ lost ground in the areas President Biden won, but it’s going to take all of us playing a part to do it.
[That’s why we have to ask: Could you please rush a $3 contribution to fuel our campaign today? Our success in this race depends on you, and no amount is too small to make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38269337/314692331/-360183459?refcode2=ba87ae48-e13c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211103-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg3YWU0OC1lMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrlypuBthtYorLoAh-v7jocUF6k7TeAWPELPci2vMcE=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38269338/314692332/-360183459?refcode2=ba87ae48-e13c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211103-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTg3YWU0OC1lMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrlypuBthtYorLoAh-v7jocUF6k7TeAWPELPci2vMcE=)**
Thanks for reading. We really couldn't do this without you.
Team Malcolm

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: danger
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
“a political environment in which Republicans would comfortably take back the House and the Senate in 2022.”
#

Friends —
In 2020, Mark won a tough race by just 2%.
If there’s one thing last night’s election results make clear, it’s that this next campaign will be even more difficult. Our opponents are already raising and spending millions of dollars to defeat us, just like in Virginia. And it only gets tougher from here.

subject: Biden’s Assault on American Liberty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As Biden’s vaccine mandate gets more and more strict, he now wants to extend them even further
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbe87ovglop6egt1p137fdpgit91a7fpvlvh2fu8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ucqecohl6uom0tpmcjj72sln6lin9dj6m1gb6t366lij9ptkemojddj1e5o76ttnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sllcopb5ddgcur62phgm2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj5cjjm0o34chh2bs)

---
| Friend, **As Biden’s vaccine mandate gets more and more strict, he now wants to extend them even further and force many Americans to have to choose between keeping their jobs or complying with his tyrannical mandate!** No American should ever be forced to pick between their livelihood and following an authoritarian, unconstitutional order. **The Left called President Trump a fascist - but Biden is the one who is forcing unconstitutional mandates and harming the individual liberties of the American people!** Unlike President Trump, Biden has spent less than a year in office passing policies to make American lives WORSE. **He wants to ensure every American is under his thumb. ** Biden is using tyranny and fear-mongering just to achieve his political goals. The last administration would never allow something like this, Republicans value our Rights and liberties far too much. [_**So I wanted to ask, if we get a Trump victory in 2024, do you think President Trump should ban all vaccine mandates?**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7pnsqrjovsnb1hhb3f1m9sfbn04j07hfodqe6o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjm0o34chh2bs)
---

---
| Biden is using OSHA to force his mandate on every company with over 100 employees. **However, our Constitution gives him no power to enforce such a job-killing mandate, and with a Trump victory in 2024, I know we can ensure these mandates will be obliterated!** However, I wanted to see what true patriots think. Biden has shown he is all too happy to sacrifice our fundamental freedoms! We deserve leaders we know will always put America First!****[_**Can I count on you to tell us where you stand on vaccine mandates?**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5v54pdj369rs5vb2pnrdlvn3q91mek82tij4c7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjm0o34chh2bs)

# **Friend — Joe Biden is waging a witch hunt against parents who speak out against toxic critical race theory and harmful policies like mask mandates.**

---
They’ve launched a “task force” to target parents showing up to school board meetings across the country. Biden is tougher on these parents than he is the Taliban. This must be stopped before parents have no say in their kids’ education at all, and I’m taking action. My plan would protect parents’ rights and hold the Justice Department accountable for trying to intimidate American families. **What do you think about this? Do you support my plan and stand with concerned parents, or do you stand with Biden and his bureaucrats’ witch hunt? Take the poll below.**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Will you be part of the coming red wave?
body:
| |

Last night, the radical leftist agenda – medical mandates, indoctrination of our children, socialism, defunding the police – was soundly rejected across the country. In places that are typically leftist strongholds, conservative candidates won and they won big!

The landscape is ripe for patriotic, conservative candidates to run for office and win!

_Is your local government enforcing unscientific medical mandates?_
_ _
_Is your local school board forcing Critical Race Theory and other poisonous curriculum into the minds of your children?_
_ _
_Are your local officials spending taxpayer funding like it will never run out?_

If so, there has never been a better time to consider running for office. Americans are craving freedom-loving, common sense candidates to step up and run for office.

**Is that YOU? Is it someone you know?**

Tea Party Patriots Action is teaming up with American Majority to train the next class of patriotic candidates by offering daylong Candidate Training workshops.
[JOIN THE FIGHT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzA3LWRmYTNiNWUwODY1MjRlODVhZWU2M2E1NjRhYTNhNjY2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDUzMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=uJJGhmHpaC46NLxLMIlvhw)

* Everything you need to know to win your election

name: Team Schrier
subject: Virginia elected an anti-choice governor last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
On Monday, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments in challenges related to Texas' extreme abortion ban. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38270039/314696312/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFiNmJkNS1lNDNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-VeSFWLN7OKTqLM1XBLV0W34DGVuCCnhx8zGBaqZQw=&emci=94be034a-dd3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5a1b6bd5-e43c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

On Monday, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments in challenges related to Texas' extreme abortion ban.

S.B. 8 is the most restrictive abortion law in the country, banning abortions after just six weeks, before most women even know they're pregnant. Since going into effect, women across Texas have been forced to travel hundreds of miles to get access to the reproductive care they need.

But attacks on reproductive rights aren't just limited to Texas or red states. Last night, Virginia -- a state Joe Biden won by over 10% -- elected a staunchly anti-choice governor. The results of the election show just how crucial it is that we stay engaged in the midterms. **We can't get complacent with reproductive rights on the line. We need to commit to electing pro-choice leaders to fight back against attacks on reproductive care.**

**[We need more leaders like Kim in Congress who will fight to protect access to reproductive care. clean_body: On Monday, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments in challenges related to Texas' extreme abortion ban. Peter, On Monday, the Supreme Court began hearing oral arguments in challenges related to Texas' extreme abortion ban. S.B. 8 is the most restrictive abortion law in the country, banning abortions after just six weeks, before most women even know they're pregnant. Since going into effect, women across Texas have been forced to travel hundreds of miles to get access to the reproductive care they need. But attacks on reproductive rights aren't just limited to Texas or red states. Last night, Virginia -- a state Joe Biden won by over 10% -- elected a staunchly anti-choice governor. The results of the election show just how crucial it is that we stay engaged in the midterms. We can't get complacent with reproductive rights on the line. We need to commit to electing pro-choice leaders to fight back against attacks on reproductive care. | In September, Kim voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care. If passed into law by the Senate, this bill will codify Roe v. Wade and help ensure people across the country have access to the care they need. As the only pro-choice woman doctor in the House, Kim will always fight back against any attacks on Roe. But with so much on the line, it's critical we remain committed to electing leaders who will stand up for reproductive rights in 2022. Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. ---
| | | Thanks to President Biden’s leadership, over 192 million people in the U.S. are now FULLY vaccinated against COVID-19 -- more than 20 times the number when Trump left office. And as of this week children 5-11 are now able to receive the vaccine! Many lives have already been saved, and many more will be. But Republicans are STILL pushing hard against vaccines, even claiming their win yesterday in Virginia was driven by anti-vax sentiment. This inanity has a price -- millions of people still have not been vaccinated, putting our entire population at risk. So President Biden’s administration is planning to mandate vaccines (or testing) for companies with over 100 employees. We’ve had enough -- anti-vaxxers have put us all in danger. But we want to know where our supporters stand on this issue and see if Biden’s plan has widespread support. Please respond: Do you support President Biden’s vaccine mandate?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Do you support Biden’s vaccine mandate? | | | | | | | | | Thanks to President Biden’s leadership, over 192 million people in the U.S. are now FULLY vaccinated against COVID-19 -- more than 20 times the number when Trump left office. And as of this week children 5-11 are now able to receive the vaccine! Many lives have already been saved, and many more will be. But Republicans are STILL pushing hard against vaccines, even claiming their win yesterday in Virginia was driven by anti-vax sentiment. This inanity has a price -- millions of people still have not been vaccinated, putting our entire population at risk. So President Biden’s administration is planning to mandate vaccines (or testing) for companies with over 100 employees. We’ve had enough -- anti-vaxxers have put us all in danger. But we want to know where our supporters stand on this issue and see if Biden’s plan has widespread support. Please respond: Do you support President Biden’s vaccine mandate? | | | | | | | | | Looking to reach progressive activists?. Looking to take action on another front? Check out the . | | Dear Friend, First Lady Jill Biden recently showed her support for a group that helps illegal immigrants avoid arrest, meeting with them and giving them a publicity boost. The organization, El Centro, is heavily invested in supporting illegal immigration. **And they’ve even instructed illegal immigrants to not talk to ICE agents and coached them on other ways to avoid our laws.** **This is beyond ridiculous. An American First Lady putting the interests of illegal migrants over the well-being of Americans.** ****
