body:
Republican Glenn Youngkin won the Governor’s election in Virginia last night marking the first time a Republican has won that state since 2009! Peter, Republican Glenn Youngkin won the Governor’s election in Virginia last night marking the first time a Republican has won that state since 2009! Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham, as chair of the Democratic Governors Association, spent more than $12 million in misleading attack commercials trying to win that election ... but lost. Make no mistake – this is a huge defeat for Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham and the Democrats! She knows she’s in trouble and will spend whatever it takes to win her own re-election. [**That’s why I need you stand with me today and make your most generous contribution to my campaign.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=c83307d549534809a2a92bc1fcc16eed&_e=8ma1ZKpNg94uTT1QEaYcClvdaPIyxkt0uaH5LRjs2BZkqKxDZ8n84-94hJVUPEwKpVpt2_MO65rzGR2w5XsQJCaLR4W_BYhJtQbtU5DaDyitlhEB_FmcRnX9foVZgOlGQdgXAdc4Md7gTf6koQ7RUAsd9eOotic82zPmonerCvNhjLFK2Pz04uZEcxDn2280Guqnfx5WvgLMvnM8ONAjajzGjZqb3GOzJuEsqg1bfkEjucp2Erqi74p5xAw7G6KMgA0N2bNUagxaDTMvCUX_QV61lMq5aJEdu--z-ZeLIcTq08H0EMrjqyoXqr9dJd1PnnI5KlAdfzKAWCLHDIChyZPJGXUZxqCgRDQDBbuwFg8D6dP3igZGdbJ4qdywAa2FjL1L9_PSL-9aspPD7x3UsfcHVW-KDRl1aDBfSpJF3w1CGvqaZbHftHhysIVWBsYg2oHzDSNM0pjdPGi2Ob8XbD4iXNAzIH52Wi1mHXumNxWe2GMqw8V74guBEmxupw7iTmdOZCL9kXLvZK66zNaGtw%3D%3D) [**STAND WITH MARK**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=c83307d549534809a2a92bc1fcc16eed&_e=8ma1ZKpNg94uTT1QEaYcClvdaPIyxkt0uaH5LRjs2BZkqKxDZ8n84-94hJVUPEwKpVpt2_MO65rzGR2w5XsQJCaLR4W_BYhJtQbtU5DaDyitlhEB_FmcRnX9foVZgOlGQdgXAdc4Md7gTf6koQ7RUAsd9eOotic82zPmonerCvNhjLFK2Pz04uZEcxDn2280Guqnfx5WvgLMvnM8ONAjajzGjZqb3GOzJuEsqg1bfkEjucp2Erqi74p5xAw7G6KMgA0N2bNUagxaDTMvCUX_QV61lMq5aJEdu--z-ZeLIcTq08H0EMrjqyoXqr9dJd1P_fXxVaPwclwp6CcPWVZYycxDTkSUzrf0Xb8oWLrAAjcYyW59k0Y_9kZfAs7zQjjQBrOucqC9htcFUUUerFYjM3Jz3uKG8l6INNc-bT3fFA18nP-CKq2wAtgm9lhYIM2L_KZK9tZ7tFz8EcZeGykoF8EYyK9Uk60ggCRfihjH6TFuZ_xa67jSgCz2byOG4ivbV5d7DRU24FLNNrgqbHIQBA%3D%3D) The Democrats and MLG lost, because they are wrong on the issues! Governor Michelle Lujan-Grisham supports putting leftwing bureaucrats in Santa Fe in charge of our schools where they can push their liberal ideology. I support local control and empowering parents. The Governor supports soft-on-crime laws and demonizing police. I support our police and will end catch-and-release for criminals. body:
Last night was a preview of what will happen next year in the midterms for Democrats if Sinema continues down this path | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPA1VGYUbX38AqQaxpgtTFVMLZ_dbFKBgff_Ynpl3JNdOYL3gOHLnAecLdwszc_2TCnQYHGRvu6IkWbThT9sY0UI00911cJQeU3KBtw4vnpMnojIOG6TNxHf_Ukz8KOmbIN9QBkAEvJAHoNGT00oE_S6EZdChnc-IEdBblESPts0e/3gp/gifaSGwwTUqA0Kpqh2UvtQ/h0/zCUVeBUD-6ku1Fp33KlIEqvt1Kun-_mJsPy5qPddI6M)
Peter, Last night, Democrat Terry McAuliffe was defeated by Republican Glenn Youngkin in Virginia's gubernatorial election. A state that President Biden won by 10 percentage points in 2020 will now have a Trump-endorsed governor. These results make it clear: **Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin have put the entire Democratic Party in peril.** Both Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin have blocked President Biden's popular agenda for the past ten months. They have robbed the Democratic Party of critical wins. As a result, they've driven the president's approval rating down and hurt Democrats’ chances of winning races in states like Virginia — and Arizona. Make no mistake; last night was a preview of what will happen next year in the midterms for Democrats if Sinema continues down this path. Republicans have already released new target lists, and Mark Kelly is at the very top. Thanks to Sinema, Arizona's other Senator is in jeopardy. We're here to hold her accountable, and to build the infrastructure we need to primary her out of office. **[But the only way we're going to beat Sinema is by building a big, diverse movement that will reach every community in Arizona — and we're now just getting started. Your gift today will help us build that movement. Will you please chip in?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7lKhfMrurnkvjMZxE0qKYv2NIv3dtS0GN3BQp6IopctbDz-Kei4ePpSuNwznPl6W3GUp1zFiFGRTB4eJ5Wamx966v348rdYf-hk2YIDhnRu6Apj-TET2z6-qCSvaJMVsWhWxlKOfyUqz85IpXPTpznWgIoxVVk6SrdG_-sLU2bQtF4ORAvD2xJRL2RYbgvM_O4E6moe-sKc1HK8gNMJCgnlf4evQSfEoV5_2phBeV5LYCvcP8LyCHafWkJBhLMyj/3gp/gifaSGwwTUqA0Kpqh2UvtQ/h1/JWuxFbMMRh4hnogyhLni3slhbkIcUWBY71aN83dqFYY)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7lKhfMrurnkvjMZxE0qKYv2NIv3dtS0GN3BQp6IopcuYbV6PKELjq7brRvrX7jkLPAIRgtobqykvRcUXGSDGFXANWSvRV7KqwN2UsWzLzOa3JQHWyPCx4_gZ7Y5VM6CSTMCxSrKXOW8ODgqOo9X192bU4mnF7LaeJXFNcIV8EkporeDwmrstP6Hy5vRAkEhNpGinK9T3kgR0uxA9oCG0eH5-Ow423n7sFCUGgId7-PTR86pfglHoDgSH88FFN4Rb/3gp/gifaSGwwTUqA0Kpqh2UvtQ/h2/xM9c77TVsAu7XUcF10StKaLqJ8Mr3I6JDL7kqeJIYlU) Of course, Senator Sinema isn't solely responsible for the loss tonight in Virginia, but we can't ignore the facts, Peter. She played a central role in getting Democrats to this point — an increasingly unpopular president, an agenda in pieces, and few major accomplishments to run on. Even Senator Tim Kaine of Virginia admitted that Congressional Democrats hurt Terry McAuliffe — and that if Democrats were able to deliver infrastructure and reconciliation in mid-October, this maybe wouldn't have happened. Kyrsten Sinema should have continued the playbook of delivering tangible results to the American people that proved successful for President Biden in his first months in office. But instead, she helped ground his presidency to a halt. **Americans are demoralized and frustrated — now more than ever — and they won't vote for a party that doesn't deliver.** It's past time for Sinema to stop obstructing, and start legislating to deliver for the people. **[We're here to hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable to the American people, Peter, and we have big plans to beat her. 100% of the money we raise will be strategically invested in Arizona grassroots organizations who are laying the groundwork to oust Sinema from office. Will you chip in now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS7lKhfMrurnkvjMZxE0qKYv2NIv3dtS0GN3BQp6IopcumHPiDfV1wIjlDu2jLRk7qiLgOgBkP7SZCIz-lvjSpsW-_3CGR60UTilD8K3oypm0VwkocCz1tJj81PK5IVMYjtFdEO8qG0NpNBVgykZRVzx_K-u4O241P_bcAO_EVK5fAE_sSnA7lNNxSbCkmv2ANGK7Zv4LxILIh19NEDsN0Bi_c72uSo5ZDDRY7XV_LFsY-bmTusiD11wUiU9VELFmi/3gp/gifaSGwwTUqA0Kpqh2UvtQ/h3/zU9JG6LsUKePozpM0k3eF4Uggtiv_H1q_21zzmQqgsE)** More soon, Primary Sinema

clean_body: Last night was a preview of what will happen next year in the midterms for Democrats if Sinema continues down this path | | | Peter, Last night, Democrat Terry McAuliffe was defeated by Republican Glenn Youngkin in Virginia's gubernatorial election. A state that President Biden won by 10 percentage points in 2020 will now have a Trump-endorsed governor. These results make it clear: Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin have put the entire Democratic Party in peril. Both Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin have blocked President Biden's popular agenda for the past ten months. They have robbed the Democratic Party of critical wins. As a result, they've driven the president's approval rating down and hurt Democrats’ chances of winning races in states like Virginia — and Arizona. Make no mistake; last night was a preview of what will happen next year in the midterms for Democrats if Sinema continues down this path. Republicans have already released new target lists, and Mark Kelly is at the very top. Thanks to Sinema, Arizona's other Senator is in jeopardy. We're here to hold her accountable, and to build the infrastructure we need to primary her out of office. Of course, Senator Sinema isn't solely responsible for the loss tonight in Virginia, but we can't ignore the facts, Peter. She played a central role in getting Democrats to this point — an increasingly unpopular president, an agenda in pieces, and few major accomplishments to run on. Even Senator Tim Kaine of Virginia admitted that Congressional Democrats hurt Terry McAuliffe — and that if Democrats were able to deliver infrastructure and reconciliation in mid-October, this maybe wouldn't have happened. Kyrsten Sinema should have continued the playbook of delivering tangible results to the American people that proved successful for President Biden in his first months in office. But instead, she helped ground his presidency to a halt. Americans are demoralized and frustrated — now more than ever — and they won't vote for a party that doesn't deliver. It's past time for Sinema to stop obstructing, and start legislating to deliver for the people. More soon, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . subject: re: Virginia

There’s no other way to say this -- Democrats lost big last night.

In Virginia, Terry McAuliffe lost to a Trump-endorsed, right-wing extremist who is A LOT like my opponent.

And if it can happen there, it can happen in our race too. We need to start preparing now to make sure we don’t experience the same kind of loss next year.

I need your help to do that. I’m running to win an open seat -- and my extreme, Capitol Insurrectionist opponent has already raised over $1,000,000. We need to catch up to him quickly, or else we could be in big trouble.

Peter – wow! My campaign manager just shared the final numbers for our extended October fundraising goal, and I had to jump online immediately to personally thank you. Last night, this team stepped up in a truly amazing way to support our race against Sen. Grassley (R-IA).
**Thanks to your support****, we've now not only hit, but also EXCEEDED our October goal!**
The work we do now – and these grassroots goals we hit – are truly going to make all the difference on Election Day. So thank you, sincerely, for all that you've done to power this campaign. I don't know about you, but I'm feeling more fired up than ever to defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and protect our Senate majority!
I know that we can win – and this is only the floor of what our team can do. Thank you, Peter, for standing with me.
With gratitude,

– Abby

name: Drew Thompson
subject: "America First" Dominated Last Night!
body:
We won't stop now. [](https://) Peter, What a huge night for conservatives in Ohio and across the nation! From Mike Carey's dominant victory in OH-15, to the red wave in the suburbs of Virginia, there is one thing that is clear...Biden and the Democrats are paying for each crisis they caused over the last 10 months. We are now poised to take back the Senate and the House, but it will take the right candidate here in Ohio. Jane Timken is the best person for the job, but _we cant do it without you_. Election night 2022 is a year away, but our team has been fighting for months already. Join us this weekend around the state to help ensure the next election is as successful as yesterday for the America First agenda! Click the RSVP button to register for any of the 3 events below! **Win the Streets_Columbus**
Featuring Police Commissioner Kerik & Jane Timken

name: Mark Herring
subject: Thank you, Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I thank the people of Virginia for trusting me to serve as your attorney general for the last eight years. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271298/314701722/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&emci=07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186) | Friends, From the bottom of my heart, I thank the people of Virginia for trusting me to serve as your attorney general for the last eight years. We showed Virginians a new vision for what this office could be, and what a difference an attorney general can make in their lives, and we have forever changed what Virginians will expect and demand from their attorney general. This afternoon I called Jason Miyares to congratulate him on his victory and assure him that my team and I will do all we can to ensure a smooth and effective transition. He will be accepting a role and leading an office that has tremendous capacity for good in the lives of Virginians. Over the last eight years, we have made Virginia a more just, fair, safe, and prosperous place for all. We passed new gun safety laws, expanded access to healthcare, extended rights and protections to LGBTQ Virginians, protected a woman’s right to choose, expanded voting rights, and took bold steps to combat climate change. We cracked down on predatory lending, fought the opioid crisis, protected the rights of immigrants and new Americans, and eliminated Virginia’s rape kit backlog. These are victories that once seemed unimaginable, but now, these historic achievements will be the benchmark that Virginians expect from their attorney general. I will never forget the families who told me through tears what our fight for marriage equality meant to them. Or the survivors who said that eliminating the rape kit backlog finally made them feel like their Commonwealth cared. Or the DREAMer who can finally pursue their dreams here in their home state. Or the everyday Virginians who got money put back in their pocket because of the work we did on their behalf. We have had the honor of writing an amazing chapter in the history of our state, and for that, I will always be grateful. \-- Mark Herring
---
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271299/314701723/1290495552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&emci=07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271300/314701724/-38749205?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&emci=07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271301/314701725/-76963391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&emci=07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186)
**Attorney General Mark Herring is fighting every day for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians.** _"Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done."_ **Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us.** But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271302/314701726/-1865663955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&emci=07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9499186) to only get our most important messages, or you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/07498129-ea3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/67683550-eb3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY4MzU1MC1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3NjDuNR2B5RReMtfLDYn2oa-xIrmKJza9tKbWTXsCo=&id=110637861).

body:
It’s time to roll up our sleeves | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271312/314701820/-1431549694?refcode=EM_FR_211103va_N_TE_90D_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWE3OTY4OS1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LqF7aDnrHaxtIV41Rxezwi2qGXfJVdprXBHamYTOAU=)
---
Supporters, The race in Virginia last night showed us just how tough the battle to keep control of Congress will be in 2022. But just because the job is going to be tough, doesn’t mean we can give up the fight before it’s even begun. [**But we need to be prepared. The fight continues, and we will need all the resources we can get to defeat Scott Perry in 2022. Chip in $5, $10 or whatever to join the fight today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271313/314701821/-1431549694?refcode=EM_FR_211103va_N_TE_90D_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWE3OTY4OS1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LqF7aDnrHaxtIV41Rxezwi2qGXfJVdprXBHamYTOAU=) Our district will be the scene of one of the toughest battlegrounds in 2022, and far-right extremists are already fine-tuning their messaging to gloss over their responsibility for Trump’s attempted coup and their list of disappointing failures. And the star of the show will be Scott Perry. _After nine long years in office_ , all we have to show for Rep. Perry’s record is a long, long list of broken promises made to Pennsylvanian families and his failure to bring a real difference to our communities, our schools, and our infrastructure. That’s why I’m building a grassroots coalition of supporters -- Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike -- who are ready to unseat Scott Perry and put someone in office who will make good on the promises they make and who will get results in Washington. **Together, I know we can win this.** Now is not the time to get discouraged. It’s time to roll up our sleeves, put in the work, and get the job done. [**The opportunity to finally unseat Scott Perry is here. Join us by chipping whatever you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271314/314701822/-1431549694?refcode=EM_FR_211103va_N_TE_90D_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWE3OTY4OS1lYjNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LqF7aDnrHaxtIV41Rxezwi2qGXfJVdprXBHamYTOAU=) Thank you,

Eugene DePasquale

clean_body: It’s time to roll up our sleeves | | = Supporters, The race in Virginia last night showed us just how tough the battle to keep control of Congress will be in 2022. But just because the job is going to be tough, doesn’t mean we can give up the fight before it’s even begun. = Our district will be the scene of one of the toughest battlegrounds in 2022, and far-right extremists are already fine-tuning their messaging to gloss over their responsibility for Trump’s attempted coup and their list of disappointing failures. And the star of the show will be Scott Perry. After nine long years in office , all we have to show for Rep. Perry’s record is a long, long list of broken promises made to Pennsylvanian families and his failure to bring a real difference to our communities, our schools, and our infrastructure. That’s why I’m building a grassroots coalition of supporters -- Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike -- who are ready to unseat Scott Perry and put someone in office who will make good on the promises they make and who will get results in Washington. Together, I know we can win this. Now is not the time to get discouraged. It’s time to roll up our sleeves, put in the work, and get the job done. = Thank you, Eugene DePasquale ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10? = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Senator Padilla is the type of gun violence champion we desperately need more of in Washington DC.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Our work as a movement and as a country is far from done.
#

Hi, it's Gabby Giffords. I'll get right to it: [**I’m writing today to ask you to make a contribution to send Alex Padilla back to the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-15&t=1&refcode2=430_159979_cV5z2U&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)
But I also hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why I support Alex, and why my organization, Giffords PAC, endorsed his campaign.
Throughout his career in public service, Alex Padilla has made saving lives from gun violence a top priority. And I know that he’s deeply committed to continuing this important work in the Senate.
Already, Senator Padilla has become a prominent voice on the issue of gun violence prevention as a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee. His support for legislation like the Background Check Expansion Act and the Break the Cycle of Violence Act, which would increase funding for community violence intervention programs, has helped shape a gun safety agenda that has the potential to bring about real change.
**It’s clear from the terrible spikes in gun violence we’ve seen in recent months that our work to build a safer future is more urgent than ever. We must send Senator Padilla back to the Senate in 2022.**
[**Can you join me in fighting gun violence by making a contribution — of any amount — to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? We cannot afford to lose his voice and his vote in the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-15&t=2&refcode2=430_159979_cV5z2U&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-15&t=3&refcode2=430_159979_cV5z2U&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-15&t=4&refcode2=430_159979_cV5z2U&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)**
Senator Padilla is the type of gun violence champion we desperately need more of in Washington DC.
Thank you for standing with me and supporting his campaign.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-15&t=5&refcode2=430_159979_cV5z2U&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=430%2E159979%2EcV5z2U)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: This is clear: it’s time for #SomethingNew
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Many outstanding candidates won in Florida last night. If you were tired of hearing pundits write us off as a red state, last night’s impressive showing of Democratic power in every corner of Florida proves that we can and we will win.

Last night’s results nationwide also make clear that we can’t recycle the same people and playbook and expect to succeed.

If it wasn't clear before, it's clear now — it's time for Democrats and NPAs to try #SomethingNew — new people, ideas, and campaigns to break the system.

That’s exactly how we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis next year, and it’s why I’m asking for your help. Click here to chip in and show you’re ready to win in Florida next year.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=113postelection]

I ran for office for the first time in 2018. Nobody thought that a Jewish woman from Miami could become Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture.

We proved them wrong. And we’re going to do it again next year.

I’m asking you directly, team: don’t be discouraged by last night’s results. We are going to defeat Ron DeSantis next year.

We can’t get this done with the same tactics. Instead, we need to build a massive and bold movement for change. I’m asking you to click here to make a donation so we can do just that.

Thanks for sticking with us in this fight. Because of you, we’re going to win.

Warmly,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: There’s a movement happening
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Last night, Virginia did what no one thought was possible only months ago. Glenn Youngkin was elected Governor, and Republicans flipped Virginia RED in a state that Joe Biden won by 10 points last November. **We can’t ignore the movement that is happening across the country, Friend.** A Republican hasn’t achieved 45% of the vote in a statewide race in Virginia since 2014. Last night’s victory -- on top of the close race in deep blue New Jersey -- was a testament to the fact that Americans are realizing the disastrous effects of Democrat policies under Joe Biden, and they are soundly rejecting them. [**Virginia showed that if we put in the work, we can control our destiny in 2022.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhXqS-05w3tXzeGMvVh65jYqFQDBTLq1VSIU7ghW1RI8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=2) That’s why we’re already hard at work to make sure that voters know about Tony Evers’ failed record over a year before Election Day. Glenn Youngkin won because he wouldn’t let voters forget that Terry McAuliffe wanted to keep parents out of their students’ education -- and we have seen the same from Democrats as they kept our schools closed, forced masks on our kids, and pushed tried to indoctrinate them with racist CRT curriculum. [**We need to seize the moment, Friend. Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhXqS-05w3tXzeGMvVh65jYqFQDBTLq1VSIU7ghW1RI8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=3) We cannot take this momentum for granted, and we cannot be complacent. Grassroots support will make the difference on Election Day next year. Glenn Youngkin ran a local race and focused on issues that matter most to Virginians. THAT is how we win in 2022.**In order to capitalize on the momentum, we need to make sure we have the resources to pull off all of these efforts in 2022. Your support could mean all the difference.**[**Can you help?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhXqS-05w3tXzeGMvVh65jYqFQDBTLq1VSIU7ghW1RI8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=4) **Sincerely,** Jordan Moskowitz Political Director Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhXqS-05w3tXzeGMvVh65jYqFQDBTLq1VSIU7ghW1RI8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=5 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVhXqS-05w3tXzeGMvVh65jYqFQDBTLq1VSIU7ghW1RI8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=edvirginia_3&n=5)

| | Team, Last night, Michelle Wu made history as the very first woman and person of color elected Mayor of Boston. Sonia was proud to support Michelle’s progressive campaign for real change in Boston — and our movement won big. | |
---
Last night’s results showed what is possible when we stand by our values and organize together. It’s clear Bay Staters are hungry for bold, transformational change — and we now have the chance to deliver it all across Massachusetts.
We have just one year to continue to build on the many progressive victories we saw in Massachusetts last night and elect Sonia. This is the race that will finally flip the Governor’s office from red to blue. [_**If you’re with us, chip in $5 (or whatever you can!) right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271447/314702536/99201477?refcode=em_20211103_f_s_eday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzVhZTM3NS1lYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvCKna9LpQha7988nCbH3UUrsrcEFbMVOxrb1Bj1Jik=)
Sonia believes in fighting for affordable housing, improving our schools so every child — regardless of their zip code — has a chance to succeed, and expanding our voting rights. All of this is on the line come next November.
[_**If we’re going to elect a progressive to lead in Massachusetts — one who can lead and win — we need to build on this momentum today and support Sonia. Please, chip in $5 (or whatever you can) today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38271448/314702537/99201477?refcode=em_20211103_f_s_eday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzVhZTM3NS1lYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvCKna9LpQha7988nCbH3UUrsrcEFbMVOxrb1Bj1Jik=)

Team Sonia

clean_body: We have one year to build on the progressive victories we saw in Massachusetts last night. | | | | | Team, Last night, Michelle Wu made history as the very first woman and person of color elected Mayor of Boston. Sonia was proud to support Michelle’s progressive campaign for real change in Boston — and our movement won big. | | Last night’s results showed what is possible when we stand by our values and organize together. It’s clear Bay Staters are hungry for bold, transformational change — and we now have the chance to deliver it all across Massachusetts. We have just one year to continue to build on the many progressive victories we saw in Massachusetts last night and elect Sonia. This is the race that will finally flip the Governor’s office from red to blue. = Sonia believes in fighting for affordable housing, improving our schools so every child — regardless of their zip code — has a chance to succeed, and expanding our voting rights. All of this is on the line come next November. = Thanks for being with us in this fight, Team Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is what happens
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001otGnOTl6Hd9oRBXZAvpytlPHjb_h0zGQS0XKhDrLZ8nBtNngp9cMttqPZWsBARx4mACnx5UkHLWKt9p8cZ_jLoRSghWA8Y2B5BBTDmVRTlk0Ioe8Nj9nP22_r_0_09RtuAytaCqGrJdNO25GekKHvw40SrebKw_I-7S_5QmmICvBOaDLsS1qPfz0m3qEUZP7wzEe-7FcPZuPK8E1MHo34cmkuapk7v3gqe4zFNFQkKIIQWI7YjJlCMwCsnxjYO3E2-UYZfQ2F2IvrQpvESCcrrEqKMAojtIADGfavj5Neov5POyD5KRLGHp6a8LKyplB6jIi7piEpQEaKRsoDTSk6-Td-DMSfq40n2PSZoOX_Kk=&c=nhwcfSqY8FINfr-AEuY0aMu5WL4KmuIu72JV4Y1khehuLFJ_DFOnOA==&ch=xzMsXGMKdMEQWFUxYl47aUphzTIXKviWYCr1WjPSH2xUw3KQn1SKlg==)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
Virginia now has a Republican Governor in Glenn Youngkin. That's right, VIRGINIA.
The state that went to Joe Biden by 10 points and that hasn't elected a Republican in more than a decade just elected not one, but THREE Republicans to statewide office - Governor, Lt. Governor, Attorney General - AND flipped the state house to Republicans.
This is what happens when Republicans fight against the socialist agenda of Democrats in Washington. But we can't stop now.
---
| | | [DONATE. KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM AGAINST DEMOCRATS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001otGnOTl6Hd9oRBXZAvpytlPHjb_h0zGQS0XKhDrLZ8nBtNngp9cMttqPZWsBARx4mACnx5UkHLWKt9p8cZ_jLoRSghWA8Y2B5BBTDmVRTlk0Ioe8Nj9nP22_r_0_09RtuAytaCqGrJdNO25GekKHvw40SrebKw_I-7S_5QmmICvBOaDLsS1qPfz0m3qEUZP7wzEe-7FcPZuPK8E1MHo34cmkuapk7v3gqe4zFNFQkKIIQWI7YjJlCMwCsnxjYO3E2-UYZfQ2F2IvrQpvESCcrrEqKMAojtIADGfavj5Neov5POyD5KRLGHp6a8LKyplB6jIi7piEpQEaKRsoDTSk6-Td-DMSfq40TTfoYW3Ifx0=&c=nhwcfSqY8FINfr-AEuY0aMu5WL4KmuIu72JV4Y1khehuLFJ_DFOnOA==&ch=xzMsXGMKdMEQWFUxYl47aUphzTIXKviWYCr1WjPSH2xUw3KQn1SKlg==)
---
| Kamala Harris said it herself - "What happens in Virginia will determine the future for the House, Senate, and White House."
Democrats see the writing on the wall. Their socialist agenda is unpopular. Their socialist Speaker is unpopular. Their failure of a president is unpopular.
And when the left feels their power slipping away, they will do anything to hold onto it. They'll raise millions from their dark money groups and Hollywood friends. They'll pressure every Democrat in Congress to advance their radical agenda because they know it's their last chance to get anything done.
That's why we need to keep up the pressure, keep up the momentum.
If we can take back Deep Blue Virginia, we can take back the House from Nancy Pelosi, the Senate from Chuck Schumer, and the White House from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.
But it's not going to be easy. We're going to have to recruit good candidates in competitive races across the country - the kind of people that can persuade more voters to join our conservative movement.
[That's what I'm going to commit my time and resources to over the next year. And I need your help in this fight.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001otGnOTl6Hd9oRBXZAvpytlPHjb_h0zGQS0XKhDrLZ8nBtNngp9cMttqPZWsBARx4mACnx5UkHLWKt9p8cZ_jLoRSghWA8Y2B5BBTDmVRTlk0Ioe8Nj9nP22_r_0_09RtuAytaCqGrJdNO25GekKHvw40SrebKw_I-7S_5QmmICvBOaDLsS1qPfz0m3qEUZP7wzEe-7FcPZuPK8E1MHo34cmkuapk7v3gqe4zFNFQkKIIQWI7YjJlCMwCsnxjYO3E2-UYZfQ2F2IvrQpvESCcrrEqKMAojtIADGfavj5Neov5POyD5KRLGHp6a8LKyplB6jIi7piEpQEaKRsoDTSk6-Td-DMSfq40raFPJgji2LHG3RTRNk4gmQ==&c=nhwcfSqY8FINfr-AEuY0aMu5WL4KmuIu72JV4Y1khehuLFJ_DFOnOA==&ch=xzMsXGMKdMEQWFUxYl47aUphzTIXKviWYCr1WjPSH2xUw3KQn1SKlg==)
Are you with me?
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT TO DEFEAT SOCIALISM AND BUILD OUR CONSERVATIVE MOVEMENT.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001otGnOTl6Hd9oRBXZAvpytlPHjb_h0zGQS0XKhDrLZ8nBtNngp9cMttqPZWsBARx4mACnx5UkHLWKt9p8cZ_jLoRSghWA8Y2B5BBTDmVRTlk0Ioe8Nj9nP22_r_0_09RtuAytaCqGrJdNO25GekKHvw40SrebKw_I-7S_5QmmICvBOaDLsS1qPfz0m3qEUZP7wzEe-7FcPZuPK8E1MHo34cmkuapk7v3gqe4zFNFQkKIIQWI7YjJlCMwCsnxjYO3E2-UYZfQ2F2IvrQpvESCcrrEqKMAojtIADGfavj5Neov5POyD5KRLGHp6a8LKyplB6jIi7piEpQEaKRsoDTSk6-Td-DMSfq40TTfoYW3Ifx0=&c=nhwcfSqY8FINfr-AEuY0aMu5WL4KmuIu72JV4Y1khehuLFJ_DFOnOA==&ch=xzMsXGMKdMEQWFUxYl47aUphzTIXKviWYCr1WjPSH2xUw3KQn1SKlg==)
---
| Thank you for your support,
---
| Dan Crenshaw

If we can take back Deep Blue Virginia, we can take back the House from Nancy Pelosi, the Senate from Chuck Schumer, and the White House from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But it's not going to be easy. We're going to have to recruit good candidates in competitive races across the country - the kind of people that can persuade more voters to join our conservative movement. == Are you with me? | | | == | Thank you for your support, | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | Thank you for fighting for our conservative values. Your support is extremely valuable and crucial for Republicans to take back the House and Senate in 2022. Fellow Conservative,

I don’t know if you saw this insanity but the Biden administration is now planning to give illegal immigrants $450,000 per person.

I mean I can’t believe it. _**According to Joe Biden, If you break our laws and cross into our country illegally you deserve hundreds of thousands of dollars.**_

subject: Last night’s election in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Yesterday I joined 51% of Virginians in sending a message to Democrats and Republicans like that we the people...For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=edc5426398c9457299605eaae4b6fb74&_t=Pc-DsJdogzbMnGVecSskTO2dfKHjmjf3w1lN0Lrh54w_qHusD8saBTfVQwtWfZ9_vUCibx7PTERmok0FNatXGp2ZKAcqOMH7Eh7QWv9_AwUThbl-qwMUPSc8yWAEwW0JUkoOwqILg7VkPvxndFW6DxXL62Y_kJbfbeKBTan38e0%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=edc5426398c9457299605eaae4b6fb74&_e=ZJgwtf1HUOsZTO2dpYNjGMinU_heIZas9-Xh1FUToY93_L67uuB4RoCG0sm0tA3bbUInhjD0QcORzSGxXwEb__TdQAjJSWMOB3bJcy_fZ1IKCAE-DvhXYEOg-f5_uVAIA6_K7Pv9ojNMrsEvvZNJY_e2aGG57sELzXm_ZTrIZJgOW0q75i3qNF57__UNTecYSVypSwoCAtjPapLQ4nDd4Nk6Fvr0SCWitHP_u9bWK3ODXbvJywGGqqU_R0RDBJheZ8Wee3r8tJSrkkebyXuN3tTwli4y3B8LupUsOtLVnWTEzYq1WV1uzsgik6XGZyqxDh9Zgw-53b4_KRGP42jLz5cqv2FgSgrUJGjOgqzOifiGkojuBLpoihRjdpIlVpte23jwtZ8NBbwjsIhIvMr5K22HdTm9Uz7AOWF88ghaXJ7qGQE6UmGIGq7ELdYnQKV7TeokLdTCKAtGTNd95yz6dw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Today, I’m proud to call myself a Virginian. The people of our Commonwealth sent a resounding message to Democrats in D.C. that their progressive politics just aren’t for us.

Yesterday I joined 51% of Virginians in sending a message to Democrats and Republicans like that we the people:

* Want cheaper gas.

* Emphatically support parental rights in public education.

* Are tired of constant tax increases.

* Care about our standing in the world.

* Will not be taken for granted.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=edc5426398c9457299605eaae4b6fb74&_e=ZJgwtf1HUOsZTO2dpYNjGMinU_heIZas9-Xh1FUToY93_L67uuB4RoCG0sm0tA3bbUInhjD0QcORzSGxXwEb__TdQAjJSWMOB3bJcy_fZ1IKCAE-DvhXYEOg-f5_uVAIA6_K7Pv9ojNMrsEvvZNJY_e2aGG57sELzXm_ZTrIZJgOW0q75i3qNF57__UNTecYSVypSwoCAtjPapLQ4nDd4Nk6Fvr0SCWitHP_u9bWK3ODXbvJywGGqqU_R0RDBJheQw8GNM_5HsYWiR7gNBAClRJ9YlPM4kMr8XEa65J7H061GiKQKwAigiwNqTJjw1OD3hyGf2czh8ZW89ZviWtrjXCiXq9kJnxvAHs69yrU01TbdNU_9aH0gg4N7aAdNmpYptoHfd_R3b2loB1lHEHeBnwmgkHIHNr-UZnDv55TpyCgwvmqtWnYuylO020qnJwGrcYVpw0TvWvX1b7L_Zos1Q%3D%3D)
Virginians have given Republicans the best gift of all:**A playbook for how to win back the House and the Senate in next year’s pivotal midterm elections**. We have the momentum, but we cannot take anything for granted and must do everything within our power to make sure we don’t lose the wind at our backs.

I myself am running in one of the most competitive House races in the entire nation – right here in Virginia – against one of the so-called moderate “majority makers,” Abigail Spanberger. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z342nf4tv6v8fcsfqm85tu4f67ppf0ir2tordqg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongs5rjasjmmoo69dhj6tgj4tlkcirm2p3ksoon5djgscrj0p3me8qr0o5hmso61puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db66apbbd1nmph6cc5gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ea324idusnbjcn923cjnke9vmtf6plsntrregg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp465m776j0pk6b03q89vuuictsvnugkgf4tn820_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z64qeagabfi1pe28a48d6e8rcs9cjr5qti4hvr10_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ttf2ddvv9cqbfn3pllr668pe7qdghs0sgm13g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zudectnt38r840ar1fd7tdogqdujkkr4lt6rl7qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za01tlb0664de9aghon49b7btrtvdugl3ffpg23g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32chh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58685829:Jklwzz2wN:m:1:3253819041:BB42FD5D981C19A36590BEA04B39B220:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Republicans refused to protect our right to vote (again).
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I learned from a young age about the importance of our right to vote.
#

Friends -
I learned from a young age about the importance of our right to vote. I remember listening as my grandparents and mother talked often about the barriers to voting.
And they were among the many Americans who celebrated when the 1965 Voting Rights Act passed — hoping that their children and grandchildren would never face the obstacles to voting that so many people did.
But here we are, again fighting for our fundamental right. How can it be that more than 50 years later, we are still having to fight for this constitutionally guaranteed right?
Today, Senate Republicans again refused to protect our right to vote by filibustering the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act — just days after they used the same procedural tool to block the Freedom to Vote Act.
The sad truth is that Republicans’ conclusion seems to be that they cannot win elections unless they keep people from voting.
And the threats are happening across the country. In 49 states — including North Carolina — we’re seeing a wave of Republican-led anti-voting legislation and gerrymandering. These measures make it harder for people to vote, especially people of color, rural voters, disabled Americans, and young voters.
We can’t wait any longer as politicians obstruct efforts to safeguard our constitutional rights and do the work Congress is elected to do.
With all that’s on the line right now, we cannot afford not to fight back.
**If we want to protect voting rights and our democracy, we must expand our Senate majority and end the filibuster, and North Carolina’s open Senate seat is one of our best opportunities to do that in 2022. But the only way we’re going to win is with the support of folks like you across the country, so I need to ask:**
[**If you agree that protecting our right to vote and democracy is urgent, please make a contribution to my campaign today. clean_body: I learned from a young age about the importance of our right to vote. Friends - I learned from a young age about the importance of our right to vote. I remember listening as my grandparents and mother talked often about the barriers to voting. And they were among the many Americans who celebrated when the 1965 Voting Rights Act passed — hoping that their children and grandchildren would never face the obstacles to voting that so many people did. But here we are, again fighting for our fundamental right. How can it be that more than 50 years later, we are still having to fight for this constitutionally guaranteed right? Today, Senate Republicans again refused to protect our right to vote by filibustering the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act — just days after they used the same procedural tool to block the Freedom to Vote Act. The sad truth is that Republicans’ conclusion seems to be that they cannot win elections unless they keep people from voting. And the threats are happening across the country. In 49 states — including North Carolina — we’re seeing a wave of Republican-led anti-voting legislation and gerrymandering. These measures make it harder for people to vote, especially people of color, rural voters, disabled Americans, and young voters. We can’t wait any longer as politicians obstruct efforts to safeguard our constitutional rights and do the work Congress is elected to do. With all that’s on the line right now, we cannot afford not to fight back. If we want to protect voting rights and our democracy, we must expand our Senate majority and end the filibuster, and North Carolina’s open Senate seat is one of our best opportunities to do that in 2022. But the only way we’re going to win is with the support of folks like you across the country, so I need to ask: = In the Senate, I’ll fight tirelessly for the people of our state. And when I vote, I’ll be voting with the people of our state in mind. North Carolinians deserve nothing less. Thank you, Cheri Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may . Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can . If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider = today to help us make history.

But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. name: Great America Update
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6565%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lOHkoHTWkrq6mwmHMuNTsw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67748%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ceVErXwpeXOy9DOgIx0djw&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67749%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mhdulwf%2bcxLI1MC0Eo2JcQ&sysid=1)**_ We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67740%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pttV5jlBzbdQB7XOWM09%2bw&sysid=1) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6565%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lOHkoHTWkrq6mwmHMuNTsw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6565%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lOHkoHTWkrq6mwmHMuNTsw&sysid=1)

subject: Horowitz: Forced Vaccinations Threaten Christians
body:
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real
| | | | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. | **Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target – banning Christianity _and the Bible._
“This is about control, not public health,” he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ******_Urgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the “most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America.” I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc7ffs68b5qo7d6hpj5mv1h2e33tibbp3gr4eoi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_**_[.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq8bd52olmub2htc6golb82goa5nq4imqbmsoe8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and
prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znfr1i9n2n6od96r2t8m3325h8fouuv35qbogd5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze53lrp6rbfa7pmavbfih8q54dftm1ogihrd1uj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztd7psccq2d2i8v6ie5dt830ullg0ho4jut67ono_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z110avaf2i94i937ivk22999a278r7hkuaqkqa6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_[.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zchsnnt6h9320obr5tf1svrerptkpbcip0u5gr90_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze49nk6kck3ibdrvn4d0eo3aa4ivjvguv5m7fvb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_**[!](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjifsc69ofh2ns6srm40905ibersd74h9g5tpcp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . [**Read this book**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zseu9cq5f9498i5mt6qrh4qo6harlgie4v7usj48_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs). Remember, [**it's a FREE Offer, compliments of Newsmax.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqr6pjssgia0vjbcl0le8tca9o9bvdjmlo74gfjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs) Newsmax is completely wiping out the retail price of $26.99 for you -- it's THAT critical to get this book in your hands. **We must protect Christianity and Judaism before it's too late -- and save our most basic freedom of religion.** In _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr58568hpecn9a4ol48r6qci3u035caaqr9ukpvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_ , you'll discover the plan that was set in place decades ago . . . and the series of events that have unfolded, allowing the plan to take hold. I name names -- Obama, Hillary, and the big media pushing this secular agenda. There are new ones now: **Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Andrew Cuomo** , and more. **They want a Godless society**. They're totally cool if thousands want to riot in protest against President Trump, breaking all COVID-19 rules.
But if you want to go to church or synagogue -- with social distancing -- they want you arrested! You'll discover who was responsible . . . how the Supreme Court failed Christian America . . . why school administrators are brainwashing our kids . . . and the names of those carrying out the plan in Washington today. When you're done reading _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdg5d3ttkqsjnonm9gp6notbcihvedpcm643h5q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cjjmao32c9h2bs)_ , you'll understand the deep divide in America. This is critical as we roll through the post-election year. **President Trump has been at the very epicenter** of this battle between the forces of good and evil right here in America. And President Trump, out of office, _will actually be a bigger threat -- and a bigger target -- for the far left._ We must fight back, or our children and generations to come will live in fear of expressing their faith. Yours for Freedom, **_D_**** _avid Horowitz_** P.S. Hurry! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38272172/314706085/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211103VAResults_RR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ1YzU1MC1mMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8r5eQ039B49DXDPa2Zw8bSzjY_r6FXwreizh4W8Ebi0=)
Last night Democrat Terry McAuliffe lost to the Trump-endorsed extremist candidate, Glenn Youngkin, in a narrow victory for the Virginia Governor’s seat. **[Virginia was 10+ points for Biden in 2020, so this defeat is all the more worrisome. We can’t assume New Mexico is a safe Democratic state. Can you be one of [30] donors to chip in $15 right now to fight against complacency? We cannot sit on our laurels after a night like last night.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38272174/314706087/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211103VAResults_RR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ1YzU1MC1mMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8r5eQ039B49DXDPa2Zw8bSzjY_r6FXwreizh4W8Ebi0=)**
[DONATE $15 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38272176/314706089/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211103VAResults_RR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ1YzU1MC1mMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8r5eQ039B49DXDPa2Zw8bSzjY_r6FXwreizh4W8Ebi0=)
**_Everyone should be on high alert that this has happened. Glenn Youngkin ran on conspiracy theories, spouting that the 2020 election was a ‘Big Lie.’_** Those theories stand in _direct_ opposition not only to New Mexicans but to the American people as a whole. _Our nation was founded and built on democracy._ Our elections are free, fair, secure, and true. We know because we see Maggie fighting every day to make elections more accessible to everyone in New Mexico.
Though Virginia had a devastating defeat, New Mexico experienced **record turnout** in what people call an “off-year” election. That is in no small part thanks to the work Maggie does in Santa Fe to protect voting rights for everyone in our state.
If we want to stop Donald Trump and far-right extremism from winning in New Mexico next year, we have to re-elect Maggie and send her back to Santa Fe as New Mexico’s Secretary of State. **_But she’s up against Trump radicals and GOP billionaires with dark money and deep pockets._**
[**It’s time to turn our focus to 2022. We cannot be complacent. We are calling on [30] donors to chip in $15 right now to reach our goal of $5,000 this month. In December, we have to stop fundraising while the legislature is in session, so this goal is all the more important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38272178/314706091/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211103VAResults_RR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ1YzU1MC1mMTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8r5eQ039B49DXDPa2Zw8bSzjY_r6FXwreizh4W8Ebi0=)

clean_body: While New Mexico had record-breaking turnout, Virginia suffered a painful defeat. = Last night Democrat Terry McAuliffe lost to the Trump-endorsed extremist candidate, Glenn Youngkin, in a narrow victory for the Virginia Governor’s seat. [Virginia was 10+ points for Biden in 2020, so this defeat is all the more worrisome. We can’t assume New Mexico is a safe Democratic state. Can you be one of [30] donors to chip in $15 right now to fight against complacency? We cannot sit on our laurels after a night like last night.](=) = Everyone should be on high alert that this has happened. Glenn Youngkin ran on conspiracy theories, spouting that the 2020 election was a ‘Big Lie.’ Those theories stand in direct opposition not only to New Mexicans but to the American people as a whole. Our nation was founded and built on democracy. Our elections are free, fair, secure, and true. We know because we see Maggie fighting every day to make elections more accessible to everyone in New Mexico. Though Virginia had a devastating defeat, New Mexico experienced record turnout in what people call an “off-year” election. That is in no small part thanks to the work Maggie does in Santa Fe to protect voting rights for everyone in our state. If we want to stop Donald Trump and far-right extremism from winning in New Mexico next year, we have to re-elect Maggie and send her back to Santa Fe as New Mexico’s Secretary of State. But she’s up against Trump radicals and GOP billionaires with dark money and deep pockets. [It’s time to turn our focus to 2022. We cannot be complacent. We are calling on [30] donors to chip in $15 right now to reach our goal of $5,000 this month. In December, we have to stop fundraising while the legislature is in session, so this goal is all the more important.](=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = We have to keep fighting, Team Maggie Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. body:
It makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcES6f9VI3Wg4zJYJGA8x0_0jl-NljOAyoQROdbkoNRMwpC2EFi8iJQBBeJZL5vm6B_lj9QDaQapuXC4-_XBljU5QH5mXrYuVBqYcxRVZFtvDZKPpbhbIvOD2otQ9yMBSPz9jcAs86Xsb2d38ijjJGr0IWvuG7FyDUvK0gdjFptFEDEJWv3r3WguJteOiqCtViRl2PAXePHCGge5hnsHwPZDA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I wanted to share with you how I spent my weekend.**On October 30th, I finished Ironman 70.3 Oceanside. I have now finished 2 full Ironman races and 13 half Ironman races.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcE8OqaPf08iq-9Vh4PSgVXZznvGBvXsegYHMzIgmuEr-p6dlhxHE6BchnNxrWpwVROtdzH1jtk0YeDufLXzBJKttL1YMMyJiy889045QIuzKCLE_06jtyl_UfkgyXpgI3LNvTTm8mgPCDh4ePW1ObtWocCOD8gp00kwBIO1z97Vh2NBxQNso3xD9SWmLMQStsDIkZ7pti30XE7jNtBGMJtAQ%3D%3D)

Competing in an Ironman is a lot like running for office. It's challenging, it tests your patience, it requires you to get creative to find solutions, and it's _so rewarding_ when you cross the finish line.

The difference is that when I cross the Ironman finish line, I get a medal, but when polls close on Election Day, Republicans get to take back the Senate and save America from Joe Biden. [**Our party only needs to win a few seats to take back the Senate majority. With your help, we can be part of the flip!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcEtcKKfP8sBcJohHPR1LUDQRXAb11I1bBsRQSrpQUAP2iMwUQ5p4jIAf0n_2BvRaERnH4kYS7eHtWkGUxtKBelcbD6uvahzSrSjsACKUSBfFB8ks1RpPpJ79FdhAebzeFo4AG-iBlVSlC5guI29dZWv1hIe2DGGB759VLbWS9N9Xj1SMXXiaFUE2yh-zogwxtUixUqTzPjNz_xNIqBa1iazA%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcEsV3XYdg9JtaWxjHxJovMOYAGm5yt7RN73z6D2kmvRfvGKVjrNyQ0mKpUTT1AxffOwHwLPv9eZJBO186QWu_afLzEP7G5TP3cDY6UIbyK91-kaLiVymSGr0EVp9lHxLZMECnwJCGlos3zvq3foG0kg99XE6-Is1bd_o1-OYdQDPCArnsTh74lj1Z2USCEG7A9l1u_p69D1sQO_ks2UMchzw%3D%3D)
As a constitutional attorney, it makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. **It's not an easy feat to take on people like Gavin Newsom or Antifa in the courtroom,** but day in and day out, I go to my office to protect the Civil Rights of every American.

I've spent my life fighting back; whether it's on my bike or in the courthouse, I gladly accept the challenge. I challenged the State of California when they unconstitutionally tired to keep President Trump off the ballot. I challenged Gavin Newsom in 22 lawsuits regarding his outrageous COVID-19 regulations. [**And now I'm challenging a radical progressive Senator who was hand-picked by King Gavin himself.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcEq18fd8gvEvXevYUZcnhswuoiRW7195rErDCsDw-v2oA__cxBZHDCH3qooydkf-Z0-XIfrjthFr3VBjUloL8uuAb4R1ga_9XTZkKXiSyBqF2IxGTuSPWCUWqDf9t2DKITfnvnehxdCAReZrNKo1nxYl31bD5NadtW8klyXnNI-F3UALXYTsLt42r0QevG-33kVQoU92RzszC84cIR6TkeyA%3D%3D)

**California needs a Senator that will fight for the needs of Californians, not the needs of Gavin Newsom. While I've enjoyed fighting for Americans in the courthouse,[**I know that if I want to make a real difference in our Nation, I need to be inside the Capitol.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcEflhNDSfBPTpZOyh387y56qPlR0GJFcjTLdxI4hQ7I2MtyLlHKx90IWDVX4tOFpOMObweTp50cGZcLiNbRlPAM40YOKy_g6OhDX5EOik-drpnd_hZn1Wk0X01UElWWghsNM2bJkclWkoZMm1VSO-o5S_LJQY86TfhDx4JQV-yPPwJ3KTymV_onqR583qhWewNIVmVFR3Yb5-SglyP2y4acg%3D%3D) **

Much like in an Ironman, I need to make sure I have enough fuel to power us to the finish line. Instead of carbs and electrolytes, I need the financial support of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter.

[**Can you make a $5 monthly contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? Your monthly gift will help us sustain our campaign through the typically slow winter months and allow us to hit the ground running on January 1st. We have no time to waste; can you contribute just $5 a month?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b710434c8f954f72b920abde750fbc61&_e=ugGD273TpYQ2UlhPchHwlG9_S1EPMftVnuaCuQXdR9FF9Z8GIw994mlIvU2MMxZ2Iz6y8r_2EbI_KHiZjtaRVLVY2ePP2QdraemgEsob3FfJYHHadDGOgWcKleS8wJcEmXNR1Br0L4mHOxd_wMb2xmAO2xGw8jBwe5i1BhuZ80vmdXjDY11Yop3tSRm8BINL4DIJYlvpEUymHmTgYtSMh6j2dY9iNjGi21PLwQAxFDVTlxRY1OaNMMMu59rfNRCA3Luw_YtoTE62fMRVUqvgFxjM-AhezXX8Li7acP6gk_dw5DSKTpX8sjcaGiqY6YLvp0Nj6KXJoAlvJlEkbH0Buw%3D%3D)

Mark Meuser

subject: Fixing our border

| | Friend,

My name is Mo Brooks. I have been serving as a Congressman for Alabama’s 5th District and I am currently running to be Alabama’s next US Senator. I have a fierce love for our country and worked hard with President Trump to ensure that our borders were safe.

I am writing to you now because I need your help.

The swamp in DC has been fighting hard to open our borders for years. They are hell-bent on weakening our standing in the world, destroying our economy, and diminishing our sovereignty.

clean_body: | | Friend, My name is Mo Brooks. I have been serving as a Congressman for Alabama’s 5th District and I am currently running to be Alabama’s next US Senator. I have a fierce love for our country and worked hard with President Trump to ensure that our borders were safe. I am writing to you now because I need your help. The swamp in DC has been fighting hard to open our borders for years. They are hell-bent on weakening our standing in the world, destroying our economy, and diminishing our sovereignty. | | | | | I am filled with concern as I see what the Socialist Democrats have done to our border under Biden. With nearly 2,000,000 known illegal crossings this year alone, and with more and more illegals being released into the US after their capture, our border might as well be an open door. Watching this situation unfold, I think of all the amazing work that we did during President Trump’s first term in office. Our borders were respected, a magnificent wall was being constructed, and those that tried to ignore our laws by crossing illegally were removed. | | | | | As we work to take back the House and the Senate in the upcoming election, we must finish what we started. | | | | | This is the time to take a stand. | | To put it very plainly, we cannot wait to act. We cannot hope the Democrats will offer an olive branch of half measures. We must secure our borders. I have been fighting RINO’s and the Swamp in DC with President Trump for years. I will not settle for anything other than America First and the Fake News Media attacks me mercilessly for it. We are seeing illegal immigrants being relocated around the country in the dead of night by the Biden Administration. Countless others flood into our cities unchecked and this is just the beginning of what the Radical Democrats want. It must stop now. | | | | | This is why I need your help now more than ever. We need to keep Americans safe and our borders must be secured before it's too late. Without conservative, America First Patriots in office, our country will continue down the path of this open border destruction. Make America Great Again. Mo Brooks | | If you don ́t want to receive any more alerts from us, please

name: Poll on 2022 Midterms
subject: Today, Virginia. Next Year, the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Republicans Set to Retake Congress in 2022. Peter, Republicans just won _BIG_ in Virginia. And nobody should be surprised. **That’s because Republicans spent the campaign talking about** _**ISSUES**_ **that matter, while Democrats did little more than rant about President Trump.** And no issue mattered more to Virginia voters than education. In the end, Virginians embraced the Republican stance on education – that schools should be launchpads of opportunity, not indoctrination factories. And they overwhelmingly rejected Democratic gubernatorial candidate Terry McAuliffe’s support for CRT – and his view that parents “should not be telling schools what to teach” their kids. The Republican victory in Virginia – just one year after Biden carried the state by double digits – is the strongest signal yet that **a red****tsunami****is coming in the 2022 Congressional midterm s**. | [OFFICIAL POLL](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bb40c31ad2994bc5af12f4be5ebc49cd&_e=y3cc5JtguICpLh0ir24Xz1zlYoa9-9T2LihOcE5fY_Pxyb99INTS9Omqagv4K3uG3K8ENQAhk0iDXDx-mK_dPVcbe7LvwoWWPFsyRxAARm14wK68EBDYErmPozBoN-kh-a0S3jQ13AlSVBYSAzXmBPtIiTLHWRx9chRphQM_YkFU1jviwBY76QAUKiBFRct1TuLiRFw3jFCIAErBP1RCjTJIz0qihYa4psl-SiX8sQB32WEIEt_ojPRfCYQDQI4yGcyoytXmGpk-dF-Y0fHQqxp5nH35FJw8tLL9H6ic9RaJtiHDbMf22kW53MA1WSDvZSxOoCYtZF6lo3L8K5xMwDmsDC_Dg1iQ3N6qZvOLHalG53gcFBr2PU_DDjwThgMdtHgh50cxcQ342qSPa5XUyabtZ15K1wf3MVkMdoSvMuzRaLR4d_icRCQCzuU2b8eMi2khEfemPaUCgOwCS6yOEykhtHXrD5YNc8OFbZCvu_s%3D)

In the end, Virginians embraced the Republican stance on education – that schools should be launchpads of opportunity, not indoctrination factories. And they overwhelmingly rejected Democratic gubernatorial candidate Terry McAuliffe’s support for CRT – and his view that parents “should not be telling schools what to teach” their kids. The Republican victory in Virginia – just one year after Biden carried the state by double digits – is the strongest signal yet that a redtsunamiis coming in the 2022 Congressional midterm s. | Do you think Republicans are going to take back the House and end single-party Democrat control of Washington, D.C. in 2022, Peter?
