subject: Poll Results & Trump's plan is working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Big time |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7fc10a23f1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today to show you the results of an important poll that we conducted that validates not only everything we are doing in America’s audit, but also President Trump’s push to elect America First, Election Integrity Conservatives to Secretary of State!

**Just last month, President Trump endorsed my campaign, saying:**

**_“Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!”_**

_I am proud to continue the fight with you, President Trump!_

[_And recently, President Trump has made a push to endorse like-minded Secretaries of States to protect our elections and ensure the Democrats are incapable of making another steal._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a4195f4a5f&e=44b8c466b0)

**And the media has caught on. Suffice it to say, the Fake News Media does not like it!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2fbf51e748&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This _Guardian_ article reports:

_Donald Trump and allies are seeding one of their most dangerous efforts to undermine US elections to date, seeking to elevate candidates who refuse to accept Joe Biden’s victory in 2020 to crucial offices where they could do significant damage in overturning the 2024 elections._

_The former president has endorsed several Republican candidates running to be the secretary of state, the chief election official, in their respective states. If elected, these candidates would wield enormous power over elections, and could both implement policies that would make it harder for Americans to cast a ballot and block the official certification of election results afterwards. Ten of the 15 candidates running for secretary of state in the battleground states of Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan and Nevada have either said the 2020 results were stolen or that they need to be further investigated, Reuters reported earlier this month._

_The endorsements from the former president underscore the enormous power that secretaries of state have over election rules and procedures, both before and after the election. One of the main reasons Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election failed in many places were election officials, including Republican and Democratic secretaries of state, who refused to go along with his effort. If those officials are voted out of office next year, it would be a serious blow to the guardrails of US democracy._

_“It is really troubling that Trump’s grip on the base of the Republican party may lead to the election of people who say that they believe the 2020 election was stolen from Trump,” Richard Hasen, an election law expert at the University of California, Irvine, wrote in an email. “That’s demonstrably false, but it does undermine the integrity of any elections that these people would be involved in running should they be elected.”_
**This shows two very important things:**
1. **The media is already preparing Americans for the possibility of a Democrat steal in 2024, and that any attempt to protect America’s elections is actually Republicans of all people stealing the election.**
2. **The absolutely worst thing in the world for the Democrats is that there would be Secretaries of States who believe the Truth, that Trump’s victory was stolen by the Democrats!**

_If this doesn’t give us motivation to push for victory for Secretary of State, then I don’t know what would!_

**The absolute worse thing for the Democrats is that President Trump gets what he wants: Election Integrity first Secretaries of State!**

_Well, I got really bad news for the Democrats:_

**_[The plan is working!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d1c2c41c7&e=44b8c466b0)_**

Just take a look at this recent poll:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cd795afc01&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This straw poll shows that it’s not even close! I am President Trump’s endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona, and I am winning by a huge margin!

**What this means is that the final push for our campaign will be defeating the Democrat nominee in a final battle for Election Integrity in Arizona!**

Now, we have President Trump’s enthusiastic support for our campaign, and the media is terrified of all we will accomplish with President Trump, especially in 2024 as we defend Democracy from another steal!

_[Will you help us today with a generous donation to make this dream come true, so that America can once again have free and fair elections?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=16c0ccd6fb&e=44b8c466b0)_

[_Donate whatever you can and together we will make President Trump proud and we will defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6a360cb999&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=320fbe8dbb&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f0167284fd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fcc0906fa9&e=44b8c466b0).

name: News Wire
subject: Roger Stone speaks "Stone Cold Truth" on cancel culture and conservative censorship!
body:
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=6594dbf1ae4f47cfb28b5382848375f4)
---
| **ROGER STONE SPEAKS "STONE COLD TRUTH" ON CANCEL CULTURE AND CONSERVATIVE CENSORSHIP!** Roger Stone spoke to Gateway Pundit at The Truth About Cancer Conference last weekend in Nashville, Tennessee. See video here: [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=ec1fb397aa944f73800784b6222a0417) "After [Laura Loomer](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=77741d1714f2492a9d1c48ad05ed7906), I am probably the most cancelled person on the face of the earth," said Stone. I was kicked off Twitter for life in 2017, I was banned for life on Facebook and Instagram right after my trial. Last week you can congratulate me I was finally banned on TikTok. But you can find me on Gab, Telegram, FreeSpace, Parler, Bitchute, Rumble...it's important that conservatives go to these alternative sites. Hopefully President Trump is developing a great new site because I think communications between each other and with everyone else is vital in terms of our long term political success." Featured speakers included Eric Trump, Roger Stone, Randy Jackson of The Jackson 5, Actor John Schneider, Dr. Andrew Wakefield, Del Bigtree, Donald Trump Pastor Mark Burns, Angela Stanton King, Dr. Fauci whistleblower Dr. Judy Mikovits and many others. According to their [website](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=049ad239bde14e89a3f8d8d046fc28f2), "_The Truth About Cancer 2021 is about Reclaiming America, Health Freedom & Personal Liberty. You can find out about healing, preventing cancer and other health challenges, insights into the state of liberty and freedom in the USA and worldwide, and also reveals the truth about vaccines - all packed into a single weekend. In other words ... a conference that resembles what we USED to have before the "plandemic". Gather together again and socialize and meet your health heroes and fellow patriots._" The conference was a "Who's Who" of Medical Freedom Activists, natural health experts, doctors and philanthropists. Many have experienced censorship by Big Tech, Main Stream Media and banking institutions. Multiple speakers and guests shared stories with us of complete social media censorship and cancellation similar to that of the Chinese social credit system. "I have had may banking canceled on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and TikTok," said event attendee Felisa and owner of The Patriot Party.Rocks. "My company plans 'America First' events. I was banned because I have the word "patriot" in my company name. The word "patriot" is even banned on CNN". According to many event attendees PayPal, Venmo, Twitter, AirBnb, Stripe, GoFundMe, Chase Bank, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook and TikTok were amongst the biggest offenders of cancelling Americans for their political beliefs, affiliations or opinions. "I believe they are digitally assassinating a lot of people to terrorize them," said Maryam Henein, Director of the award winning film Vanishing of the Bees. "Twitter, PayPal, Kiva, GoFundMe, Airbnb, Instacart, Amazon, Patreon all blocked me. Chase bank cancelled my bank account and said they didn't have to give a reason when I inquired why. Is it because I am an outspoken medical freedom advocate, a functional medical professional or because I encourage people to think for themselves? I sell vitamins and encourage people to be their own best health advocate. Yet the FDA and DOJ have come after me for advocating vitamins! I am a journalist and a free thinking human being. Therefore I have engaged in a thought crime. This is techno fascism and medical tyranny combined with removing our freedom of speech. My livelihood has been affected tremendously." See PDF file of Henein's Chase ban here: [Chase Cancellation](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=83ec3785fcbf44d688616dac0d02ac49) "Google is not even trying to hide the fact that the are taking directions from these government actors like Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi," said Google whistleblower Zach Vorhies. "They have been caught writing letters to Google about going after these people. They are taking people off the internet and Big Tech is falling in line and implementing this censorship regime of the Biden Regime and this is a First Amendment violation. When Big Tech acts at the behest of the Government then they are essentially quasi state actors." "I released a documentary called [Out of Shadows](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=5&link=e1480f6e580245e3a7b4b40f66aabc90)- a documentary that sheds light on the inner workings off the media," said Director/Producer Mike Smith. "In less than twenty four hours I was cancelled off Twitter, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube for giving a different perspective. I had 315,000 subscribers on YouTube and with no notice my channel just disappeared. Hundreds of thousands of followers on Social Media gone, just like that. They made is so you can't even share my documentary on any social media platforms- they blocked the link; you can't even DM the link." Like Plato said, "Those who control story control society," said Smith. [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0po2m2taok2o2wkpm&linkid=6&link=0655667d1afa4c29addedf59846c0886)
---

body:
After traveling over 4,000 miles all across Texas, we’re closing out our Launch Tour on a high note thanks to supporters like you. |
#
---
Great news for ya, folks: After traveling over 4,000 miles all across Texas, we’re closing out our Launch Tour on a high note thanks to supporters like you. We’ve been barnstorming all over Texas to talk about solving problems and addressing the issues Texans care about most — such as fixing the damn grid, investing in our public schools and hospitals, expanding broadband access, protecting our constitutional rights, and so much more. So we wanted to share a few highlights from the past week: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38273078/314710048/2022723758?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211103_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjFhMzY0ZC1mNTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VeRi-wNDIgZH_Z83XjUQK4HPPEl8wHCpt9hABFZEGuc=) _First and foremost... That’s why we’re laying the groundwork early and building a broad, diverse coalition of Texans from every corner of the state. **This is only the beginning. Peter - These headlines say it all.

Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough.

They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy.

Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. _**We have the momentum to win in just over a year!**_

Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia:

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58686090:JMo1Zz28N:m:1:3253819041:FB6FC3869D1425E45C2EA8126F2D92A9:r)
But Peter, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months.

If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority.

**[Peter, will you help us keep up the momentum? Please consider donating $5, $10, $34 or whatever you can send today to help us continue building our grassroots army in Georgia!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58686090:JMo1Zz28N:m:1:3253819041:FB6FC3869D1425E45C2EA8126F2D92A9:r)**

clean_body: | Peter - These headlines say it all. Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough. They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy. Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. We have the momentum to win in just over a year! Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: But Peter, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months. If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority. | | |

|

| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/e6Npc3Qhn/c?w=_RiIky1gwLbJlOhtW5kqSLxtfJ32wgjZ2vUuRoA0EZU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPTExMDNlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjJjNDg1YzNhLTYzYWMtNGZkYi0wMWZmLTRjNjMwZGY5OTY0NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | IT'S GO TIME! This week sees our 2021 election cycle end. In the next few weeks, I expect to hear a lot of complaining from fellow Democrats. We lost many winnable races and seats this time around- not because we didn't have qualified and motivated candidates-
---
| [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/e6Npc3Qhn/c?w=ESKL66O0tWtxUV9eBwVXrVA42zImoX4VFm4vtKNW2fI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPTExMDNlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjhlMjFlOWY5LTA2NjgtNDdlOC03OWYzLTQwODI0MDZiNGM1MCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | Seats were lost because voters didn't get out and vote.
---
| | Let's not kid ourselves. The majority of Republicans are not those of old, simply having different views or approaches to governing. THEY ARE THE [GQP](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/e6Npc3Qhn/c?w=-N5KA2eL4CnKt4iHgUVx3nShu0yIVhWnNC9vUvEcYrA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFsbGFzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIxLzExLzAyL3Fhbm9uLXN1cHBvcnRlcnMtZ2F0aGVyLWluLWRvd250b3duLWRhbGxhcy1leHBlY3RpbmctamZrLWpyLXRvLXJlYXBwZWFyLyIsInIiOiJhYzBiZTQyMy04MDJlLTQ3MDctNTEwOC1kYmVhZjNlN2NiMjgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)! THEY ARE TRUMP'S PARTY! They are fueled and fired by conspiracy, bigotry and a desire to remake our country into a vision I certainly don't ever want to see. A country focused on isolationism, nationalism (not in a good way) and a maintaining of a status quo that belongs on the trash heap of history. A destruction of our system of education for a privatized, for profit one that leans on whitewashed history. A destruction of the right of a person to receive medical care deemed appropriate and necessary, in consultation with their doctor. An attack on LGBTQ+ and everyone else's right to live the life they are entitled to, as who they are. "America First" that means "America Only" and only if you're just like them.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/e6Npc3Qhn/c?w=nrtajckTlz0AT75f00HtKRMSWH89zvOFDgKMfAldUFk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPTExMDNlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjQ2NTI3NzhmLTkxNmYtNGM5ZS05MjIzLWE0MDdmNTkyYjM0NCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | So I am prepared to fight for you.

* Aim for the [HEALTHCARE WE ALL DESERVE](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/e6Npc3Qhn/c?w=t8pXpM6oE3S8bTnMnN1d6w6ayLwqDlB8CwgM6ltQguY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiI5M2Y0YzMyYy03OTJjLTQ1NWQtNDVmMS03OTljNGNkM2E1YjUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.

body:
But nationally, it was a hard night for Democrats

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38273783/314713186/1300596418?refcode=211103_FR_eden_postelection
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NmQ3OWM1LWY5M2MtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vkHyIKLcPELfnt50mIXwFb3dGPZJafBC-QFxPD0B0yE=)
---
Dear Supporters,

Last night, Barrier To Entry PAC endorsed candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss, mother of three, proud union member, and now City Commissioner-Elect, won in a landslide victory in Dayton, Ohio.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38273784/314713188/1300596418?refcode=211103_FR_eden_postelection
_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NmQ3OWM1LWY5M2MtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vkHyIKLcPELfnt50mIXwFb3dGPZJafBC-QFxPD0B0yE=) This upset comes on the heels of a hotly contested race marred by political and racial tension. Just weeks ago, the two candidates on the losing Democratic slate were forced to apologize to Shenise for distributing mailers against her which have been characterized as “racist dog whistles” in the media.

But it takes more than that to stop Shenise. Look no further than this piece of evidence: When Shenise ran her first time, she lost by 12 points, but she learned the ropes, raised a bit of money, and acquired a small volunteer base.

When Shenise ran a second time, she lost by 4 points, raised more money, and gathered more volunteers.

This time, Shenise finished FIRST among four candidates, earning 29.7% of the vote, among a wave of progressive winds by young leaders of color in cities and towns across Ohio— from Cleveland to Lima.

It was the biggest night for Ohio progressives in over two decades, highlighted by historic mayoral wins in Cleveland and Cincinnati with young candidates of color.

Nationally, however, spirits could not be lower. Democrats across the country are becoming disengaged as a whole, and we’re losing critical momentum. Last night we saw this on a national stage.

Our team at Barrier To Entry PAC knows that building up our progressive base can only happen from the ground up. Last night in Ohio showed us that authentic, diverse candidates who are willing to champion progressive values and working people can win.

Terry McAuliffe’s stunning defeat in Virginia last night underscores the disconnect between working people and Democratic Party leaders at a 30,000 foot view, but this can be seen under a microscope in local Party infrastructure as well. Grassroots activists have found an opening at the local level, which will be critical in combating the Republicans’ latest trend of funding School Board races and other down-ballot campaigns.

Shenise is Barrier To Entry PAC’s third challenger victory in municipal elections for the 2021 Election Cycle, following wins in Galesburg, IL electing Mayor Peter Schwartzman, and Pittsburgh, PA with Mayor Ed Gainey’s successful Primary win last spring, which was sealed in stone last night as well. **[We’re making major progress towards building a government that reflects working people, and we’re looking forward to breaking more barriers with you. Will you rush a contribution to Barrier to Entry today so that we can keep lifting up working-class candidates and help them get elected? Chip in now>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38273785/314713189/-2038882143?refcode=211103_FR_eden_postelection

| Peter,

I won’t sugarcoat it: Watching the election results in Virginia last night felt like a gut punch. This Republican victory so close to home serves as a wake-up call around what lies ahead of us in the next year, and I know a lot of us are feeling sad and angry about the results — **but as Martin Luther King Jr. said, “We must accept finite disappointment, but never lose infinite hope.”**

I know that’s a lot easier said than done, but I know a thing or two about the power of never losing hope. In just three generations, my family did something extraordinary — we went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg, Maryland, to serving in the cabinet of the first Black President. Because of that, I believe anything is possible.

I am hopeful that together we can turn the tide and bring meaningful, progressive change to Maryland. [_**That is why today I am asking you to contribute to our Rapid Response Fund now and join me in a shared hope for a better future for our state.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38274011/314713728/-2130778826?refcode=BLU-KING-20211103-m-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDZkNzljNS1mOTNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnQ8otw12g2hsJg_XKucdKtl1MnK3pkjrTFizcstRok=)

With Republicans gaining momentum in Virginia and across the country, we are going to need to work harder than ever to flip our state and we can’t take anything for granted.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: CNN just confirmed what we already knew:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We are about a year away from the midterms. If yesterday’s elections showed us anything, it’s now extremely clear that we must continue organizing on the ground to build progressive power, so corporate interests don’t block our future people-first efforts.
#
Peter, CNN just confirmed what we already knew about Pramila:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211103?refcode=em20211103-773&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=773_420207_FyMUbJ&akid=773%2E420207%2EFyMUbJ)
> _"The congresswoman has in recent weeks been at the center of the action as her party works to finalize a sweeping package to expand the social safety net, a key priority for President Joe Biden._[
> ](https://s3.amazonaws.com/ak-pramila/images/editor-2021-11-03.png)
> _While moderates are focused on passing the infrastructure bill, the priority for progressives has been to reach a deal to pass the larger social safety net package, which would address health care, aid to families, and the climate crisis."_
**Delivering real change for working families — that's been Pramila's guiding principle throughout months of negotiations on the Build Back Better agenda.**
However, this entire process has clearly shown that not everyone holds these same priorities. Far too many in power are subject to the corrupting influence of Corporate PACs, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and fossil fuel companies.
We are about a year away from the midterms. name: Rick Scott, me (2)
subject: FWD: tonight

name: Karen Bass
subject: What decades of organizing have taught me about watching election results.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

Last night, states across the country held key elections -- including several mayoral races. After the polls closed, we witnessed historic victories and shocking losses across the board.

The results should remind us of what's at stake here in Los Angeles. A year from now, we have a chance to follow in the footsteps of progress and move this city forward, and we can't afford to fall short.

I won't tell you the road ahead will be easy. Decades-worth of organizing has taught me that nothing worth fighting for is easy. But I will tell you every dollar chipped in, every minute volunteered, and every second spent spreading our message across the city is worth it -- because our movement for social and economic justice for every Angeleno matters.

**[I'm proud to have you by my side in this fight, friend. Yesterday's elections proved we can't take this race for granted. I'm hoping today I can count on you to chip in what you can to help us hit the ground running. You can make a contribution at this link.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-h5VznlRCz_uDP3I7dsxW2_8dD7lmSkCjzEEeeVEaF8=/A4yVC9sfINAq5xoSIaYzuZSD8FaBE_OzBWeuXMAnze4=?ms=em21_211103_va_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211103_va_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211103_va_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211103_va_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

The election is hardly a year away. History has its eyes on this race to see if we have what it takes to create a city that works for everyone -- and we don't have a second to waste.

Let's go,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Josh Harder
subject: my thoughts on Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-header-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, I had a gut feeling we needed to be worried about Virginia. And even with our last minute Team Harder fundraising efforts for Terry McAuliffe's campaign, it wasn't enough. (Thank you again for your help, the McAuliffe team was grateful). I'll save you the think piece about how this is a "warning sign" for us next year. The bottom line is: Democrats in Congress (and President Biden for that matter) need to do a better job getting things done and making sure voters know about it. We can't cede the message to Fox News. If we do, we're in for a blood-bath next year and Nancy Pelosi hands the Speaker's gavel to Kevin McCarthy. It's that simple. So, where do we go from here? We can either sit in our pity and hope things magically get better, or we can take action. We can pass legislation to improve people's lives (I have multiple bills ready to go as I type this...). We can do a better job communicating with voters, especially our latino community who for too long have been left out of the conversation. We can organize early, talk about the things that really matter to our families, and not take any moment or opportunity for granted. We need to start working _now._ As a Democrat who represents one of the 3 districts that Democrats need to protect for our House majority next year, I need your support now. Not just right before the election next year, I need your help _now_ if we're going to have a chance at winning this vital toss-up race. [**Will you please rush in a donation today to help us organize earlier than we 've ever done before to keep California's most competitive district blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-SL-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-EL-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**
---
| **[$25](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-EL-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)**

| **[$200](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-EL-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=200)**

| **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-EG-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA)**
---
Together, our grassroots movement has done the impossible, twice. First you helped elect me in 2018 during the Blue Wave as one of the youngest members of Congress ever, then in 2020 we beat back an extremist Trump Republican and did our part to keep the House blue.
Now our challenge is bigger and more urgent than ever. Dangerous QAnon extremists are only 3 seats away from taking control of the House majority and they're more empowered than ever after last night's results. I know what it's like to beat an extremist - conspiracy theories and lies take hold much easier than we'd like to admit. But I know we can do this - we just have to get to work, fast.
**After winning in Virginia, Republicans think they have a playbook they can use all around the country to win tight races - and they are going to do everything in their power to flip California 's 10th district red.** [**Will you please send in a donation right now to help us fight back and protect California 's most competitive seat?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-SL-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
Thanks,
Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/b07aN76SH_FdzktVlJ6ICsc-o40C1LgDMqScTL_Cg7E=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/3JnqVrOKr3n_XxbPoQ6mANHUpLH2xbyj9SZxWXyOKfk=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/R7yn2YtKUNE_XUgXrCpYnK_wV7GA4LvhnYiDMG47l14=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/BVCFcm5iDdiCgEpvL_XW7wmbq42iXkMf0OnZuZZPzyE=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-footer-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/kTY99JXHrnPn1ti70FhuMpt8dZMYVf2NWiNnZBfAGnQ=/1xo3IVcpvxd-9NoQv31Fyicikh41ct-B9TklbkY-dDc=?refcode=E12249-20211103-VirginiaResults-footer-RapidResponse-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. clean_body: | | Peter, I had a gut feeling we needed to be worried about Virginia. And even with our last minute Team Harder fundraising efforts for Terry McAuliffe's campaign, it wasn't enough. (Thank you again for your help, the McAuliffe team was grateful). I'll save you the think piece about how this is a "warning sign" for us next year. The bottom line is: Democrats in Congress (and President Biden for that matter) need to do a better job getting things done and making sure voters know about it. We can't cede the message to Fox News. If we do, we're in for a blood-bath next year and Nancy Pelosi hands the Speaker's gavel to Kevin McCarthy. It's that simple. So, where do we go from here? We can either sit in our pity and hope things magically get better, or we can take action. We can pass legislation to improve people's lives (I have multiple bills ready to go as I type this...). We can do a better job communicating with voters, especially our latino community who for too long have been left out of the conversation. We can organize early, talk about the things that really matter to our families, and not take any moment or opportunity for granted. We need to start working now. As a Democrat who represents one of the 3 districts that Democrats need to protect for our House majority next year, I need your support now. Not just right before the election next year, I need your help now if we're going to have a chance at winning this vital toss-up race. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Together, our grassroots movement has done the impossible, twice. First you helped elect me in 2018 during the Blue Wave as one of the youngest members of Congress ever, then in 2020 we beat back an extremist Trump Republican and did our part to keep the House blue. Now our challenge is bigger and more urgent than ever. Dangerous QAnon extremists are only 3 seats away from taking control of the House majority and they're more empowered than ever after last night's results. I know what it's like to beat an extremist - conspiracy theories and lies take hold much easier than we'd like to admit. But I know we can do this - we just have to get to work, fast. After winning in Virginia, Republicans think they have a playbook they can use all around the country to win tight races - and they are going to do everything in their power to flip California 's 10th district red. Thanks, Josh = =

subject: Our Campaign Is Off To A Great Start! Our Support Has Been Tremendous.
body:
Brice Wiggins for Congress | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/21ec5805adf9/our-campaign-is-off-to-a-great-start-our-support-has-been-tremendous?e=698f056321)
**Dear Supporter/Friend:** What a week! I cannot believe that our announcement for Congress was just last Monday. Heather and I have been overwhelmed with encouragement and support, and we cannot thank you enough. Our announcement was covered by media from around the State , and we generated excitement in almost every media outlet in the 4th Congressional District. **(See links below to some of this great coverage!)** I am still following up with a few interviews and we will continue to work for consistent media coverage during the campaign.**"What do we do next?"** and **"How can I help?"** have been two big questions that I keep getting from supporters across the district. There are a few simple, practical, and effective things that we need you to do immediately.**1) TELL YOUR FRIENDS!** Tell your friends about our campaign and invite them to join us. A personal endorsement is the most important thing that I can ask you to give. Talk about my campaign with your family, friends, lunch clubs, and coworkers. **2) DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN:** Campaigns cost money; it’s a reality. Successful fundraising allows us to get our message out, which translates into support, top to bottom. We have a winning team with a winning message. We just need the resources to get it out. A donation from you will send a message to everyone that the status quo is no longer acceptable. Visit: [bricewiggins.ms/donate](https://focusgroupms.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=fc0d575ba1&e=698f056321)**3) FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA:** Our campaign will be a grassroots effort, and we will need you to share on [**Facebook**](https://focusgroupms.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f5f0403c7e&e=698f056321) , and all of our social media outlets ([**Twitter**](https://focusgroupms.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1d383cf0c0&e=698f056321) and [**Instagram**](https://focusgroupms.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4a6f7e67e2&e=698f056321)). Please post about our campaign and link our website, if possible. Feel free to share and invite others to share my campaign message. Word of mouth is a powerful political tool.**4) LET US KNOW ABOUT EVENTS AND ACTIVITIES WE CAN ATTEND. **Please let our team know of activities in your area that I can attend. I want to take my message to the people in the Fourth Congressional District. If you know of a festival, meeting, or other community activity, please feel free to share with my scheduler, LIsa Ireland, [lisa@Bricewiggins.ms](mailto:Lisa@Bricewiggins.ms). She will do her best to get it on my schedule.**5) HOST A MEET AND GREET. **Please consider hosting a meet and greet for me and introduce me to your family, friends and neighbors. Again, this goes back to the grassroots effort that we are undertaking. Please contact Lisa Ireland at [lisa@bricewiggins.ms](mailto:lisa@bricewiggins.ms) if you would like to host an event.**6) PUT UP A YARD SIGN (When it is allowable by City/County ordinances.)** Yes, we will have yard signs and we need good visible locations to place them. Please let us know or simply fill out our volunteer form and check the box for [**Yard Sign here**](https://focusgroupms.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c1edee108e&e=698f056321). Beginning in the late spring, we will start getting yard signs out.Thank you so much for your interest and support. We would not be where we are without your help, and we continue to bring our message to the voters of the 4th Congressional District. Please feel free to reach out to me or my team, if there’s anything that we can do.

subject: This just proves that we can’t let up.

body:
We won’t let Trumpism win. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38274407/314715298/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY2ZmUzNy1mYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcCpKYE4dGtkQveTjKKvByW6XWSPKxs4LPjGHpdA1Hk=&emci=f427f636-ee3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1ff6fe37-fc3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Peter, By now, you’ve probably seen the results of last night’s gubernatorial elections in Virginia and New Jersey. I’m proud that Democrats re-elected Phil Murphy in New Jersey. Unfortunately, we didn’t see the outcome we’d hoped for in Virginia. This is a wake-up call for Democrats everywhere. We can’t risk complacency going into next year’s critical midterm elections. In the face of right-wing radical extremism, it’s more important than ever that we elect real leaders who will _deliver_ for our communities. This is the moment to get energized, Peter. This is the moment to show our commitment to the values we share: among them, the beliefs that **women’s rights are human rights, that the truth is _always_ more powerful than lies, and that our democracy is worth fighting for.** We can’t let Trumpism or the far-right’s misguided policies take hold _anywhere_ next year, including here in North Carolina. **[If you’re with me in the fight for the future of our country, chip in right now to support our team’s work to elect North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot in next year’s midterm elections>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38274408/314715299/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_VA-NJ_110321_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY2ZmUzNy1mYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcCpKYE4dGtkQveTjKKvByW6XWSPKxs4LPjGHpdA1Hk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38274409/314715300/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_VA-NJ_110321_express10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY2ZmUzNy1mYzNjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcCpKYE4dGtkQveTjKKvByW6XWSPKxs4LPjGHpdA1Hk=)

clean_body: We won’t let Trumpism win. | Peter, By now, you’ve probably seen the results of last night’s gubernatorial elections in Virginia and New Jersey. I’m proud that Democrats re-elected Phil Murphy in New Jersey. Unfortunately, we didn’t see the outcome we’d hoped for in Virginia. This is a wake-up call for Democrats everywhere. We can’t risk complacency going into next year’s critical midterm elections. In the face of right-wing radical extremism, it’s more important than ever that we elect real leaders who will deliver for our communities. This is the moment to get energized, Peter. This is the moment to show our commitment to the values we share: among them, the beliefs that women’s rights are human rights, that the truth is always more powerful than lies, and that our democracy is worth fighting for. We can’t let Trumpism or the far-right’s misguided policies take hold anywhere next year, including here in North Carolina. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Roy = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Tom Winter
subject: [Announcement] A huge opportunity for our state
body:
This is what we were. This is what we can be again. I just need to know one thing. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-81iB4R0Zyl3YfvP3c7BOdXKSglBznA3Z2CoXfEFDh0cl_Nr2EjfTsLRQ94P3vu19suRjpMY7U3_tdm-8RSnjQnep1ThvabaWdcpwQCDMyFJXfX6vQFWK8cn1CMwnP8d2f7OPFv0IUxZ-prq_UsgbIZcO9HpDAQNLm5zF-mtPvwGYqmpSie2UO3jBMqqzWVvflrN00H9NOClaBJ9t0tmrUkQ/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h0/YOmtnH9mHVSzomYTOo3Mxe-3C79R0GKCHmVJGc7_it0) _You are receiving this message because you previously supported Winter for Montana. If you would no longer like to receive updates about this campaign, please _[click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G2ymLkDHrjx60ZC15-UKIiNYkrVkE5q4WtlmSiEHa0K5MXs-_XOlUQjtnfrOL0P3OEIvVc8AmHhKWQNwpBJTFOGzfj7eGonwFvnvA4-J7KGgTcMFbTcMu55rTooc6jgBbf2BRFzuJRbqd0DazvWB2xVaeyrDpqPBWjy9gJus_OVLfVRGXsG1CH8o41WZ2Okw302W66X7Fe-d8fyq5QdQe5HXhkhCZZxu_GxT_SopQ3OJpPWYrn5oJPJPSBQShmWqLtcRJWb7UlWA7cDRzGzXJPBD7ZocAgdarUZoZBjjlKMPnhI7py-IDQtQ9pm5D5CLuzeCrxd2DTo32KfYPp8Uv0UREb_Ij6u5hMut1cj6ZkZm1VsAOveGCJp_HAnsbsszI/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h1/OIMT6A470gO5fbtNnUGBdHzyNxxra1CfcuPTxVcSyKo)__ Friend,

It’s official: for the first time in 30 years, we Montanans will gain another congressional district. This is a huge opportunity for the future of our home. And **_[I’m ready](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-85wRAXLIoaec7ktAlJnEkbiWvNuqdZbcFoPNajwhA5SsVpY-3NOq0m2ugCo_2z-6EZkw8v-LXKYIMSzPJim6s0hfd8cQtDoBwvq6MAtLpNpnxYFwhw08IADtE0HezLasxt1Xf7fdxE23BlQOI639dLlgjqNnr-WWKWT4a_VCRFXIZPaMiAqvYXxJBR9AAY0QqUY7xMKqEdQAlnT5aw9uaWQ/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h2/5MPZQMjxMUqJ-A3zvTgJGj_Y-EJkYLVQqtOz8Om767w)_** to do everything I can to make sure we don’t miss it.

Big corporations have spoiled our politics and weakened the labor laws that gave our lives stability here. We have the opportunity to undo that harm.

It used to feel safe and free here. We have the opportunity to protect people from economic, environmental, and public health threats again.

Montana gave the country the Wilderness Act, anti-monopoly laws, and much of the union movement. We can restore that leadership.

**This is what we were — and what we can be again.** | [ SAY YOU'RE IN >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-85wRAXLIoaec7ktAlJnEkbvX-GhhGfzYHvgtdqV1G95fDoe8GCnT1r8NcwBukvcy92LaaZtXkLW7B4FYt5U0SBTAWnlNnCBSP-LNDr_J84AxIR-Rl3IEaMgNAxJMqUylr5JM7NxLEPd2oQtOhO192F3yTYnv6RTX7iQINmdv_ZWmvac9TpF66LbxXaBL2hN_fhUZhPvkU2l-SCmL5jcVTxQ/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h3/WSMy2AzN-8dB9WDwb3f92JV1c5jttiBH8WW6yXYr8gI)
---
I’m Tom Winter, and **I’m running for Congress** because of the Montanans who are counting on people like us: the Montanans who clean the out-of-state billionaires’ ski houses, the Montanans who fight the fires, the Montanans who feel their lives getting more precarious, the Montanans who stand by each other.

As we embark on this campaign, I just need to know one thing: Will you stand with us too?

**_[Stand with us today. Add your name to say you’re in for the fight to create a better future for all Montanans.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-81iB4R0Zyl3YfvP3c7BOdXH0q_M_n-9BrTWl3PEtuwoH139b-77uIJdckj3CwKj1f6szgmQS-0Q-TV_aekaKpmlwai8sSKfKn_UKDrnBgLK0A0tmBurIWp34JfURswBYFDh3edVOuDuyl-eKowBMs5hZ0XOJUljMbuih8e14P1Ws8pMCmfDoLPvmWOOsbMLjGm1UPUiqWmCKx-zSoC_r9BA/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h4/Eu68txoiSJ4qA4R4WbR5qeIr5K0fA9Uu0_-Josfv2qw)_**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-85wRAXLIoaec7ktAlJnEkbjnYuTqn3YWGbabEQcepbfIIRiSyX4f07XheUMc2Xo13wwjXYPZKyLk59ylNQmAalegPcIgurmoF_riIOrViaYUq2fL18aA_hhoG_fFCCi9MVuH96B4SUh0e_si5DN0QGsguga6MZJ6SNn3oTVnY1Jm1Gx_4hgVzNv8heyo4R9qB6IPXljiseYtqtPmPSKmBYw/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h5/M4DV5zHRJ3DcWjZ1hQKx0aBRWYuKfs5VlpYBbQNJcUc)
Montanans have so much to protect, and so far to go. Clean elections, protected wilderness, managed elk herds, jobs with dignity and a good paycheck, a home and an education for you and your family, the freedom to make of yourself what you want — the list goes on.

But now the Montana working people built is under attack. Billionaire out-of-staters and multinational corporations think they can make our home their own personal playground. Extremists have taken over our state government, and corruption of our political leaders is now commonplace.

I’m running for Congress not because I alone can fix these problems — but because I know we can if we work together. Together, we have no need to fear the fight against the corrupt interests that take advantage of our divisions. Together we can put outcomes ahead of ideology. Together we can bring back a Montana where we can live free, healthy, and prosperous lives.

That’s why I’m running for Congress. Are you with me?

**_[This is just the beginning. Show you’re in for this fight today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnml-MhcKFij4386YWEJSF4T-vbzppl_4w_28KXo29PS7GJo7GgCBRKIUwk74TBu6y64iwNPuLxv10jF67FUSD-85wRAXLIoaec7ktAlJnEkbhbYT0UxmGQJlqY-UsY9-blZdw-B_3R9Z8gaHCljbeF_0Ve-HwzjNmgTCOcp0ZRoFxulzL6go2Nl7emSOGenDkmP5QZpM1r-Oc5dXUilYU5UBlgLEBgo_6ZQXqx0l2FVo6_dgO_25A0JXHNqchuYe_6_e1HaLxayE6dsm4gaE2wqK_CfvJSAUoCBDjiGiuyppw/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h6/J9yrPhVghZQZAW3EZVxtQY1LwBQ__A3RytYST-0ChtE)_**

We can be what we once were — a place that values good clean work, fair play, and equal opportunity. There are more of us than there are of them.

Thank you for fighting for our home,

Tom
[ CONTRIBUTE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXViqBJOrNUOD7xlxpbXnyyI_SGpvdugjOL7J1t9PWW_qh0DDd-sJvvH3IvFzjNLM9f9-TULFdzCFJIPBsRKlw_cNV7-nYnIcyF4k32--t8tjZ0lJ0BtKCuSdMvnY9SKqif-XSr03OGTBz0lAvIYnu1Y_4GbX39zBGSxwA-RburPQ5i9cXkJsiWgU0Cug2LuW9Ab5UqDQZdpW6ZMQ0KDnJ2-5H3kS2cz6YNSCPc8Nx0WCf5tQQW-83Onk9t2vlD_w9bMyMNY4h8--x83DowSR0nztNblGuzyXEvnR0eZCvqxKyrsAqeMUeRAcvT1TF-vaJUlWM442SCY2z4Qcwzs3wEWt6lLdDT-TyklbaivmyZu9DdhZd4oB8Tm2uV4fm-iQfW/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h7/Xv2UuZaah0n5Mn0_mcZUkzfFgncPpDp4lzAgt3NQbgs)

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Winter for Montana, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G2ymLkDHrjx60ZC15-UKIiNYkrVkE5q4WtlmSiEHa0K5MXs-_XOlUQjtnfrOL0P3OZjkZWC0HacBAQQF3nACb11Azs5M17EKzdOt5Nv8EE-bjO2tF8jc4Db1-26nPHGN1AXPa5EPUv8cK3bjkg2KjPTitIxM4ZTBH4wTH8MP9r7g0_l87U1kRfOIdJiPuaY8H/3gp/3tm-0MplRO2LX2MtxZQMxg/h9/WgVCtLLssphIugzS__xY-VKMMXeiO68MEXU_lf6Mhnk).

But now the Montana working people built is under attack. Billionaire out-of-staters and multinational corporations think they can make our home their own personal playground. I’m running for Congress not because I alone can fix these problems — but because I know we can if we work together. Together, we have no need to fear the fight against the corrupt interests that take advantage of our divisions. Together we can put outcomes ahead of ideology. Together we can bring back a Montana where we can live free, healthy, and prosperous lives. That’s why I’m running for Congress. Are you with me? We can be what we once were — a place that values good clean work, fair play, and equal opportunity. There are more of us than there are of them. Thank you for fighting for our home, Tom | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Winter for Montana, please .

Peter,

I’m not sure if I would have survived the 2015 train attack I helped to foil if not for the way in which my parents raised me: get dirty, don’t be afraid to be a little roughed up, and not to listen to folks who say that there is no place for masculinity in modern America.

For far too long Democrats have embraced alternative lifestyles at the expense of the traditional American family. I’m certainly not one to rally against individuals living their life outside the traditional nuclear unit, but it strikes me as odd that the government, when led by Democrats, is choosing to enact legislation that far too often leads would-be parents to reconsider growing their family.

**I recently joined Laura Ingraham to talk about the Left’s assault on masculinity in America and want to share the clip with you today in case you didn’t catch it live.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5bb263814202450baa21ce5c6baf44ef&_e=MAVfxFRVTnFT_TSxVVKwcNN_p1YDbXxl8tp1x9zHQI50h2Lomc6TfxVqR-TzLnTeOg2htwGzXxYjtE0LY6PqanAuM9vYMcMVibCzYAFr1FUFvG9NjMh6-SysdYzMe_A-AAkDvX8UPxph5ePTnMfI9l4UwX4HnY_zuaaip6Sl06-6idfQuMj13sUNhVsynZplH5elVtd9QbQnoMB0BPmpy5XR9lGcsT7F5UHH4_7XwZ1vmWPoY_aoPqDhe0UXBgasL_n_WG0oCidG98SZlZbjBa-AnjfgCrpnYNNud5vqTrU3PQGyVDsg4B3bhHiomjwn)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Franken?=
subject: why I’m running against Chuck Grassley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://helixcampaigns.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c572a416be67f7bfaa3f8dd8d&id=7c344977c0&e=b8263aaeab)
---
| | Hello, As a three-star admiral in the United States Navy, I had the honor of protecting our nation, our citizens, across the globe. Commanding a destroyer, participating in the majority of the operations since September 11th, to include leading U.S. forces in East Africa in the struggle against pirates, terrorists, and anarchy... I know what it means to serve our country. But after Donald Trump was elected, I retired from the U.S. Navy. If you don’t respect your boss, it is time to move on, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue such as Trump. **Now I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs, and we need stalwart Democrats bold enough to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, and rein in Wall Street.** Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, even though I’m a hard target having been raised in rural Iowa and dedicated my life to service. So I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue. We must expand our Senate majority. [**Please, may I count on you to join my campaign today with a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://helixcampaigns.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c572a416be67f7bfaa3f8dd8d&id=0d87d82fce&e=b8263aaeab) Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020 – and Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings are abysmal here. The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters think “it’s time for someone new.” **We can win this race, and we _must_ win it. Senate control is on the line here in Iowa.** After over 36 years in the Navy, twenty-plus moves, deployments galore, and service throughout the world, I am well prepared for the fight ahead. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to win. [**Please, if you’re able to, will you make a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford now and help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://helixcampaigns.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c572a416be67f7bfaa3f8dd8d&id=8225f5734f&e=b8263aaeab) I am grateful for your support. Thank you, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Biden admin will give BIG money to illegal border crossers?!?
body:
Are they insane?
---
| | | | | | Volume 15 | November 3, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Almost one-half a million dollars each, and some families will receive $1 million.

That's what the Biden Administration wants to pay those who crossed our border illegally during the Trump administration and were separated from their families in the process.

According to the Wall Street Journal, "The U.S. Departments of Justice, Homeland Security, and Health and Human Services are considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family, though the final numbers could shift, the people familiar with the matter said." In myriad cases, these families amount to one parent and one child, the Journal also said.

Like most insane Democrat ideas, it sounds so kind, so sweet. However, these people entered our country ILLEGALLY! The United States is not some magical money-tree that can endlessly bear the world's burdens. Nor should we!
Joe Biden and our entire elected leadership's duty is to put Americans first; to protect our national sovereignty and to make this a thriving nation with our children as beneficiaries.

These payments would come at a time when our national debt and deficit are climbing to extreme heights that put our own citizens at financial risk, not to mention imperiling our children's future. These payments are even greater than what a family member receives in insurance payments ($400k) if a soldier is killed in combat. That is unconscionable and I am outraged at this proposition.

Gas prices are up 40% from last year, home heating costs are expected to surge up to 50% more this winter and inflation is out of control; all a result of our radicalized government's ridiculous and destructive policies.

The radical Left is putting foreign invaders above its own citizens, and it will drive even more people to cross our borders against our laws. The madness we see in D.C. must stop. We cannot afford to fund every social cause at the expense of our own lives.

Please support me in stopping this insanity. Donate to our cause and put me in a position as US Senator to end these outrages.
|

That's what the Biden Administration wants to pay those who crossed our border illegally during the Trump administration and were separated from their families in the process. According to the Wall Street Journal, "The U.S. Departments of Justice, Homeland Security, and Health and Human Services are considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family, though the final numbers could shift, the people familiar with the matter said." In myriad cases, these families amount to one parent and one child, the Journal also said. Like most insane Democrat ideas, it sounds so kind, so sweet. However, these people entered our country ILLEGALLY! The United States is not some magical money-tree that can endlessly bear the world's burdens. Nor should we! Joe Biden and our entire elected leadership's duty is to put Americans first; to protect our national sovereignty and to make this a thriving nation with our children as beneficiaries. These payments would come at a time when our national debt and deficit are climbing to extreme heights that put our own citizens at financial risk, not to mention imperiling our children's future. These payments are even greater than what a family member receives in insurance payments ($400k) if a soldier is killed in combat. That is unconscionable and I am outraged at this proposition. Gas prices are up 40% from last year, home heating costs are expected to surge up to 50% more this winter and inflation is out of control; all a result of our radicalized government's ridiculous and destructive policies. The radical Left is putting foreign invaders above its own citizens, and it will drive even more people to cross our borders against our laws. The madness we see in D.C. must stop. We cannot afford to fund every social cause at the expense of our own lives. Please support me in stopping this insanity. subject: U.S. Risks Border Security by Granting High-Risk Foreign Truck Drivers Expedited Crossing
body:
The Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding America’s borders clears high-risk foreign truck drivers for expedited crossing under a free-trade agreement created to facilitate commercial traffic between Canada, Mexico, and the U.S., according to a federal probe that concludes the failure is “increasing border security risk.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | November 03, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57048&L=26198&F=H&)
---
# [U.S. Risks Border Security by Granting High-Risk Foreign Truck Drivers Expedited Crossing](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57048&L=26198&F=H&)
The Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding America’s borders clears high-risk foreign truck drivers for expedited crossing under a free-trade agreement created to facilitate commercial traffic between Canada, Mexico, and the U.S., according to a federal probe that concludes the failure is “increasing border security risk.” The troubling details are outlined in a 34-page report, issued by the Department of Homeland Security Inspector General with redactions to protect delicate information embedded in the original “law enforcement sensitive” version. The modified public document is distressing enough, even with the blacked-out nuggets involving candidates who do not qualify for the program but are nevertheless approved by Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the 60,000-employee agency created after 9/11 to protect the country from terrorists, narcotics, and illegal immigrants.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57048&L=26198&F=H&)
|

clean_body: The Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding America’s borders clears high-risk foreign truck drivers for expedited crossing under a free-trade agreement created to facilitate commercial traffic between Canada, Mexico, and the U.S., according to a federal probe that concludes the failure is “increasing border security risk.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | November 03, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = The Homeland Security agency charged with safeguarding America’s borders clears high-risk foreign truck drivers for expedited crossing under a free-trade agreement created to facilitate commercial traffic between Canada, Mexico, and the U.S., according to a federal probe that concludes the failure is “increasing border security risk.” The troubling details are outlined in a 34-page report, issued by the Department of Homeland Security Inspector General with redactions to protect delicate information embedded in the original “law enforcement sensitive” version. The modified public document is distressing enough, even with the blacked-out nuggets involving candidates who do not qualify for the program but are nevertheless approved by Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the 60,000-employee agency created after 9/11 to protect the country from terrorists, narcotics, and illegal immigrants. = | | | == RealClearInvestigations A Hillary Clinton campaign operation to plant a false rumor about Donald Trump setting up a “secret hotline” to Moscow through a Russian bank was much broader than known and involved multiple U.S. agencies, according to declassified documents and sources briefed on an ongoing criminal investigation of the scheme. == == The Daily Caller United States Park Police were warned as early as Dec. 2020 that there was potential for an uprising at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) was monitoring demonstrations leading up to the riots, newly released court documents have revealed. The documents were released in response to a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch in May, after U.S. Park Police previously denied a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request in March for all records related to the Jan. 6 insurrection. == = Fox News The city of Asheville, North Carolina, is facing a new lawsuit alleging that it violated the state and U.S. constitutions by designating a scholarship program for Black students. Announced on Wednesday, the civil rights lawsuit was filed by the conservative Judicial Watch (JW) and WNC Citizens for Equality Inc. The latter claims that at least three of its members who said they would apply for the city's scholarship if not for their race. = | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

name: Charles Booker
subject: We can’t back down now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Earlier today, I went down to Frankfort to make it official. Our campaign
has signed the paperwork to be on the ballot next November.

I’m sharing this because as I watched the election results come in last
night, I knew that this moment would be an inflection point for our
movement. The D.C. talking heads will tell you that a campaign like ours
can’t win. To pack it all up and go home. But these are the same people
that election after election tell us that we must subscribe to the same
conventional playbook that we know doesn’t work.

I am here to tell you that if we listen to them, we will lose.

But Peter, we’re not going down
that road. Because the workers on the picket line cannot afford for us to
quit fighting. The single mothers working 3 jobs do not have time for us
to concede to the cynicism. This is the moment when we change how
campaigns are run and who they work for, especially in disenfranchised
states like Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12605?refcode=em20211103-1140&t=1001&akid=1140%2E346206%2EntFqrS ]Charles signing paperwork to be on the ballot

We not only deserve new leadership; we need new leadership who actually
cares about regular people. Elected officials who have lived the struggle,
who know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, to choose between
affording rent or medication.

Our election is now one year away — and if we want to win, we need to
start mobilizing now. There’s lots coming down the pike — but we need your
support to make sure that as many Kentuckians as possible join our
movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12605?refcode=em20211103-1140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1140%2E346206%2EntFqrS ]So Peter, can I count on
you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today? Your
contribution will support our plans to grow our grassroots movement and
build the biggest voter outreach program in the history of Kentucky:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12613?refcode=em20211103-1140&t=1022&akid=1140%2E346206%2EntFqrS ]Contribute $5

I don’t take this moment lightly, and I want to thank you for all the
support y’all have shown me. Every dollar that you donate, every friend
you tell about our movement...it all makes a difference.

Thank you,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211103-1140-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1140_346206_ntFqrS&akid=1140%2E346206%2EntFqrS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1140%2E346206%2EntFqrS

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Sleepy Joe Biden will pay illegals $450k each!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Close the border! No bribes to illegals! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=41bab0ab15&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

When I visited the border, I saw first hand the tragedy that the Biden regime's disastrous immigration policies have wrought.

It's no joke. This is a catastrophe caused because Biden invited these illegals to come here with the promise of free stuff.

_Now he's wayyyyy upped the ante._

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c9944fdc47&e=afa21b7626), in the shadow of Disney World. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who wants to pay illegals!**

I never thought I'd see many of the things Biden has done already. The damage he has done to America has been devastating. But this is truly beyond the pale!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=97c0d94d57&e=afa21b7626)
---
| FOX News reports on this travesty:

_President Biden's administration is considering whether to make payments to immigrants who were separated from their families at the border under former President Trump's administration, according to a report from the Wall Street Journal.

The report, based on remarks from "people familiar with the matter," states that payments of "around $450,000 a person in compensation" could be issued to immigrants affected by Trump's zero-tolerance immigration policy in an effort "to resolve lawsuits filed on behalf of parents and children who say the government subjected them to lasting psychological trauma."

The Journal stated the Departments of Justice, Homeland Security and Health and Human Services are "considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family," though final payment amounts could change as some "families would likely get smaller payouts, depending on their circumstances."

"For perspective, if a service member is killed in action, their next of kin gets an insurance payment of $400,000," Crenshaw wrote. "Let that sink in."_

So that's it, huh? Illegals get $450,000 each- but veterans only get $400,000 for a life given in service to the country?

_**Joe Biden is a treasonous snake. He has no right doing this. **_

This is how we get thousands of illegals showing up on our doorstep. They were invited, bribed even, by Biden- who then lets them in, ignoring all U.S. immigration law.

_Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by Biden this year. He is literally trying to remake the American electorate by allowing this invasion._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ec6d9a9c41&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden has no idea what he's doing- and my Congressman wants to help him make these huge bribes to illegals.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and stop this invasion?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. We will take away his power to do damage. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f8a090ce79&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't stood up against a single bad idea Biden has had. He hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. He wants to pay illegals $450k apiece to break our laws!_

What is going on here!

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=180fc7ff2d&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=77e289bedd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2438641728&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=31ca344bca&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=de28ad4d08&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=a8f363ba1c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=a8f363ba1c).

name: Save Warnock (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: McConnell’s all-in on Walker: “Help us take back the Senate”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Mitch McConnell has thrown his full-throated support behind Herschel Walker— the ex-football player and longtime Trump-ally— in his campaign to oust Raphael Warnock from the Senate in Georgia. In 2020 McConnell's GOP SuperPACs funneled $20.6 million into attacks and lies against Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in Georgia. Now, he'll attempt to purge the 800,000 voters registered by Stacey Abrams. Mitch McConnell will spend unlimited amounts of money on this race because he knows that if he can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022— a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020— Raphael Warnock will lose his reelection, and the GOP will control the Senate again, reinstalling Mitch as Senate Majority leader. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. That's why protecting Raphael Warnock is our #1 priority. While hundreds of progressives have rushed to support us, we're up against both Mitch & Co's dark-money millions and a vast, deep, establishment Republican conspiracy. The only way we can flip the odds here, Peter, is if absolutely everybody steps in to protect Raphael Warnock in the electoral fight of his life. Please, the time to act is RIGHT NOW. Time and again YOU have stepped up BIG TIME, Peter. Remember 2020. We elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and won a historic razor-thin Senate Majority. We've got what it takes, but right now, with America's future hanging in the balance of the US Senate and Trump's confirmed return to politics, we need to know from you: Will you rush in $1, $5, $25, $100, or whatever you can spare right now? **[We're out of time, Peter: Please, we need you to take a moment right now and chip in whatever you can spare to protect Raphael Warnock, defend our fragile 50/50 Senate Majority, sideline Trump's hand-picked disaster artist, and FINALLY get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38274964/314718520/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211103_GEN_FDR_X&refcode2=NG211104&refcode3=ASCmdHJSkArdZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5OTk1NzJiLTAyM2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ypqEMtgxq9CJ6kfNOiaACnqK7MzYdzZKxtBwlxR9W6s=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Mitch McConnell has thrown his full-throated support behind Herschel Walker— the ex-football player and longtime Trump-ally— in his campaign to oust Raphael Warnock from the Senate in Georgia. In 2020 McConnell's GOP SuperPACs funneled $20.6 million into attacks and lies against Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in Georgia. Now, he'll attempt to purge the 800,000 voters registered by Stacey Abrams. Mitch McConnell will spend unlimited amounts of money on this race because he knows that if he can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022— a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020— Raphael Warnock will lose his reelection, and the GOP will control the Senate again, reinstalling Mitch as Senate Majority leader. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. That's why protecting Raphael Warnock is our #1 priority. While hundreds of progressives have rushed to support us, we're up against both Mitch & Co's dark-money millions and a vast, deep, establishment Republican conspiracy. The only way we can flip the odds here, Peter, is if absolutely everybody steps in to protect Raphael Warnock in the electoral fight of his life. Please, the time to act is RIGHT NOW. Time and again YOU have stepped up BIG TIME, Peter. Remember 2020. We elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and won a historic razor-thin Senate Majority. name: Cora for Montana
subject: Thank you!
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for joining Cora's campaign for Congress!

If you're ready to take the next step, here are three things you can do:

1\. Stay updated with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CoraForMontana/).
2\. Make a [grassroots contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cn-web-2022?refcode=signup-email-auto) to power our movement.
3\. Forward this email to a friends and let them know why you're supporting Cora's campaign.

We'll be in touch soon,

Team Cora
