name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Corporate Democrats love to blame progressives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Election Day was a tough blow for Democrats — most notably in Virginia,
where former Governor Terry McAuliffe lost to Republican businessman Glenn
Youngkin in a state that Joe Biden won by 10 points last November.

Even before Election Day, centrist Democrats blamed dwindling poll numbers
on the progressives who stood with the American people and refused to pass
the Republican-backed infrastructure bill without critical investments in
paid family leave, Medicare expansion, and more. Corporate Democrats have
no one to blame but themselves.

We’ve seen this play out before. When corporate Democrats lose elections,
they blame progressives. But it’s clear that Democrats have failed to meet
the urgency of this moment — and the American people are taking notice.

The Democratic Party establishment isn’t working anymore. Democrats have
lost elections in “blue states” and have failed to pass the President’s
agenda even with a majority in Congress. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81812?refcode=em20211103-20315&t=1021&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]Our progressive coalition in
Congress and candidates can be a force for much-needed change. Will you
donate $3 right now to elect progressives and transform the
Democratic Party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81812?refcode=em20211103-20315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]Chip in $3

For months, progressives in Congress have been fighting for necessary and
popular investments to expand the social safety net and invest in climate
action, but centrist Democrats — and the corporations that back them —
have gotten in the way.

Last night’s election highlights the urgency of getting big things done
and electing the diverse, working-class progressives who will deliver.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81812?refcode=em20211103-20315&t=1023&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]AOC, Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, and Justice Democrats are the future
of the Democratic Party. Give right now, whatever you can, to help us
elect more progressive champions to fight alongside the Squad. Every
dollar makes a significant impact since we rely on grassroots support.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81812?refcode=em20211103-20315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]Chip in $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211103-20315-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20315_1203867_Scnu7x&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20315%2E1203867%2EScnu7x

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Fighting the climate crisis at our door
body:
As Governor, I'll use my experience to hit the ground running on day one to combat climate change. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFfMNCSpAmV_A_QOxzopOUPDZRF1LjAXTmY830zpKgtjD40fuHb7nYUJz-74zynZ_eXlcqgAiTByQpapbD0Eqgcc_n307IHcGOynTkV5D6DbrJiIRVKYaQtGFoJOx4mh2ZM8w3IJKLHSDCIbl7VmaFhY9dMIhP0YZVHSEhE8x9KiRfmwBwpH8XgPorcOahgf7cOjMimSVlJZQhTRmcCdk9nqMHXQOf08GrffGVRFd5mgxo5PUPsZ1wgHfQu5LuaBlGpLbjl5T2QiuUoMPHVObBQm_bI0UMyi8ULXykmvGm8-Ba39AcEEaVtxPWN91kszyPVRsWBae5PyUuyt9PI9WY5QCeim7sZDv_TNnWsXpKF1/3gp/zCjEUKQ_RcCn2GUkb9fK2w/h0/ToMmCETrr_Ykc7KwNNsGSn48z0-pUgxanB-ZO0_EVQk)
---
Hi friends,
---
Earlier this week, I had the opportunity to discuss the pressing issue of climate change with my fellow Democratic candidates for Governor in a forum hosted by Climate-XChange Maryland.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFfMNCSpAmV_A_QOxzopOUPDZRF1LjAXTmY830zpKgtjD40fuHb7nYUJz-74zynZ_eXlcqgAiTByQpapbD0Eqgcc_n307IHcGOynTkV5D6DbrJiIRVKYaQtGFoJOx4mh2ZM8w3IJKLHSDCIbl7VmaFhY9dMIhP0YZVHSEhE8x9KiB6bv4Yj0Ooyp8bgyq7iInd2D055ptZ33j1SD2A7oCDNpp4LD0ZO3ubAc_jTl7AkZiZ1NrAJKkmYXsEcyE2Z9Zg-SzhktuU2T_jZEei4SE6ipPNDWFAdnEMOaquQfO7ZFZQgynye78Hk0Yn3uj7Xdr-Qawv6EUrb6sTOlf8-7LOmcBCLxx1QQZ3n1vDacXBnB/3gp/zCjEUKQ_RcCn2GUkb9fK2w/h1/X7Uai6aDWxHSTMsdAEeDBA8ZTvPrE-8-GkeJppJaML4)
---
** 'A Moment of Incredible Opportunity': ** **Dem Candidates for Governor Talk Climate**
---
[ **READ THE ARTICLE ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFfMNCSpAmV_A_QOxzopOUPDZRF1LjAXTmY830zpKgtjD40fuHb7nYUJz-74zynZ_eXlcqgAiTByQpapbD0Eqgcc_n307IHcGOynTkV5D6DbrJiIRVKYaQtGFoJOx4mh2ZM8w3IJKLHSDCIbl7VmaFhY9dMIhP0YZVHSEhE8x9KifLxvsJL_XRSJUpjOtO9je97J1eDYnQEU7qrqlSdlwEXFgCiQ5OhMnc9cs87o27y5b7rHGAeUoWFWVK4V30jKppb0TBkpE1CJ4_IGS2BY2J9seCdTHqoc9eVBZ-wlZJLGtIeqwaK5rY99aatUvaUlo8Gh6SWGP8Z_Ewc5LVR9649HvYioqbfvfO7h4zU9yCaZ/3gp/zCjEUKQ_RcCn2GUkb9fK2w/h2/nYTVGiTxRDDr-OYzpXjS_2iOKArF-kVQ0fenmRehxSA)
---
Last weekend's torrential flooding was another reminder that the effects of climate change are already at our doorstep. **Maryland needs a leader willing and able to bring about meaningful solutions on climate for our environment, economy, and well-being for generations to come.** My track record on climate issues speaks for itself. As Attorney General, I worked to fight climate change and protect our local environment by:
* Securing the largest environmental settlement from an electric power company in American history;
* Obtaining the largest civil penalty ever paid to the Maryland Department of Energy from ExxonMobil;
* Leading a 5-state effort to clean up the Chesapeake Bay; and
* Winning settlements that require the elimination of at least 813,000 tons of pollution from our state's skies every year.

As Governor, I'll use my experience to hit the ground running on day one with over 30 bold strategies for continuing to combat this existential threat in my _**[Green Maryland](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vU0oIKHN0m1DDk6npYG3DVzJLZtOYQdSzaqSzADB06oFZW9LVWqK13xJ8pX4pwfFdxEeEwf5_OSRN-YWw2PLi9anabVgjy9uS5QppporJU1W23fUB68x-ui3UM5nhRIcbfP5u1QZa2GWYGS5IU-e1sG88sLuLLGthXcXMGRkrLO0Q-exU0XnksKHhkykHvjqAsPjgeGWjQP_IzB0x96YqoiYqHr7btnAHduM58jQnmXNP2bV7uQU4cqAkr51wOQyw/3gp/zCjEUKQ_RcCn2GUkb9fK2w/h3/CFrE_u6xjFVYrN4WpTEPrvfR5MZW__HwEDFEs6tFfuk)**_ agenda. **It's time to work together to make Maryland the national leader on climate and build a more sustainable future for our state. I hope you'll join me in the fight.** Thank you, Doug
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuhPsrh4Pw37wsAmeFduv_9BSeNY2zs2075Wz390iFmycZMbWAvxyIE9tvLpo9Gu0LEeC9brWEPHB_tVD8U6-wDa1SFBwT-yxmpKCC9tLRuiCAmzp-yd6iKn8E9Ihwrc67MOskvUSe5ryDtPCI-UZX8vWEiA5vfLn93B8LC3x8qVO262qfjJ2pTIShG3y0H8RjRFSDIVBz8y92U-hYdRc4Rgh9qVQBUaS1gSQql6I_aKMuHyo_pfqhk2CGR4aK3ccA5iurBICCTcoKY_tSICJF7uwx2krtfUvXjzBhl0ykvQ6YiHVhSfkjyS9OCTQb_PxyA/3gp/zCjEUKQ_RcCn2GUkb9fK2w/h4/VH3u8AWFWTD73UI2bafFh_o2U6G9XEaOd1AtfuXqamk)

body:
This could lead to more guns in public—not just in New York, but around the country.
#

Friends,
Earlier today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case about New York’s permit requirements for carrying concealed firearms. **If the Court strikes down the law, it could lead to more guns in public—not just in New York, but around the country.**
By seeking to invalidate New York’s law, the gun lobby is also attempting to weaken other gun laws around the country. But here’s the deal: gun safety laws have been deemed perfectly constitutional, time and time again.
We’re doing everything we can to limit any damage the Supreme Court could do, so in September, we filed an amicus brief in the case defending the current law. And to ensure our efforts can continue, we need to ask:
[**Can you make a contribution now to fuel our fight against the gun lobby's attempts to eradicate gun safety laws? We’re counting on your support. Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1181_3935704_qSsEvX&akid=1181%2E3935704%2EqSsEvX)

The NRA simply wants more guns in more hands in more places. They believe the Second Amendment means anyone can carry any weapon, whenever and wherever they want to. But Second Amendment rights (like all rights) have always come with reasonable limits in the interest of public safety.
This timing isn’t coincidental, either. Nine years ago the Second Circuit upheld this exact law. The only thing that’s changed since then is the makeup of the Supreme Court. Which was their plan all along...
The NRA has been making illegal campaign contributions to ultra-right wing candidates for _years_ in an effort to stack the Supreme Court with pro-gun justices who will endorse whatever extreme gun policies that the gun lobby wants. _This is the corruption we’re up against._
We’re already suing the NRA for their illegal actions — and now, we’ve filed an amicus brief in this Supreme Court case so we can continue to protect Americans. But we can’t do all this alone — [**and we guarantee your donation will go directly towards the fight to save lives and stop the NRA from putting profits over the lives of innocent people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211103-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=1181_3935704_qSsEvX&akid=1181%2E3935704%2EqSsEvX)

clean_body: This could lead to more guns in public—not just in New York, but around the country. Friends, Earlier today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a case about New York’s permit requirements for carrying concealed firearms. If the Court strikes down the law, it could lead to more guns in public—not just in New York, but around the country. By seeking to invalidate New York’s law, the gun lobby is also attempting to weaken other gun laws around the country. But here’s the deal: gun safety laws have been deemed perfectly constitutional, time and time again. We’re doing everything we can to limit any damage the Supreme Court could do, so in September, we filed an amicus brief in the case defending the current law. name: Team AOC
subject: AOC: There isn’t a “labor shortage”. There’s a dignified job shortage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC hit us with some facts about the so-called “labor shortage”.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211103-2632-header&t=1&akid=2632%2E2526796%2Ebf8g9s)
_“Imagine you go into a store, and you see a shirt you’d like to purchase. You ask the shopkeeper how much it is, and they say it’s $5. You say, I don’t have $5, I have $1. Can you sell it to me for $1?_
_Of course the shopkeeper says, no, I’m sorry but I can’t sell that shirt for less than $5. That $5 helps cover my basic essentials to continue running my business._
_Do we say that there’s a t-shirt shortage? No. Then why do we treat wages like that? Why are we calling this a ‘labor shortage’? I think it is a dignified job shortage.”_
That’s how Alexandria started her latest Instagram stories series to help break down some of the false “labor shortage” claims that corporate politicians are using to further whittle down the Build Back Better Act.
Then she hit us with some hard facts about the so-called “labor shortage”:
The sectors hardest hit by this “labor shortage” are those that have historically relied on women, people of color, and low-income workers. These include retail, food service, caregiving, teaching, and home health care aids.
We are in the midst of a pandemic that has claimed the lives of over 700,000 Americans and conservatives act like that has nothing to do with the shortage of people that are available to work. On top of that, women, especially, have been pushed out of the workforce by the thousands.
This is what happens when we don’t have health care or childcare. And the irony is that a lot of the folks claiming a “labor shortage” are the same ones claiming that investing in universal pre-k, childcare, and paid leave is irresponsible for the economy.
What’s irresponsible is leaving our communities to pick up the pieces of our economy without the proper support, and then blaming them for not working low-wage jobs with bad benefits.
**We need a real investment in our care economy and human infrastructure. And Alexandria is fighting right now to get these transformative programs and policies included and passed in the Build Back Better Act.**
[But it will take a movement so large and powerful to win the wages and protections that workers deserve. If you want to help grow this movement and believe it’s time to pass transformative investments in our human infrastructure, can you make a $3 investment in our movement now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211103?refcode=em20211103-2632-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2632_2526796_bf8g9s&akid=2632%2E2526796%2Ebf8g9s)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211103?refcode=em20211103-2632-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2632_2526796_bf8g9s&akid=2632%2E2526796%2Ebf8g9s)**
Right now is our biggest opportunity to make transformative investments in our human infrastructure. We can accomplish this and we must.
Thank you for your support today,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211103?refcode=em20211103-2632-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=22&refcode2=2632_2526796_bf8g9s&akid=2632%2E2526796%2Ebf8g9s)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211103-2632-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=23&akid=2632%2E2526796%2Ebf8g9s)**
---|---

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

You ask the shopkeeper how much it is, and they say it’s $5. You say, I don’t have $5, I have $1. Can you sell it to me for $1? Of course the shopkeeper says, no, I’m sorry but I can’t sell that shirt for less than $5. That $5 helps cover my basic essentials to continue running my business. Do we say that there’s a t-shirt shortage? No. Then why do we treat wages like that? Why are we calling this a ‘labor shortage’? This historic moment calls to mind the Tea Party surge of 2010, Friend. Battleground state by battleground state, we have the opportunity to dismantle the Democrats’ electoral path for years to come. That’s why on the heels of this great victory in Virginia, I’m counting on YOUR critical support to help me seize the momentum and TAKE THE LEAD in our fight to flip Wisconsin. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Re: Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
If there was ever a time to support Erica, it’s right now.
#
**Last night in Virginia, we saw firsthand the political headwinds our movement is up against.**
One political analyst even said that last night’s results reflected a political environment where Republicans could “comfortably” take back both the House and Senate in 2022.
**It’s clear: The “same old, same old” isn’t going to cut in anymore.**
We must nominate candidates who reflect the diversity of our party. We must fight for progressive policies that create opportunities for working families across North Carolina and this country. And we must organize in urban _and_ rural areas, fight for every single vote, and write no one-off.
[**The 2022 midterms are *only* one year away. Will you contribute $5 (or any amount) to make an immediate impact on sending Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate and protecting our razor-thin Democratic majority?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25042?refcode=em20211103-607&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=607%2E3698%2E94tq91)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25042?refcode=em20211103-607&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=607%2E3698%2E94tq91)**
**Despite last night’s results, change is possible in North Carolina.**
_The Cook Political Report_ named North Carolina as just one of three toss-up Senate races in the country. And CNN ranked this open Senate seat as one of Democrats’ best chances to expand our Senate majority.
**But in order to win and send Erica — a progressive, working-class, Black woman — to the U.S. Senate, we can’t waste a single second.** We have to ramp up our organizing efforts and unite the largest diverse, working-class coalition North Carolina has ever seen behind our bold platform for progress.
**So, if there was ever a time to support Erica, it’s right now. That’s why we’re asking:**[**Can Erica count on you to make your first contribution today to help us build a grassroots campaign powerful enough to stand up to the GOP and win next November?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25042?refcode=em20211103-607&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=607%2E3698%2E94tq91)
Thank you for being part of this. We can’t do it without you.
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211103-607-footer&t=22&refcode2=607_3698_94tq91&akid=607%2E3698%2E94tq91)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: AG of AZ Launches Investigation!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
It's happening! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a389c81079&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Big news on the Election Integrity Front:

**Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich just launched a formal investigation into what transpired in the fraud of the 2020 election!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2bc95c5c79&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Roger Geisler, a special agent, interrogated Adrian Fontes._

**Adrian Fontes, who is now running for Secretary of State to permanently secure Democrat control of our elections, served as the County Recorder for Maricopa in the 2020 election.**

The County Recorder’s principal responsibilities include keeping public records and overseeing voter registration and early voting. In other words, if you are wondering where the buck stops when it comes to election integrity in Maricopa, look no further.

_And I am glad to write to you today that our Attorney General is taking the evidence seriously, opening criminal investigations. Clearly, the allegations are not baseless as the Marxist media would have you believe._

**[And that is why I am writing you today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3bee56e16c&e=44b8c466b0) We cannot let AG Brnovich think this is enough. If he stops here, then it will be a case of _too little, too late_.**

We must pressure Brnovich to continue to do his job and prosecute those responsible for the fraud in 2020. And we cannot stop until every one of these perpetrators is brought to justice.

_[Donate today to help us keep up the pressure on AG Brnovich’s office to make sure that the perpetrators of election fraud are brought to justice and Adrian Fontes is held responsible for the fraud perpetrated under his purview!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a3e2d16bb2&e=44b8c466b0)_

**_“I will take all necessary actions that are supported by the evidence and where I have legal authority. Arizonans deserve to have their votes accurately counted and protected.” – Mark Brnovich_**
And we must hold AG Brnovich to his promise! He MUST press forward until every wrongdoer has been brought to justice. Anything less is a _disgrace to democracy._
**The fight for Election Integrity is long, hard, and essential. Every day we are fighting against media, political, and legal attacks.**

_The radical Left and the thieves behind the steal of the 2020 election have been doing everything they can to hide their misdeeds. [And if we don’t make sure they don’t do it again, who will?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=10e3fb4857&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[This is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4766573ced&e=44b8c466b0)**

After we audited Maricopa, we saw that there was obscene levels of fraud – more than enough to overturn the election, and those involved needed to be brought to justice. **And now AG Mark Brnovich is beginning the investigation.**

_We are pushing for nationwide audits to uncover the severity of the fraud while also pushing forward to Pima._

**Our approach has been and continues to be systematic, aggressive, and thorough. And we won’t stop until all the perpetrators of fraud are in prison and our Democracy is secure once again. [And I must ask you for help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=450a34b9ad&e=44b8c466b0)**

**I desperately need your help in my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona. The constant political, legal, and media attacks are draining my campaign. [To keep up the good fight, I need a rush donation of $25, $50, or $100 tonight. Can you help?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4082daa44&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0165765dcd&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=17b14fb74c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73c56991b1&e=44b8c466b0).

clean_body: It's happening! | | | | | Dear , Big news on the Election Integrity Front: Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich just launched a formal investigation into what transpired in the fraud of the 2020 election! | | Roger Geisler, a special agent, interrogated Adrian Fontes. Adrian Fontes, who is now running for Secretary of State to permanently secure Democrat control of our elections, served as the County Recorder for Maricopa in the 2020 election. The County Recorder’s principal responsibilities include keeping public records and overseeing voter registration and early voting. In other words, if you are wondering where the buck stops when it comes to election integrity in Maricopa, look no further. And I am glad to write to you today that our Attorney General is taking the evidence seriously, opening criminal investigations. Clearly, the allegations are not baseless as the Marxist media would have you believe. We cannot let AG Brnovich think this is enough. If he stops here, then it will be a case of too little, too late. We must pressure Brnovich to continue to do his job and prosecute those responsible for the fraud in 2020. And we cannot stop until every one of these perpetrators is brought to justice. “I will take all necessary actions that are supported by the evidence and where I have legal authority. Arizonans deserve to have their votes accurately counted and protected.” – Mark Brnovich And we must hold AG Brnovich to his promise! He MUST press forward until every wrongdoer has been brought to justice. Anything less is a disgrace to democracy. The fight for Election Integrity is long, hard, and essential. Every day we are fighting against media, political, and legal attacks. The radical Left and the thieves behind the steal of the 2020 election have been doing everything they can to hide their misdeeds. After we audited Maricopa, we saw that there was obscene levels of fraud – more than enough to overturn the election, and those involved needed to be brought to justice. And now AG Mark Brnovich is beginning the investigation. We are pushing for nationwide audits to uncover the severity of the fraud while also pushing forward to Pima. Our approach has been and continues to be systematic, aggressive, and thorough. And we won’t stop until all the perpetrators of fraud are in prison and our Democracy is secure once again. I desperately need your help in my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona. The constant political, legal, and media attacks are draining my campaign. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. body:
Now that the 2021 Election season is over, its time to focus on 2022.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ewZltIWSBOkHV5Qv7K59JygXFK17BRS5GrjGmnfOpgudqWjAAOLIXr5Sxnx1znLOpQJB8Jnieo2ohcG68VGnlPc4gF0jfHvAqGcvFId1AWvC33dN289aZuue4nelbu89Wd9YlL2VMzCn8xFKxOauGtWQ8Vvd4LPjrG3MP6yVWIxRe4VXSxcAZ2k6tVi6INJl&c=ONMn2p8hoLgrVQ9v-kW2Z4o-zTrGbNPiTrOkTS3XFDw_7nN0Wcw2AA==&ch=MV6wvxktHO0X31kb0FC7t28ByVVqxyMFYUMH7ajuKD7V7XrxMZCbEg==)

---
| Fellow American, Yesterday was election day in America and the results were astounding! Glenn Youngkin beat insurmountable odds and opposition from the radical left and rinos that wanted to see him fail, becoming the Governor-Elect of the commonwealth of Virginia.
In New Jersey, we almost took back the governor's mansion, NEW JERSEY! A deep blue state that no one expected to swing our direction.
Here in Colorado, we elected conservatives to our school boards, city councils, mayoral offices, and more. We stopped radical propositions that would forever damage the fabric of our state and we showed the radical left that we are here fighting to take our state back.
Now, it is time to keep our eyes on the prize which is 2022. Kamala Harris said it best, "What happens in Virginia will in large part determine what happens In 2022, 2024, and on." Virginia flipped red and Colorado is next.
The time to step up and support our campaign for 2022 is now. Just today the NRCC announced they will be targeting Ed Perlmutter with ads because they too know and believe we can beat him this year and that we can take back CD7.
Now that the congressional district lines are final, we can be confident in our strategy to take back this seat. However, that strategy depends on the continued financial support from people like you.
I'm not asking for much, but if every person on this email list gave just $25 recurring each month or even just once we can make sure that Ed Perlmutter doesn't see a 9th term.
I am asking every one of you to please, donate $25 today, not tomorrow, or the next time I email. TODAY!
Click one of the donation options below to get started on your contribution.

I know that everyone is wanting your support right now, but none of those people are fighting to take back the house like I am. I am asking you this month to answer my call and donate to my campaign today.
I want to remind you that every penny that is donated goes directly to the mission of taking back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022.
This money does not go to me, this money goes to the mission of saving this state so that we can have election integrity, secure borders, lower gas prices, no more inflation, our parental rights restored, and accountability in our government again.
If the rino GOP Establishment in Colorado and Washington, DC had their way, they would replace me with another whitewashed rino republican that doesn't support the America First message that resonates so loudly with the people of Colorado and everyday Americans.
It is time to show the establishment, just like Glenn Youngkin and President Trump did, that we the people are sick of retail politicians, we are ready for change, and that is what I bring to this race.
I know I can count on you to step up today Friend.
Sincerely,

If you live in Nampa, Idaho - I need your help.

(I'd love to hear from you in fact)

So, if you have 3 minutes... can you [click here and let me know what you think of the state of the city](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9c176cdd3e&e=dea908e0fe "Nampa?")?

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** I'll be running for state legislature for one of the Nampa seats... once the redistricting process is done, I'll let you know which one.

Friends,

I’m writing this email in a true state of fear and shame. Fear for the safety of our cities and shame over the leadership our country has chosen.

I’m ashamed by the way Chicago police officers are being treated. **So I want them to know Indiana’s arms are wide open.**

Over **3,000** Chicago police officers are defying the city’s vaccine mandate. I honor the defiance of this blatant government overreach.

_**[Absolutely NOBODY should be fired for refusing to comply with the vaccine mandate. Chip in here if you agree.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=938d67ac399c4e55bc314983bb4cd19b&_e=WUsvv7kPcxNVVjaYkC8b0zasIRyZcmUEJvHcYC8l_9PKMxLG7UQXqlH_Cohp1zlYrdwfu82X6wqCHoKFOFdb1fCVLRvLOgbOwiihLMUOIri7clqBTZw6aIPQpaSCsTvkQkG1vj3A9JgF-IFlP4bfP-7wIS8cW3qwhCpe8Z0ue6ZTp8CKX8tDAAeyRDzokCZGx7m7BOfQmF_W_2AYyZAaYAl1E_hsFG_GaVR-cVPr3eqfADVtgDUouMAn2DCgg7YsUmjTXhI5nRMAWTjKO_FLrs64FHpd8Ua0_TQQgMh4zNxgbzeIQ1VREXOFotgJwL78BMnXRwlDiTrXnXpuy4qdCMl4GJ8JqQKVg-eMslxTUHupTbAZZPGBQlqnfWYLsMYXjV4Heiv38iH78djtajnJW0pqTFkK9_cgXhYtnR4eCSg7SS1tH7DuWqkbio_qcyY4yhdbd_R_VyJ9JOm8P4hQW80VnLQQuwZ-HTpxcvU5XNI%3D)**_ | | [**I WILL ALWAYS DEFEND THE POLICE**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=938d67ac399c4e55bc314983bb4cd19b&_e=WUsvv7kPcxNVVjaYkC8b0zasIRyZcmUEJvHcYC8l_9PKMxLG7UQXqlH_Cohp1zlYrdwfu82X6wqCHoKFOFdb1fCVLRvLOgbOwiihLMUOIri7clqBTZw6aIPQpaSCsTvkQkG1vj3A9JgF-IFlP4bfP-7wIS8cW3qwhCpe8Z0ue6ZTp8CKX8tDAAeyRDzokCZGx7m7BOfQmF_W_2AYyZAaYAl1E_hsFG_GaVR-cVPr3eqfADVtgDUouMAn2DCgg7YsUmjTXhI5nRMAWTjKO_FLrsGCzQ7-HSO08Zsxjx3VNL5fukKsMDA8wIEfc-_BWRM6UQuLzJzXfDLRugpmFJRRqzJi93BPu2LofmYcd5XROUfZ2OLI1aXm5OyFWZebh17lZZXqyEWI4IOi_vE0gjhHQgX3jBjJ1HOvAtA8DFFLuvKlJ6Y6lgrvJcOCXPSkvU2Ll1x6bxLEgN6uL2Cd43lMd7oGd20lZ3N5jyeXJdLZITc%3D)

**Our police do the hardest job in the world, and they deserve respect** — not losing their pay or being fired for refusing to comply with a ridiculous vaccine mandate.

I know you’ll agree when I say these officers have a **brighter future right over the border.**

**Indiana will ALWAYS defend our men and women in blue.**

**The Woke, radical mob that runs Chicago is 100% to blame for this dramatic assault on police.**

America the Free is in jeopardy -- we need to put our officers first. We need to put _America first._

God Bless,

Mike Braun

body:
Peter, **_Last night was a MASSIVE win for conservatives._** But make no mistake -- the fight is far from over. Here’s what’s on the line in 2022:
* The American Dream staying alive in our schools and the rights of parents to be involved in their children’s education.
* The future of our brave law enforcement officers against the Defund the Police movement.
* The security of our Southern border in the face of massive caravans of illegal immigrants.

Last night was an amazing and **encouraging** sign of what’s to come next November in the midterm elections if we **keep up the important work of supporting conservative, America First** candidates. I believe we WILL see an unprecedented **RED** wave next year. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: We need to keep up the momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
What we’ve seen across the east coast the last 24 hours has been monumental.... The nation watched in awe last night as Glenn Youngkin defeated former Peter, What we’ve seen across the east coast the last 24 hours has been monumental.... And Peter, I need you to hear it directly from me: **This is entirely possible right here in PA-07,** but I need your help in order to get there. Basically, they’re anti-basic necessities and anti-making America a decent place to live. Matt Rosendale, is no exception. Matt just voted no on a bill in Congress that would’ve allowed for necessary improvements to the framework and infrastructure of Montana, including improved conditions for rural communities that often lack modern amenities, many of which are Native communities. subject: Urgent news from Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
It is my great pleasure to congratulate Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin .....

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youngkin_email&n=1)
---

| MAGA Nation! It is my great pleasure to congratulate Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin on his recent victory in the Virginia Governor’s race. Despite Virginia being a “blue” state for the past several years, Glenn Youngkin has shown that victory does not require compromise. This race proved that American values WON and let me tell you, the Socialist Democrats are BESIDE themselves. The thing that was the most incredible about this race was that every time voters realized Glenn Youngkin was endorsed by President Trump, he INSTANTLY shot up in the polls. The Democrats could not understand this and they cried about it to their supporters in fundraising emails but it shows just how important it is to have an endorsement from President Trump. Patriots know that President Trump loves America and that he only endorses those who put America First. That is why I am so honored to have his support in my race for Senate. Did you see his most recent comment on my new poll? [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkmTkkjvBQXRVAOz84Gs1SwDSkWB_YFMzTPcBtIUiFngg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youngkin_email&n=2) Like Glenn Youngkin, when voters know I am endorsed by President Trump, I gain at least 17 points in the polls. This is INCREDIBLE! For this reason, I have made it a special goal to raise funds to make people aware that I have President Trump’s **full** endorsement. clean_body: It is my great pleasure to congratulate Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin ..... | | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book. | MAGA Nation! It is my great pleasure to congratulate Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin on his recent victory in the Virginia Governor’s race. Despite Virginia being a “blue” state for the past several years, Glenn Youngkin has shown that victory does not require compromise. This race proved that American values WON and let me tell you, the Socialist Democrats are BESIDE themselves. The thing that was the most incredible about this race was that every time voters realized Glenn Youngkin was endorsed by President Trump, he INSTANTLY shot up in the polls. The Democrats could not understand this and they cried about it to their supporters in fundraising emails but it shows just how important it is to have an endorsement from President Trump. Patriots know that President Trump loves America and that he only endorses those who put America First. That is why I am so honored to have his support in my race for Senate. Did you see his most recent comment on my new poll? Like Glenn Youngkin, when voters know I am endorsed by President Trump, I gain at least 17 points in the polls. This is INCREDIBLE! For this reason, I have made it a special goal to raise funds to make people aware that I have President Trump’s full endorsement. This will be critical to winning the Senate seat in Alabama. Making America Great Again, Mo Brooks

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
Last night the citizens of Helena really stepped up. I cannot thank you enough for participating in the democratic process and once again putting your | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=caeed338882a44d7a48a16f66739d703&_e=Q7MF3xF-Yq0HR0xoOE7c4nNUPNaDC7Iy_DYf_h-uXQwIRWcjQwb3WyFZtUU9dRs_96peOm-kgWcR5CdihHBOaIual4cC1w8aTKGQQcLz6m5jDiyFZ363WQmjTP-rr4_4Mc-IyMpiFZhBnD_TWX1VPdPJ14IDb4cczeWy-_ENzGoYNn85bzCIGUWybuuToz7ptsLX2JPqiX3XSD-SdPZqRVsDEK_Ci3P1lDLRpBp-LBGO2Pf_Fa_1nbY8xwYuVZ6pZaKgzyzH_90z0nC_l9GlIriZ9GxRSmI0k4ih52wrDCg35IRYXJ_JdSgcN5yy97vtgjIqsfyNriV7K02UJ2YsrZ_xAqczeXHLG_841imBAyohgy6fbbrOBJdE3ItIOYz2omL7n32qcKfjhbajrUJ4tEMZgLHv4vNuBMRVjQlp0yo5HTSO8rJJnnaCvvNjIvD6LayR8VQ6_4n1TlhpfCEx2kbStdmdTq_vr406CKGkYq8%3D) Hey friend, Last night the citizens of Helena really stepped up. I cannot thank you enough for participating in the democratic process and once again putting your faith in me. I truly could not have done it without you and your constant support throughout my campaign. I am honored to have been chosen to serve Helena for the next four years and I intend to continue to work hard for our wonderful city each and every day. Going forward I hope to focus on improving city streets and services. I will also pay special attention to the issues of affordable housing and homelessness. It is my goal to find solutions to these problems and continue to improve our community. With all of us in this together, I know we can make a difference. It has been an incredible journey being your mayor for the past four years and I want to thank you, and everyone who voted for me, for entrusting me with your city for another four years. While this election may be over, there is still plenty of work to get done and I am ready to dive in. Thank you, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

subject: What yesterday’s elections mean for us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fef3998f3855409f92c3ed78fe330dd3&_e=gz_GL1K1yNefzVU8MRxZX4zD5ZUy2IkVHIEkhlIDFCO5kxe-AV8bqVAIqFc2OjeR1FYMPlK2tOn3RcfjhJPMbufYw3XB_LTlcTgBTWhyKccTy2ql6ldA_Ar33-rjdnegvyuam9FVifVHBKAmxY_qM1IzbUW4Vn8abLxUYMMLOJv2e3yO7mMySQVRU1JrGnHEv5ugEKXJqzh3ocbY7Vc9OdAQhxduYOdB5vrwaNziiDOqSkStVmA83kquYDOdiTd6GRZoposi-YUHRIliyGS97vJDfwkV3T8m_UEu5zjnJPzMC4OL0yr5vPwBxD3xrEubx749G9mrHjkTdZWxuPs6Rj_7WOTgfjQznHYh3Il4A0Hwv19fFgFryOS6Gr_1BEa64snbyDxXJzhITVd7MvCSUeoxbHGvfr8vivpZD4xX1fCWIMyjAHpHw05gVmAnzcjgZDT2DhhJwDP3tFmXd_eSxQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative - These headlines say it all.

Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough.

They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy.

Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. _**We have the momentum to win in just over a year!**_

Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia:

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fef3998f3855409f92c3ed78fe330dd3&_e=gz_GL1K1yNefzVU8MRxZX4zD5ZUy2IkVHIEkhlIDFCO5kxe-AV8bqVAIqFc2OjeR1FYMPlK2tOn3RcfjhJPMbufYw3XB_LTlcTgBTWhyKccTy2ql6ldA_Ar33-rjdnegvyuam9FVifVHBKAmxY_qM1IzbUW4Vn8abLxUYMMLOJv2e3yO7mMySQVRU1JrGnHEv5ugEKXJqzh3ocbY7Vc9OdAQhxduYOdB5vrwaNziiDOqSkStVmA83kquYDOdiTd6VfdkwuY9p9o0fOddL7QljWKJj46ao2XDfT6oS7nwdp8O4SUdMeg0mw9ADqNE9bDIuQQA59n5hbOjnmhQURGaUnjX9_5rHwOQ7ainc1t8UKE_7adUvJZCCmiJLRW4YhcAeSqjCBjrrMyhX-apCBvytofah_qnwb5sba_Wmxa8dVsHlu7N4harm1Tf9j8rdI-jAHdtRw5_bUArU0FZlAdCeg%3D%3D)
But Fellow Conservative, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months.

If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you help us keep up the momentum? Please consider donating $5, $10, $34 or whatever you can send today to help us continue building our grassroots army in Georgia!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fef3998f3855409f92c3ed78fe330dd3&_e=gz_GL1K1yNefzVU8MRxZX4zD5ZUy2IkVHIEkhlIDFCO5kxe-AV8bqVAIqFc2OjeR1FYMPlK2tOn3RcfjhJPMbufYw3XB_LTlcTgBTWhyKccTy2ql6ldA_Ar33-rjdnegvyuam9FVifVHBKAmxY_qM1IzbUW4Vn8abLxUYMMLOJv2e3yO7mMySQVRU1JrGnHEv5ugEKXJqzh3ocbY7Vc9OdAQhxduYOdB5vrwaNziiDOqSkStVmA83kquYDOdiTd6_ZSKB3VGIr4pzlPcfdWF_TatDBxAAp3SwOO4ipX3nN-d0Tl6zWWYqQQBhiU02arFP50MpU7mE4tHxY8i2DvVX_ZdejajDNkxI9g3eL0J6K1afDSso2QyMnFwCz1uiwoAN1DioHDdMFCiu1dXTEerQkjf16siAoKPz1SmvQp3RIGEs0U0tjs2jclrRNE0r8ZE1ErmIepkt5_f9_3vnQBwGA%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fef3998f3855409f92c3ed78fe330dd3&_e=gz_GL1K1yNefzVU8MRxZX4zD5ZUy2IkVHIEkhlIDFCO5kxe-AV8bqVAIqFc2OjeR1FYMPlK2tOn3RcfjhJPMbufYw3XB_LTlcTgBTWhyKccTy2ql6ldA_Ar33-rjdnegvyuam9FVifVHBKAmxY_qM1IzbUW4Vn8abLxUYMMLOJv2e3yO7mMySQVRU1JrGnHEv5ugEKXJqzh3ocbY7Vc9OdAQhxduYOdB5vrwaNziiDOqSkStVmA83kquYDOdiTd68rVhwX4hvJZzbcaspzr0fF_O-J6ydJCtVM9wyY6gQclI2iG6-TGFlnCj9PN3UEcTjP3HCfBxJ57ktB3v06v4UYPa3ZpUf9MZuI5uBLEpx1_QnAofU8sm9xCqNaN1_J2X0Yi0ThzkWSCUk2Urn-6fKjDsAOWdlIXGplMBRwh1K5kvrGO3s-ZPZ_9dEYO01VWDLLfchQpvDF1RETCC3grLsg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: | Fellow Conservative - These headlines say it all. Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough. They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy. Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. We have the momentum to win in just over a year! Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: But Fellow Conservative, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months. If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: fwd: They called it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John is right. Democrats just can’t win in 2022 if we don’t compete in all 67 counties, rural AND urban.
#
Peter,
I wanted to be sure you saw John's urgent email from earlier about the Virginia election results:
As political director here on Team Fetterman, I think he hit the nail on the head.
Trust me, I’m feeling despair today about the Virginia results and Democratic losses in PA and across the country. I spent the afternoon yesterday in Bucks county knocking doors alongside some of our team.
The only way we can possibly flip Pennsylvania and prevent Republicans from winning this seat in 2022 is by doubling down and visiting every township, borough, and corner of our Commonwealth — _no matter how red or how blue._
**Every county. Every vote. It's more than just a slogan for our campaign, Peter. It's the bottom line of our strategy to elect John, flip Pennsylvania, and save our Democratic majority in 2022.**
**[Will you please read the rest of John's message (I've attached it below) and then donate $5 to fully-fund our urgent 67 Counties Mobilization Plan? We just can't afford to have a repeat of last night's election results in Pennsylvania.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36908?refcode=em20211103-3329&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)**
— Celeste
Celeste Trusty, Political Director
\-------- Forwarded message --------
Sender: John Fetterman
Date: Wednesday, November 3, 2021
Subject: They called it
They called it.
Last night, Democrat Terry McAuliffe was defeated by Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin in the election for Virginia governor.
And just scrolling through the news headlines on Twitter this morning, **it looks like McAullife lost by some *big* margins in Virginia’s most rural counties.**
I’ll just say to you what I’ve always said. It’s never going to be urban OR rural. It’s gotta be urban AND rural.
In other words, I feel like the results in VA make it clear. Democrats won’t win in PA in 2022 if we don’t compete in all 67 counties, urban and rural.
Peter, not only am I the *only* Democrat in this race for U.S. Senate who ran for statewide office before + won.
**I’m the *only* Democrat who ran for statewide office before + won with support in all 67 PA counties — urban, rural, and everywhere in between.**
When Governor Tom Wolf and I ran in 2018, we traveled PA and talked to voters in every county, regardless of how red or blue. We swung more than 900,000 votes compared to 2016, and we did it by chipping away at Republican margins in rural counties.
So I gotta ask:
**[Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign and help prevent another election outcome like last night's? If our Democratic campaign to flip Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat ever needed support from you in Cresco, it’s now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36908?refcode=em20211103-3329&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36908?refcode=em20211103-3329&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)**
Every county, every vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
Thanks for hearing me out,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211103-3329-footer&t=22&refcode2=3329_434096_jC8Tqn&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3329%2E434096%2EjC8Tqn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Kaptur
subject: BREAKING: Republicans just destroyed our district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The partisan games need to stop NOW. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5b1bpOFS_6RLXqiHqogNfea_zRDFrzKjw6afFXXK7A7mHnKxYxrvdyWPZLRUaOZw0AtbKVISiGrMnVkSCC71ZKoiQ2mRwmCWUCQ8HuaAMOGI_6XTDSbG7BK-GW3_ixA6E4ThtMQlIERfPvDlqfT1wChRFcEa95Lu_dbn63YJ3ih4XK6jUorBZb2PDWKhBfsX4dwHMNcgiwfS9esGUhrVAiOibWo-IPfwQW0us8bcxzLXJtVYguGrwogTQv0ad2Jt1KuZ_IcfLnn75Jj_43TmJ_0yE79xhhuDJvXCRWTnXM6a6Ksi0gmcWIWBXb5lCYX5r-shR6jA91Z3BhNIQdpu_2nnx9ZilL4OGzgVICPrbyneb0asRpNQjEd4tjDOntplDoJBFbaP9ulfblMQK9P3Iyk6I66zCCLRx7K_2yQjbAnZMf_sMJRYOqH2xdJyFuB-w/3gp/T2IwQyMsTbeJ7OW7RfWFww/h0/s9FCDlADHiY64fNF6poJ0UnfXvKb3qiis_wFduETPgw)

| | Team -- it's a **new low** for extreme gerrymandering in the new congressional maps proposed by Ohio’s “one Party rule” Republicans.

We were right to fear the worst; **the new maps brutally target Marcy Kaptur,** putting her district at extreme risk of flipping red and eliminating everything we’ve worked so hard for.
**
** **The GOP is not interested in being fair _nor_ giving the people of Ohio proper representation. **

Instead, they have shown us that **they are ready to disregard the overwhelming majority of Ohio voters who want fair districts** and violate both the spirit and letter of the constitutional reform in order to further tip the scale their way.

**The partisan games need to stop _NOW._** It’s time we work together to produce congressional maps that respect the wishes of Ohioans for fair and representative districts.

**[We can’t let them get away with this. Will you donate $25 right now to help us fight back? clean_body: The partisan games need to stop NOW. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team -- it's a new low for extreme gerrymandering in the new congressional maps proposed by Ohio’s “one Party rule” Republicans. We were right to fear the worst; the new maps brutally target Marcy Kaptur, putting her district at extreme risk of flipping red and eliminating everything we’ve worked so hard for. The GOP is not interested in being fair nor giving the people of Ohio proper representation. Instead, they have shown us that they are ready to disregard the overwhelming majority of Ohio voters who want fair districts and violate both the spirit and letter of the constitutional reform in order to further tip the scale their way. The partisan games need to stop NOW. It’s time we work together to produce congressional maps that respect the wishes of Ohioans for fair and representative districts.
